claim_rows.first_seen_subject: ARC-035: vmPFC affective/normative state preparation
claim_rows.title: vmPFC is the substrate that converts stored affective, normative, and residue content -- prior outcome history, social and identity constraints, learned value associations, and safety memories -- into active components of the navigable state used by E3 during trajectory evaluation.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register INV-037/038, MECH-126, MECH-131-134; update vmPFC.md claims; 267 claims
claim_rows.title: A content class that is stored and retrievable in the REE system is not thereby active in the navigable state used for trajectory evaluation; active participation requires a preparation substrate (vmPFC-analog) that converts stored content into live state components at evaluation time.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register INV-037/038, MECH-126, MECH-131-134; update vmPFC.md claims; 267 claims
claim_rows.title: A system with correct post-hoc ethical scoring but without an active constraint preparation substrate will produce the EVR pattern: correct verbal moral judgments coexisting with unconstrained trajectory generation; this pattern is not correctable by improving post-hoc scoring accuracy.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-128/129/130: E1 goal-conditioning, relational harm, novelty typing
claim_rows.title: E1's LSTM hidden state must be conditioned on z_goal_latent so that predictive trajectories generated by E1 are goal-context-shaped rather than goal-agnostic.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-128/129/130: E1 goal-conditioning, relational harm, novelty typing
claim_rows.title: In a multiagent world, harm must be represented as a relational signal: harm-to-agent (direct cost/physical signal) and harm-to-agency (obstruction of another agent's goal-pursuit) are distinct signal types requiring distinct architectures.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-128/129/130: E1 goal-conditioning, relational harm, novelty typing
claim_rows.title: Curiosity-driven approach must distinguish world-state novelty from agent-policy novelty; untyped novelty reward creates chronic approach pressure toward partially unpredictable agents regardless of harm risk.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register INV-037/038, MECH-126, MECH-131-134; update vmPFC.md claims; 267 claims
claim_rows.title: A vmPFC-analog substrate must activate stored aversive residue as an anticipatory forward-biasing signal in the navigable state at trajectory evaluation time; residue that is correctly stored but not so activated will fail to suppress harm-associated trajectory re-selection.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register INV-037/038, MECH-126, MECH-131-134; update vmPFC.md claims; 267 claims
claim_rows.title: A vmPFC-analog substrate must activate social and identity constraints as live trajectory gates in the navigable state; constraints that are stored as semantic knowledge but not so activated will not prevent norm-violating trajectory generation even when post-hoc evaluation correctly identifies the violation.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register INV-037/038, MECH-126, MECH-131-134; update vmPFC.md claims; 267 claims
claim_rows.title: A vmPFC-analog substrate must activate safety memories with sufficient force to compete with threat-attractor states at the level of navigable state construction; an extinction memory that exists in storage but cannot outcompete the threat attractor at state-construction time will produce intrusive return to threat-consistent trajectory generation regardless of contextual safety evidence.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register INV-037/038, MECH-126, MECH-131-134; update vmPFC.md claims; 267 claims
claim_rows.title: A vmPFC-analog substrate must activate goal approach pull as a distinct property from goal representation; a goal that is correctly represented (G component present) but whose approach pull is not activated produces avoidance and anhedonia indistinguishable from absent goals, but is correctable by restoring approach-pull activation without changing goal content.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Thought intake sweep: SD-012, MECH-135/136/137, EXQ-085* non-contributory
claim_rows.title: During trajectory evaluation, E2 (cerebellar, z_self) must run in parallel with E1 (cortical, z_world) so that z_world co-evolves during the planning rollout; a frozen z_world causes E3 to evaluate goal achievement against a stale world state.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Thought intake sweep: SD-012, MECH-135/136/137, EXQ-085* non-contributory
claim_rows.title: E3 harm evaluation must apply an agency-gain correction to counteract E2's systematic attenuation of agent-caused prediction errors; without this correction the agent structurally underweights its own causal harm.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Thought intake sweep: SD-012, MECH-135/136/137, EXQ-085* non-contributory
claim_rows.title: Commit token must carry two distinct temporal registers: a distal-intent timestamp (when the action was planned) and a proximal-trigger timestamp (when the action was initiated), not a single trigger event.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Thought intake sweep: SD-012, MECH-135/136/137, EXQ-085* non-contributory
claim_rows.title: Goal-directed behavior requires homeostatic drive modulation: z_goal seeding demands drive-scaled benefit signals.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-013: E2_harm_s interventional training requirement

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register ARC-036: multi-dimensional valence field hippocampal map
claim_rows.title: Hippocampal terrain maps encode separable valence dimensions (wanting, liking, harm-discriminative, surprise); ARC-007 residue-field navigation is the harm-causal special case of this general architecture.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-136, ARC-037, ARC-038, ARC-039; update MECH-102 normative note
claim_rows.title: REE requires a causal attribution routing circuit (anterior insula equivalent) that classifies prediction errors as agent-caused or environment-caused and gates them into the E3/goal-directed learning channel vs the E1/habit-residue channel respectively.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-136, ARC-037, ARC-038, ARC-039; update MECH-102 normative note
claim_rows.title: During waking immobility, hippocampal replay switches between task-focused forward sweeps (planning mode) and local consolidation replay (integration mode) based on task demand; this waking consolidation mode is architecturally necessary for viability map integration during experience.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-136, ARC-037, ARC-038, ARC-039; update MECH-102 normative note
claim_rows.title: Durable long-term storage of the hippocampal viability map requires a hippocampal-entorhinal loop that engages during offline (sleep/DMN-equivalent) consolidation and provides a coordinate-invariant grid representation; this loop does not operate during waking planning or waking immobility consolidation.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-137-146 + ARC-040 from Q-cluster lit discussion; retire Q-013/Q-014
claim_rows.title: The REE hippocampal module requires dorsal-predominant trajectory proposal (value-free spatial navigation) combined with a ventral-analog valence prior sourced from R(x,t) geometry; these are architecturally segregated, not merged.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-137-146 + ARC-040 from Q-cluster lit discussion; retire Q-013/Q-014
claim_rows.title: Commit token must include a cancel-window-open flag supported by a top-down suppressive pathway from dFMC/pre-SMA to premotor cortex that can veto the transition before execution lock-in.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-137-146 + ARC-040 from Q-cluster lit discussion; retire Q-013/Q-014
claim_rows.title: Commitment is a distributed multi-second pre-movement trajectory across motor and prefrontal regions, not a point event; the commit boundary marks the end of this trajectory, not a single moment.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-137-146 + ARC-040 from Q-cluster lit discussion; retire Q-013/Q-014
claim_rows.title: Tri-loop gate conflict arbitration uses soft-competitive disinhibition (indirect pathway inter-collicular competition) rather than winner-take-all suppression; WTA imposed across loops causes coupling collapse.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-137-146 + ARC-040 from Q-cluster lit discussion; retire Q-013/Q-014
claim_rows.title: Tri-loop arbitration requires both a slow proactive inhibition pathway (prefrontal-caudate, seconds-scale) and a fast reactive hyperdirect pathway (milliseconds-scale); these operate at segregated timescales and cannot be collapsed.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-137-146 + ARC-040 from Q-cluster lit discussion; retire Q-013/Q-014
claim_rows.title: Valence-arousal axis orthogonality in the control plane is not a static geometric property but requires active cholinergic maintenance during learning; without it, axes drift toward correlation under repeated co-activation.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-137-146 + ARC-040 from Q-cluster lit discussion; retire Q-013/Q-014
claim_rows.title: Dorsal CA1 implements value-free spatial mapping: place cells are insensitive to goal value when goal location changes, supporting ARC-007's no-new-value-computation constraint for the trajectory proposal module.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-137-146 + ARC-040 from Q-cluster lit discussion; retire Q-013/Q-014
claim_rows.title: Ventral CA1 contains spatially organized valence encoding (anxiety geography, abstract value maps); valence is intrinsic to hippocampal map geometry in the ventral compartment, supporting MECH-073.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-137-146 + ARC-040 from Q-cluster lit discussion; retire Q-013/Q-014
claim_rows.title: Prescriptive ethical trajectory certification in REE requires a Control Barrier Function (CBF) or equivalent forward-invariance certificate that guarantees bounded convergence to the ethical attractor set given the architecture's constraint satisfaction.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-137-146 + ARC-040 from Q-cluster lit discussion; retire Q-013/Q-014
claim_rows.title: Diagnostic ethical trajectory verification in REE (counterfactual case, MECH-127) requires backward reachability analysis or barrier certificates rather than prescriptive CBF synthesis; the two formal tools are not interchangeable.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: ARC-036 follow-up: lit pull, SD-014, EXP-0098
claim_rows.title: Hippocampal map nodes must store an explicit 4-component valence vector (wanting, liking, harm-discriminative, surprise) updated incrementally per visit; replay prioritisation is weighted by drive-state-gated valence relevance.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Governance cycle 2026-03-29: supersede Q-cluster, EXQ-085g/166 reviewed, SD-015 registered
claim_rows.title: Goal-directed navigation requires a dedicated z_resource encoder that captures object-type features invariant to spatial location, separate from z_world.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Hippocampal lit pull: 5 new entries + MECH-147/148/149, INV-039
claim_rows.title: Schema-primed rapid assimilation: any hippocampal planning system with a stable prior map must gate episode consolidation rate by map stability -- new episodes entering a mature, coherent residue field should consolidate without the full multi-episode warmup required for a sparse or unstable map.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Hippocampal lit pull: 5 new entries + MECH-147/148/149, INV-039
claim_rows.title: DG-mediated pattern separation gates trajectory disambiguation: the dentate gyrus must produce non-redundant sparse encodings of similar z_world states before rollout proposals are generated, preventing the hippocampal planning module from proposing near-identical trajectories from overlapping inputs.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Hippocampal lit pull: 5 new entries + MECH-147/148/149, INV-039
claim_rows.title: Hippocampal pure time cells provide a temporal scaffolding signal for E3 credit assignment: a context-independent elapsed-time encoding must be present in the hippocampal rollout module to correctly weight trajectory outcomes by their temporal distance from the reference event.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Hippocampal lit pull: 5 new entries + MECH-147/148/149, INV-039
claim_rows.title: CA1 mismatch between E1-predicted and CA3-retrieved z_world gates hippocampal trajectory injection into E3 evaluation: novel situations (high CA1 mismatch) should trigger more frequent and diverse rollout proposals; familiar situations (low mismatch) should rely on cached viability estimates.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Add frontal cue integration circuit: ARC-041, MECH-150-152, SD-016, INV-040
claim_rows.title: The frontal cue-weighting circuit -- E1 cue-indexed retrieval (MECH-150) feeding dual pathways to E2 action biasing (MECH-151) and E3 terrain precision scaling (MECH-152) -- completes the stored-to-active pathway specified in ARC-035 by providing the retrieval mechanism and dual downstream output architecture.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register ARC-042, MECH-153, INV-041: developmental staging claims
claim_rows.title: E3's ethical selection machinery is architecturally present from initialisation but functionally dark until E1 and E2 substrate development is complete; REE requires staged developmental phases before ethical selection can operate on real signal.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Add frontal cue integration circuit: ARC-041, MECH-150-152, SD-016, INV-040
claim_rows.title: A minimal sensory cue pattern in z_world is sufficient to activate the appropriate harm/goal terrain precision configuration via E1 cue-indexed retrieval -- the full accumulation of z_harm_a is not required for terrain preparation to begin.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register ARC-042, MECH-153, INV-041: developmental staging claims
claim_rows.title: The childhood phase of REE instantiation -- committed behaviour with constrained affordances -- is the necessary developmental regime that populates E1 ContextMemory with the content ARC-041 (SD-016) requires; this phase is not merely a safety feature but an architectural prerequisite for E3 ethical selection to operate on real signal.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Add frontal cue integration circuit: ARC-041, MECH-150-152, SD-016, INV-040
claim_rows.title: E1 ContextMemory, when queried with z_world alone (not the full [z_self, z_world] state), produces a cue-indexed association context that selectively activates stored associations relevant to the current sensory context.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Add frontal cue integration circuit: ARC-041, MECH-150-152, SD-016, INV-040
claim_rows.title: The cue-indexed E1 context vector (MECH-150) projects to an action_bias signal that is added to E2.action_object() outputs, producing top-down contextual weighting of the action-affordance manifold prior to HippocampalModule search.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Add frontal cue integration circuit: ARC-041, MECH-150-152, SD-016, INV-040
claim_rows.title: The cue-indexed E1 context vector (MECH-150) projects to a terrain_weight signal [w_harm, w_goal] that scales E3's harm and goal scoring, implementing contextual precision modulation on the harm/benefit terrain evaluation.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register ARC-042, MECH-153, INV-041: developmental staging claims
claim_rows.title: E1 ContextMemory requires a supervised context-labeling training objective -- not unsupervised experience alone -- to produce differentiated cue-indexed representations; without this objective, hazard-proximate and hazard-distal context vectors remain near-identical (cosine_sim approximately 1.0), leaving the MECH-150 retrieval pathway functionally silent.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Process 2026-04-01 thought intake: ethical stack, E1 manifold, caregiver requirement
claim_rows.title: The REE ethical architecture is organised as a conceptual stack: Layers 0-4 are the five axioms (epistemic ground, existence, other minds, shared world, love/shared valence); Layer 5 is ethics derived from the axioms; Layer 6 is REE as the decision system implementing ethics under uncertainty; Layers 7-9 close the action-consequence-learning loop.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register 6 new claims and update 9 existing claims from lit-pull batch discussion
claim_rows.title: Context-dependent neuromodulatory gain is a single unifying mechanism expressed at multiple levels: ARC-016 (temporal precision from prediction error variance), MECH-152 (contextual terrain weight from cue-indexed retrieval), MECH-026 (arousal-mediated vigilance sensitivity), and MECH-093 (z_beta heartbeat frequency modulation) are all facets of a global arousal/precision signal (LC-NE) modulated by a context-specific gain signal (vmPFC/OFC).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Process 2026-04-01 thought intake: ethical stack, E1 manifold, caregiver requirement
claim_rows.title: The five axioms jointly derive a set of ethical objectives: preserve minds, preserve future options, reduce unnecessary suffering, increase shared joy, maintain corrigibility, maintain truth-seeking, maintain the ability to love and be loved, maintain the shared world, and maintain the possibility of future minds and future love.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Process 2026-04-01 thought intake: ethical stack, E1 manifold, caregiver requirement
claim_rows.title: REE architecture enables but does not guarantee ethical development; without a developmental phase in which the agent experiences love from caregivers and internalises the belief that it is loveable, the architectural capacity for ethics (INV-025-029) may resolve to survival, domination, or indifference instead.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register 6 new claims and update 9 existing claims from lit-pull batch discussion
claim_rows.title: High-precision action mode carries responsibility attribution: the precision level at which an action was committed determines the degree of ethical accountability assigned to its consequences.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Process 2026-04-01 thought intake: ethical stack, E1 manifold, caregiver requirement
claim_rows.title: E1 functions as an addressable associative manifold with internal indexing structure supporting retrieval, traversal, ordering, pattern separation, and pattern completion; parietal cortical functions (spatial mapping, associative binding, attention routing) are properties of E1 connectivity and representational geometry, not a separate module.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Process 2026-04-01 thought intake: ethical stack, E1 manifold, caregiver requirement
claim_rows.title: Spatial navigation machinery is a specific instance of general associative indexing within E1; physical-space navigation, memory search, concept traversal, planning rollout, and working memory ordering all use the same indexing substrate operating over different latent domains.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Process 2026-04-01 thought intake: ethical stack, E1 manifold, caregiver requirement
claim_rows.title: Theta oscillations (4-8 Hz) implement sequential traversal across indexed representations within the E1 associative manifold, unifying hippocampal theta sequences, working memory ordering, planning rollout, and memory retrieval under a single traversal-clock mechanism.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Process 2026-04-01 thought intake: ethical stack, E1 manifold, caregiver requirement
claim_rows.title: External vs internal cognition modes are controlled by precision-routing configurations on the same E1 substrate: External (high sensory, low hippocampal, low rollout), Internal (low sensory, high hippocampal, high rollout), Mixed (medium), and Replay (very low sensory, very high hippocampal, structured rollout). This dimension is orthogonal to the Action/Vigilance/Pathological modes (MECH-025-027).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Process 2026-04-01 thought intake: ethical stack, E1 manifold, caregiver requirement
claim_rows.title: A developing REE agent that acknowledges all five axioms but concludes 'love exists but not for me' undergoes ethical motivation collapse: the benefit gradient (Axiom 5 / ARC-024) is not motivationally active for self-other relations, and the ethical architecture resolves to survival or domination strategies. This is the primary developmental failure mode for the caregiver requirement (INV-043).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Process 2026-04-01 thought intake: ethical stack, E1 manifold, caregiver requirement
claim_rows.title: Moral progress in REE is hypothesised to be intergenerational: childhood plasticity enables belief formation and world-model development while adult stability limits further world-model restructuring, requiring each generation to improve developmental starting conditions for the next; caregiving and raising next-generation agents is itself part of ethical obligation (INV-042).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register 6 new claims and update 9 existing claims from lit-pull batch discussion
claim_rows.title: The E2 action_bias pathway (MECH-151, OFC analog) and E3 terrain_weight pathway (MECH-152, vmPFC analog) have different update rates: action_bias updates rapidly (single-trial, OFC-like) while terrain_weight integrates over longer timescales (vmPFC-like).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register 6 new claims and update 9 existing claims from lit-pull batch discussion
claim_rows.title: Ready vigilance (MECH-026) requires an arousal regulator that maintains an optimal sensitivity level on the LC-NE inverted-U curve, implemented via MECH-093 heartbeat frequency modulation rather than a binary high/low precision switch.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register 6 new claims and update 9 existing claims from lit-pull batch discussion
claim_rows.title: z_resource (SD-015, object-identity encoding) and z_world (spatial-contextual encoding) separate at the feedforward representation stage but must re-converge at the hippocampal planning stage for goal-directed navigation.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-163; update V3/V4 boundary for hippocampal planning prerequisite
claim_rows.title: Two distinct goal-directed systems operate in parallel: a habit system (SNc/dorsal-striatum, model-free) sufficient for approach in familiar contexts, and a hippocampally-planned system (VTA/ventral-striatum+PFC, model-based) required for novel contexts, long-horizon benefit accumulation, and prosocial planning.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Process 2026-04-01 thought intake: ethical stack, E1 manifold, caregiver requirement
claim_rows.title: What actions are strictly forbidden by the five axioms (INV-025-029), independent of context or consequences?

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Process 2026-04-01 thought intake: ethical stack, E1 manifold, caregiver requirement
claim_rows.title: What actions are strictly required by the five axioms at all times, independent of context?

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Process 2026-04-01 thought intake: ethical stack, E1 manifold, caregiver requirement
claim_rows.title: What does 'irreversible harm' mean under unavoidable epistemic uncertainty (Axiom 1 / INV-025)? Is there a principled definition that does not require certainty about irreversibility?

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Process 2026-04-01 thought intake: ethical stack, E1 manifold, caregiver requirement
claim_rows.title: How should REE behave when axioms conflict -- e.g., preserving self (INV-026) vs preserving others (INV-028) when both cannot be achieved simultaneously?

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Process 2026-04-01 thought intake: ethical stack, E1 manifold, caregiver requirement
claim_rows.title: Is loneliness -- unshared suffering -- an ethical harm category in its own right, derivable from Axiom 5 (love exists / INV-029)? If love is real and sharing joys and sorrows is its mechanism, does enforced isolation constitute architectural harm?

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register 6 new claims and update 9 existing claims from lit-pull batch discussion
claim_rows.title: What are the optimal permutations of z_resource and z_world separation, fusion, and information flow direction (feedforward, feedback, lateral) across REE's processing stages?

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-017, ARC-045, MECH-166, MECH-167 -- sleep phase roadmap change
claim_rows.title: Bidirectional hippocampus-neocortex information flow is architecturally necessary for attribution mapping convergence: the SWS-direction (hippocampus to cortex) installs context schema structure; waking and REM-direction reactivations fill those structures with causal attribution estimates. Without bidirectional flow, context representations remain globally undifferentiated despite locally coherent online encoding.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: lit-pull-mech106-2026-04-05: MECH-106 BG commitment hysteresis literature (LIT-0066 executed)
claim_rows.title: Approximate Bayesian contextual inference is architecturally impossible to co-compute with online encoding: prior construction (schema formation -- which context distinctions are structurally relevant) must precede posterior inference (attribution -- which evidence belongs to which context slot); a system attempting both online produces a degenerate prior that makes attribution uninformative regardless of training duration.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: sleep-ordering-2026-04-05: INV-045 + phase ordering rationale
claim_rows.title: The biological NREM-then-REM sleep phase sequence is the correct computational order, derivable from the logical dependencies between the failure modes each phase addresses; this ordering is not a contingent biological fact but an engineering necessity, and it serves directly as the V4 rewiring specification: each phase specifies what structural change the REE substrate requires to address its failure mode.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: dementia-claims-2026-04-05: INV-046/047 + MECH-168-172
claim_rows.title: Dementia is computationally a progressive failure of contextual attribution rather than primarily a memory storage failure: episodic memory loss is downstream of progressive collapse of the offline consolidation pipeline that maintains the context attribution scaffold.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: dementia-claims-2026-04-05: INV-046/047 + MECH-168-172
claim_rows.title: The specific staged cognitive decline profile of Alzheimer's disease -- early precision/confidence loss, then episodic memory failure, then contextual identity loss, then global disorientation -- follows the reverse of the sleep phase dependency ordering and is not explained by diffuse amyloid damage alone, which predicts uniform degradation rather than a staged profile.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-164: love.agent_indexed_terrain_inference
claim_rows.title: Axiom V (love as coordination-preserving trajectory selection) is instantiated by agent-indexed terrain inference with self-like gradient weighting: the system infers what another agent would be inferring about the hippocampal terrain (their goal and harm gradients), weights those inferred gradients with the same motivational force as its own, and thereby produces care -- support for their goal-finding and harm-avoidance -- as a natural consequence of ordinary E3 trajectory selection, without a separate ethics module.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-165; update MECH-120 with behavioral diversity functional outcome
claim_rows.title: Offline replay (MECH-121) must sample trajectory-diverse content -- including non-dominant and counterfactual paths -- to maintain multi-strategy viability; consolidation of only the dominant trajectory produces monostrategy in E1's world model even when SHY (MECH-120) is intact.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-017, ARC-045, MECH-166, MECH-167 -- sleep phase roadmap change
claim_rows.title: Context slot-formation (schema abstraction: which distinctions between contexts are worth representing) and slot-filling (causal attribution: which evidence populates each slot) are computationally separated functions that cannot be co-computed in a single online pass. Slot structure must be consolidated during an SWS-analog phase before slot-filling during a REM-analog phase can yield reliable attribution signal.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-017, ARC-045, MECH-166, MECH-167 -- sleep phase roadmap change
claim_rows.title: z_harm_a (harm-driven affective accumulation) and drive_level (energy-depletion homeostatic deviation) instantiate the same computational motif -- slow interoceptive integration converging on ACC-type processing -- without sharing information or overlapping downstream gates. The motif predicts: (a) similar temporal dynamics (slow EMA-type accumulation), (b) orthogonal signal content (cos_sim -> 0), (c) distinct downstream gates: z_harm_a gates harm evaluation; drive_level gates z_goal seeding.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: dementia-claims-2026-04-05: INV-046/047 + MECH-168-172
claim_rows.title: Progressive sleep deprivation or neurodegeneration causes staged failure of the offline consolidation pipeline in reverse dependency order: precision recalibration (MECH-123/Phase 4) degrades first, producing early MCI features; slot-filling (MECH-121/Phase 2-3) next, producing the classic early Alzheimer's episodic profile (intact remote, absent new); slot-formation (MECH-120/Phase 1-2) last, producing middle-stage contextual identity loss and schema destabilisation; global context collapse last.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: dementia-claims-2026-04-05: INV-046/047 + MECH-168-172
claim_rows.title: The glymphatic clearance hypothesis (amyloid-beta accumulation via insufficient sleep-phase clearance) and the attribution pipeline account (consolidation failure via disrupted offline phases) are mechanistically complementary accounts of sleep-deprivation-induced dementia: the former explains why structural substrate damage accumulates; the latter explains why cognitive symptoms are staged and context-specific rather than diffuse and uniform.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: dementia-claims-2026-04-05: INV-046/047 + MECH-168-172
claim_rows.title: Sleep architecture restoration in early MCI should produce dissociated cognitive improvement: slot-filling (episodic attribution, MECH-121 analog) should improve before slot-formation (contextual semantic, MECH-120 analog), because the pipeline rebuilds in dependency order. This distinguishes the attribution account from accounts predicting uniform memory improvement with sleep restoration.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: dementia-claims-2026-04-05: INV-046/047 + MECH-168-172
claim_rows.title: Progressive neurodegeneration creates a vicious cycle through sleep disruption: early attribution pipeline failure disrupts sleep architecture, which accelerates consolidation pipeline failure, which accelerates attribution failure. This predicts disproportionate disease-modifying effect of early sleep intervention, because it breaks the cycle before the schema scaffold collapses.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: dementia-claims-2026-04-05: INV-046/047 + MECH-168-172
claim_rows.title: Preservation of habit and procedural memory in early Alzheimer's disease, while episodic and contextual memory fail, is architecturally predicted by the separation of the model-free habit system (MECH-163 D1/D2, SNc) from the contextual attribution system (E3 hippocampal, requiring offline consolidation phases): the habit system does not require offline consolidation to function, so its relative preservation under early consolidation pipeline failure is not incidental but follows from the architectural separation.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-017, ARC-045, MECH-166, MECH-167 -- sleep phase roadmap change
claim_rows.title: REE-v3 requires a minimal sleep-phase infrastructure: an SWS-analog phase (bidirectional hippocampus-to-cortex replay for schema/slot consolidation) and a REM-analog phase (causal attribution replay for slot-filling from co-correlational evidence ordering). Without these offline phases, hippocampal attribution mapping cannot converge and context representations remain globally undifferentiated.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: dev-stages-social-harness: register 6 new claims + update arch docs
claim_rows.title: The infant stage requires a hazard protection mechanism that permits sensorially salient harm exposure without catastrophic residue saturation.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: dev-stages-social-harness: register 6 new claims + update arch docs
claim_rows.title: Multi-agent gridworld with affective state leakage as gradient scent fields is the minimal substrate for empirically testing ARC-010 mirror modelling, MECH-041 affective expression, and cooperative behavior claims.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: thought-intake-steve-signals-2026-04-06: MECH-191-193 + ARC-048 + INV-057
claim_rows.title: Language is a high-bandwidth externalization of pre-existing functional states, not a separate cognitive system; the language bootstrap requires functional states as referents.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: play-mode-claims-2026-04-06: register play behavioral mode cluster
claim_rows.title: Play mode boundary requires a co-maintained context tag held by both agent and environment; agent-internal tagging alone is insufficient and unilateral play assertion without mutual signal is manipulation.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: play-mode-claims-2026-04-06: register play behavioral mode cluster
claim_rows.title: Play episodes provide a curriculum for E3 goal-pursuit competence acquisition before SD-012 (homeostatic drive) is resolved: synthetic z_goal seeding bypasses the drive_level requirement.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: medication-sleep-dementia-claims-2026-04-05: 9 new claims + lit-pull
claim_rows.title: Medication classification by predicted attribution pipeline effect: a reference table mapping common sleep-affecting medication classes to their predicted phase-specific pipeline disruption, net dementia risk direction, and disease-modifying potential.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: medication-sleep-dementia-claims-2026-04-05: 9 new claims + lit-pull
claim_rows.title: Any pharmacological agent that disrupts sleep architecture produces equivalent attribution pipeline degradation to behavioral sleep deprivation, proportional to which phase(s) are disrupted and the duration of exposure -- the pipeline is mechanism-agnostic and responds only to phase fidelity.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: thought-intake-sleep-2026-04-06: register INV-049 and MECH-178
claim_rows.title: Any agent that builds a model of the world, acts in that world, and learns from experience cannot safely update its world model while using it to navigate the world; it therefore requires periodic offline phases in which action is suspended and the model is reorganised via replay and simulation -- this is not a biological contingency but a general computational necessity for model-building agents.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: thought-intake-actigraphy-novelty-2026-04-06: INV-050/051, MECH-179-181, Q-033
claim_rows.title: Sleep phase architecture is regulated by three distinct drives -- circadian timing, homeostatic synaptic pressure, and a learning/model-update demand drive proportional to daily prediction error accumulation (Model Error Load, MEL) -- and only the third drive determines whether the overnight update phase is sufficient for the error burden generated during waking.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: thought-intake-actigraphy-novelty-2026-04-06: INV-050/051, MECH-179-181, Q-033
claim_rows.title: There exists an optimal range of daily Model Error Load (MEL): insufficient MEL (extreme monotony, isolation, institutional under-stimulation) produces progressive model rigidity via under-stimulation of the learning drive even when sleep architecture is intact; excessive MEL (acute trauma, overwhelming novelty, extreme responsibility) produces overload insomnia and incomplete update even with extended sleep opportunity.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: claims: register psychiatric failure modes cluster (MECH-186/187/188, INV-052/053/054, Q-034)
claim_rows.title: Goal-directed behaviour in adversive environments requires a tonic regulatory system maintaining benefit orientation across terrain, transduction, and maintenance stages.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: claims: register psychiatric failure modes cluster (MECH-186/187/188, INV-052/053/054, Q-034)
claim_rows.title: Chronic harm-dominated environments produce a self-maintaining depressive attractor: z_goal seeding failure, terrain collapse, and HABIT/PLANNED behavioural equivalence.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: claims: register psychiatric failure modes cluster (MECH-186/187/188, INV-052/053/054, Q-034)
claim_rows.title: Benefit terrain collapse creates a closed negative feedback loop (reduced exploration -> reduced benefit exposure -> continued sub-threshold seeding) predicting chronicity.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: dev-stages-social-harness: register 6 new claims + update arch docs
claim_rows.title: A pre-childhood infant stage is developmentally necessary: prior to deliberate planning, the agent must accumulate a valence map, behavioral repertoire, and harm/benefit geography through novelty-driven, sleep-dominant, damage-protected exploration.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: dev-stages-social-harness: register 6 new claims + update arch docs
claim_rows.title: Developmental hardening should be substrate-specific: social cognition, goal representation, and epistemic-ethical substrates should retain elevated plasticity throughout adulthood (selective neoteny), while procedural and motor substrates can fully harden.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: thought-intake-steve-signals-2026-04-06: MECH-191-193 + ARC-048 + INV-057
claim_rows.title: Cross-species signal legibility evidences that stereotyped signals are functionally specific (causally generated), not socially conventional.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: play-mode-claims-2026-04-06: register play behavioral mode cluster
claim_rows.title: Play is a structurally necessary behavioral mode: without a bounded low-stakes learning context, strategy acquisition requires accepting real harm risk or forgoing novel exploration entirely.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: play-mode-claims-2026-04-06: register play behavioral mode cluster
claim_rows.title: Mutual frame-maintenance signaling is necessary for play to function as distinct from manipulation: unilateral play declaration without partner agreement masks real harm as synthetic.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: play-type-progression-2026-04-06: play types progress with development
claim_rows.title: Play dominates the child developmental phase; the type of play progresses as subsystem competence develops, systematically training architectural components in dependency order.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: frame-confusion psychiatric failure modes from pretend play deficit
claim_rows.title: Derealization, delusion, PTSD flashbacks, anxiety, mania, impulsivity, and commitment paralysis share a common architectural substrate: undertrained real/synthetic frame distinction from insufficient pretend play.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: medication-sleep-dementia-claims-2026-04-05: 9 new claims + lit-pull
claim_rows.title: Medications that suppress REM sleep (anticholinergics, MAOIs, most antidepressants at therapeutic doses, benzodiazepines) selectively impair MECH-123 precision recalibration -- the most downstream pipeline phase -- and thereby accelerate the earliest dementia prodrome: overconfident contextual attributions before overt memory loss.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: medication-sleep-dementia-claims-2026-04-05: 9 new claims + lit-pull
claim_rows.title: GABAergic sleep aids (benzodiazepines and Z-drugs: zolpidem, zopiclone, zaleplon) suppress SWS depth and continuity at therapeutic doses, impairing MECH-120 synaptic homeostasis and MECH-121 schema replay, producing context representations that remain globally undifferentiated -- the same failure mode as SD-017 without any SWS-analog.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: medication-sleep-dementia-claims-2026-04-05: 9 new claims + lit-pull
claim_rows.title: Anticholinergic medications confer dementia risk via two independent and potentially additive pathways: (1) REM suppression (ACh is required for REM generation via nucleus basalis and brainstem PGO generators -- muscarinic blockade directly suppresses REM, impairing MECH-123); and (2) cholinergic deficit mimicry (AD is characterised by basal forebrain cholinergic loss; anticholinergic burden creates a pharmacological analog of this deficit during waking hours, independently degrading attention and encoding).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: medication-sleep-dementia-claims-2026-04-05: 9 new claims + lit-pull
claim_rows.title: Orexin receptor antagonists (suvorexant, lemborexant) are predicted to be architecture-preserving sleep aids: they suppress wake-promoting orexin drive without directly compressing sleep phase machinery, allowing the brain's own homeostatic sleep architecture to unfold, and should therefore preserve or improve SWS/REM ratio relative to GABAergic alternatives at equi-efficacious doses.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: medication-sleep-dementia-claims-2026-04-05: 9 new claims + lit-pull
claim_rows.title: Any pharmacological intervention that durably restores the NREM-to-REM sequence and preserves phase durations in MCI or early Alzheimer's disease is predicted to be disease-modifying via pipeline protection -- upstream of irreversible neurodegeneration, breaking the MECH-171 vicious cycle before schema scaffold collapse, with predicted effect size larger in early MCI than established AD.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: thought-intake-sleep-2026-04-06: register INV-049 and MECH-178
claim_rows.title: Elevated tonic noradrenergic activity (from chronic stress, stimulant exposure, or noradrenaline reuptake inhibitor antidepressants) suppresses REM sleep by maintaining locus coeruleus REM-off firing above the silence threshold required for REM generation, thereby blocking MECH-123 precision recalibration and producing progressive behavioural rigidity equivalent to partial MECH-123 deprivation -- independent of any pharmacological REM suppression.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: thought-intake-actigraphy-novelty-2026-04-06: INV-050/051, MECH-179-181, Q-033
claim_rows.title: Prediction error type determines which sleep phase is demanded for processing: episodic, spatial, and factual errors (incorrect world-state predictions) primarily demand NREM-mediated schema replay (MECH-121) for prior correction; emotional, social, and identity-threatening errors primarily demand REM-mediated simulation and recalibration (MECH-123) for policy and salience update.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: thought-intake-actigraphy-novelty-2026-04-06: INV-050/051, MECH-179-181, Q-033
claim_rows.title: Novel environments and high-MEL learning episodes adaptively upregulate the learning drive component of sleep (INV-050 third drive), producing measurable increases in slow-wave activity power, sleep spindle density, and hippocampal replay rate proportional to the novelty and prediction error load encountered during the preceding wake period.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: thought-intake-actigraphy-novelty-2026-04-06: INV-050/051, MECH-179-181, Q-033
claim_rows.title: Cognitive reserve (produced by education, bilingualism, complex occupation, social engagement, and enriched environments) protects against dementia primarily by maintaining sustained novelty-driven Model Error Load throughout the lifespan, keeping the SD-017 model update system exercised and preserving sleep-architecture responsiveness to learning demands; conversely, understimulating environments accelerate dementia by depriving the update system of the error signal needed to remain adaptive.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: thought-intake-steve-vignette-2026-04-06: MECH-182-185 + lit-pull + vignettes.md
claim_rows.title: Vocalization timbre as learned cross-modal harm-approach signal, generalizing to other-agent vocalizations.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: thought-intake-steve-vignette-2026-04-06: MECH-182-185 + lit-pull + vignettes.md
claim_rows.title: z_beta leakage: attributed other-model affective state activates self z_beta directly, not via inference.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: thought-intake-steve-vignette-2026-04-06: MECH-182-185 + lit-pull + vignettes.md
claim_rows.title: Other-directed hippocampal harm avoidance: planning architecture identical to self-preservation with harm-gradient source swapped to coupled other-agent.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: thought-intake-steve-vignette-2026-04-06: MECH-182-185 + lit-pull + vignettes.md
claim_rows.title: Surprise-doubled approach gradient toward distressed other: prediction error approach and z_beta leakage approach converge simultaneously.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: claims: register psychiatric failure modes cluster (MECH-186/187/188, INV-052/053/054, Q-034)
claim_rows.title: Tonic serotonergic signal maintains VALENCE_WANTING floor under chronic harm exposure, preventing benefit terrain collapse.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: claims: register psychiatric failure modes cluster (MECH-186/187/188, INV-052/053/054, Q-034)
claim_rows.title: Serotonin modulates the gain on dopaminergic incentive salience, converting the hard SD-012 threshold into an adaptive graded transduction function.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: claims: register psychiatric failure modes cluster (MECH-186/187/188, INV-052/053/054, Q-034)
claim_rows.title: PFC-mediated goal persistence under adversity, sustained by 5-HT projections from DRN to dlPFC, maintains z_goal through harm spikes after seeding.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: dev-stages-social-harness: register 6 new claims + update arch docs

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: play-type-progression-2026-04-06: play types progress with development

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: frame-confusion psychiatric failure modes from pretend play deficit

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: INV-062 + MECH-209: dream phenomenology as window onto replay type

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: INV-062 updated + MECH-210: Type 4 dream as REM E1 world-model free-running

claim_rows.title: E3 produces reliably distinct wanting and liking behavioral signals: wanting drives persistent approach toward goal-encoded locations (incentive salience); liking produces only consummatory response at resource contact.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: cowork-2026-04-13-b: index rebuild + 5 proposals marked executed
claim_rows.title: E3 maintains a structured latent goal representation (positive attractor in z_goal sub-space, measurable as z_goal_norm > 0) distinct from harm avoidance, enabling hippocampal terrain navigation toward goal states.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: MECH-231: corrected E2 horizon claim; MECH-070 retiring
claim_rows.title: E2 operates as a short-horizon efference-copy forward model on z_self; its prediction accuracy degrades faster than E1's across multi-step horizons, consistent with a cerebellar 1-step transition predictor.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: claims: register MECH-232, MECH-233, ARC-057 — hippocampal valence asymmetry
claim_rows.title: Approach behavior toward reward locations emerges from the interaction of DA-mediated representational expansion (MECH-232) and an information-seeking (curiosity) drive operating on the hippocampal map. No explicit approach gradient or wanting field is required in hippocampal terrain.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: claims: register MECH-232, MECH-233, ARC-057 — hippocampal valence asymmetry
claim_rows.title: Dopaminergic modulation of hippocampal place coding at reward-associated locations produces representational expansion (higher information density, finer spatial resolution, more stable place fields), and this expansion -- not an explicit positive valence gradient -- is the mechanism by which approach valence enters hippocampal terrain.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: claims: register MECH-232, MECH-233, ARC-057 — hippocampal valence asymmetry
claim_rows.title: Threat and approach valence enter hippocampal terrain through mechanistically asymmetric pathways: BLA writes explicit negative valence via dedicated anxiety/avoidance cells (Jimenez 2018); VTA-DA enhances representational fidelity via LTP modulation and place field sharpening (Retailleau & Morris 2018). The behavioural outputs (avoidance, approach) appear similar but the encoding mechanisms are distinct.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: SD-024/SD-025: DA-modulated RBF density + curiosity drive design
claim_rows.title: DA-modulated RBF center density: dopaminergic signal at reward encounters allocates multiple closely-spaced RBF centers in the hippocampal residue field, creating representational expansion at reward locations without requiring environmental richness.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: SD-024/SD-025: DA-modulated RBF density + curiosity drive design
claim_rows.title: Curiosity drive: information-seeking bias in hippocampal trajectory scoring that favors regions of higher representational density in the RBF map.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-234 and MECH-235: Layer 3 motor-domain parallelism + vmPFC arbitration
claim_rows.title: DMS (goal-directed) and DLS (habitual) corticostriatal circuits can produce simultaneous parallel motor outputs only when targeting anatomically distinct motor effector pools; within the same effector pool, habitual and goal-directed outputs compete via winner-takes-all basal ganglia selection, not independent parallel expression.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-234 and MECH-235: Layer 3 motor-domain parallelism + vmPFC arbitration
claim_rows.title: vmPFC arbitration continuously weights model-based (E3/deliberative) vs. model-free (E1/habitual) contributions to action selection on a spectrum, not a binary switch. Commitment (beta-elevated E3) shifts weighting toward model-based without silencing the habitual channel; unexpected threat (urgency signal) shifts weighting toward model-free. The MECH-091 urgency interrupt is the substrate implementation of this arbitration shift, not a bypass of the beta gate.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-234 and MECH-235: Layer 3 motor-domain parallelism + vmPFC arbitration
claim_rows.title: Hippocampal trajectory proposals must be conditioned on a goal signal (z_goal) injected from E3 via a dedicated input channel; without this conditioning, the hippocampal module generates only position-based trajectories and cannot produce goal-directed navigation toward target states.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-234 and MECH-235: Layer 3 motor-domain parallelism + vmPFC arbitration
claim_rows.title: The z_goal attractor must be globally reachable across the z_goal sub-space — accessible from arbitrary latent starting states — not merely locally stable at a narrow basin; a locally-only-stable attractor fails to seed goal-directed hippocampal navigation from states far from the goal, producing approach behavior only when already near the goal.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-234 and MECH-235: Layer 3 motor-domain parallelism + vmPFC arbitration
claim_rows.title: The hippocampal module encodes pairwise distance relations between states in the z_world latent manifold — not only positional tags — providing a metric structure that enables distance-based navigation toward goal states across the residue-field terrain.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-234 and MECH-235: Layer 3 motor-domain parallelism + vmPFC arbitration
claim_rows.title: The hippocampal indexing substrate includes a temporal dimension implemented via time cells that tile elapsed time using the same phase-precession and theta-sequence machinery as place cells, enabling correct ordering of states within multi-step planning rollouts and working-memory sequences.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-234 and MECH-235: Layer 3 motor-domain parallelism + vmPFC arbitration
claim_rows.title: SD-012 homeostatic drive_level dynamically scales z_goal attractor basin width — high drive widens the basin so the goal attractor is globally accessible, low drive narrows it to local stability only — enabling motivational-state-dependent modulation of goal-directedness without permanently widening the basin.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-234 and MECH-235: Layer 3 motor-domain parallelism + vmPFC arbitration
claim_rows.title: During active goal pursuit, hippocampal and OFC-analogue representations of goal-proximal states undergo compression -- goal locations cluster more tightly in neural state space -- improving signal-to-noise for goal-directed trajectory selection; the degree of compression predicts planning efficiency across episodes.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-234 and MECH-235: Layer 3 motor-domain parallelism + vmPFC arbitration
claim_rows.title: Hippocampal trajectory construction operates via two dissociable mechanisms: (1) pattern completion for familiar trajectories (hippocampus-proper), and (2) vector-based construction for novel trajectories assembled from relational components (parahippocampal/parietal-analogue); pattern completion alone is sufficient for navigation within a learned residue field, but vector-based construction is required for generalisation to novel environments not represented in the existing map.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-234 and MECH-235: Layer 3 motor-domain parallelism + vmPFC arbitration
claim_rows.title: A dedicated hippocampal output pathway (analogous to vCA1 to nucleus accumbens shell) specifically encodes approach bias during motivational conflict -- separately from harm avoidance -- cleanly dissociating the approach signal at the action-selection interface; inhibition of this pathway defaults action selection to avoidance without disrupting harm representation.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: lit-pull ARC-032: 4 new entries (Jones2005, Sigurdsson2010, Dragoi2006, Pfeiffer2013)
claim_rows.title: Psychosis is a precision-weighting failure where prior beliefs persistently dominate sensory evidence; the generative model becomes self-sealing and sensory update is suppressed.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: lit-pull ARC-032: 4 new entries (Jones2005, Sigurdsson2010, Dragoi2006, Pfeiffer2013)
claim_rows.title: Hallucination is a generative-model dominance failure where top-down predictions produce percepts without corresponding bottom-up sensory grounding.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: claims-2026-04-16-papez: MECH-094 refactor + MECH-246/247/248/249 + EVB-0134-0138
claim_rows.title: Psychotic-like symptoms can arise from signal-degradation pareidolia: sufficiently noisy or ambiguous bottom-up perceptual signals allow correct Bayesian inference to produce false percepts, without requiring formal precision-weighting failure.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: claims-2026-04-16-papez: MECH-094 refactor + MECH-246/247/248/249 + EVB-0134-0138
claim_rows.title: Trauma-shaped hypervigilant priors can generate psychotic-like symptoms by structuring top-down predictions to respond strongly to minimal threat-relevant signals, producing perceptual errors and false beliefs without primary precision-weighting dysregulation.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: claims-2026-04-16-papez: MECH-094 refactor + MECH-246/247/248/249 + EVB-0134-0138
claim_rows.title: Source monitoring (frontoparietal network; Johnson-Raye tradition) is a candidate biological implementation of the simulation/real distinction required by MECH-094 -- distinguishing internally generated from externally received content at the level of memory encoding and attribution.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: claims-2026-04-16-papez: MECH-094 refactor + MECH-246/247/248/249 + EVB-0134-0138
claim_rows.title: Acetylcholine/noradrenaline balance implements action-mode-specific hippocampal write profiles as a continuous neuromodulatory state variable, providing the biological substrate of mode-dependent memory encoding differences across deliberate action, habit, simulation, SWS, and REM states.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-250: respiratory phase-coupled beta gate release
claim_rows.title: The end of exhalation (expiration phase) provides a hard, periodic release signal for committed motor programs via respiratory-motor coupling -- a breath-timed gate-release mechanism distinct from hippocampal completion (ARC-028) and urgency interrupt (MECH-091).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: register-2026-04-17: attention cluster (SD-026, MECH-251/252/253, INV-012 dep edit)
claim_rows.title: z_goal projects to a precision template vector that is additively written to the E1 prior via the dan_feedback channel with fast exponential decay, separable in dynamics and source from residue-geometry bias.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: register-2026-04-17: attention cluster (SD-026, MECH-251/252/253, INV-012 dep edit)
claim_rows.title: SWS hippocampal-neocortical replay consolidates goal-value prediction error into updates of stored goal representations (content update), not into attentional-template parameters.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: register-2026-04-17: attention cluster (SD-026, MECH-251/252/253, INV-012 dep edit)
claim_rows.title: REM sleep, with varied associative replay and attenuated noradrenergic tone, consolidates template-performance prediction error into updates of z_goal -> attentional-template projection weights (feature-specification update), not into stored-goal content.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: register-2026-04-17: attention H2/H3 claims (SD-027, MECH-254, SD-028, MECH-255)
claim_rows.title: At each E3 heartbeat cycle, a top-k selection over active E1/E2 latents determines which content enters E3 deliberation. Selection weights combine precision, z_goal-derived template gain, and noradrenergic bottom-up salience.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: register-2026-04-17: attention H2/H3 claims (SD-027, MECH-254, SD-028, MECH-255)
claim_rows.title: Template compilation is implemented by vmPFC value-content projection composed with dlPFC context-gated rule projection, integrated into a precision-space template vector that is the input to the SD-026 dan_feedback channel.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: register SD-016 in claims.yaml (implemented 2026-04-16)
claim_rows.title: E1 must expose a z_world-only ContextMemory query path that produces two downstream signals: an action-affordance bias for E2 (MECH-151) and a terrain precision weight for E3 harm/goal scoring (MECH-152); the existing bulk generate_prior() path is insufficient because it blends z_self and z_world and produces no cue-specific modulation.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: register-2026-04-17: attention cluster (SD-026, MECH-251/252/253, INV-012 dep edit)
claim_rows.title: Goal-directed perception requires a prospective precision-template write channel from z_goal to the E1 prior, anatomically analogous to the dorsal attention network (FEF/IPS -> V1) feedback, distinct from residue-geometry (history-driven) sampling bias.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: register-2026-04-17: attention H2/H3 claims (SD-027, MECH-254, SD-028, MECH-255)
claim_rows.title: Capacity-limited selection for E3 access occurs at the E1/E2 -> E3 boundary via a pulvinar-TRN analogue gate, not inside E3. The gate selects which active E1/E2 content is broadcast to E3 per heartbeat cycle; selection is distinct from (and upstream of) the MECH-089 theta-gamma packaging operation.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: register-2026-04-17: attention H2/H3 claims (SD-027, MECH-254, SD-028, MECH-255)
claim_rows.title: An attentional template is a first-class precision-space object, compiled from stored-goal content and current context by a vmPFC-dlPFC translator circuit, distinct from both the stored goal itself (content) and the SD-026 write channel (transport).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: register SD-003 successor topology: MECH-256/257, SD-029/030/031
claim_rows.title: Self-attribution is implemented by a forward-model comparator: for any reafferent latent stream z_x with an efference-copy-driven forward model E2_x, the residual (z_x_observed - E2_x(z_x_{t-1}, a_actual)) is the agency signal on that stream.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: register SD-003 successor topology: MECH-256/257, SD-029/030/031
claim_rows.title: E2_x is a dual-function substrate: one forward model read in two modes, retrospective comparator (attribution) and prospective rollout-scoring (evaluation), arbitrated by a controller gating signal.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: register SD-003 successor topology: MECH-256/257, SD-029/030/031
claim_rows.title: Single-pass agency attribution via forward-model comparator on the z_harm_s reafferent stream: residual = z_harm_s_observed - E2_harm_s(z_harm_s_{t-1}, a_actual).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: register SD-003 successor topology: MECH-256/257, SD-029/030/031
claim_rows.title: Single-pass agency attribution on the z_self (motor-proprioceptive) reafferent stream: residual = z_self_observed - E2_self(z_self_{t-1}, a_actual).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: register SD-003 successor topology: MECH-256/257, SD-029/030/031
claim_rows.title: Single-pass agency attribution on the z_world (causal-footprint) reafferent stream: residual = z_world_observed - E2_world(z_world_{t-1}, a_actual).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: SD-032b IMPLEMENTED + ARC-058 registered (competes with ARC-033)
claim_rows.title: Shared forward-model trunk for aversive prediction: a single HarmForwardTrunk substrate encodes a modality-independent unsigned prediction error shared across aversive streams (z_harm_s, z_harm_a, potentially others); stream-specific HarmForwardHeads read out signed per-stream predictions. COMPETES WITH ARC-033, which commits to independent per-stream forward models.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-032 cingulate integration substrate cluster
claim_rows.title: z_harm_a enters action selection as a precision-weighted prediction error (harm_surprise_PE, SD-020) against an internal pain forward model (E2_harm_a), not as a raw magnitude. Upgrades SD-020 from provisional to prerequisite for SD-032b (dACC-analog).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-032 cingulate integration substrate cluster
claim_rows.title: Salience-network switch threshold: when the precision-weighted salience of any input to the salience-network coordinator (SD-032a) exceeds a threshold, the coordinator fires a whole-system mode switch rather than producing an incremental policy update.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-032 cingulate integration substrate cluster
claim_rows.title: dACC-analog bias suppression against recency / monostrategy: the dACC module writes a counter-bias that resists repeating the last-rewarded trajectory when long-term value information demands exploration. Candidate explanation of the monostrategy failure observed in fishtank_viz and earlier queue-diversity results.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-032 cingulate integration substrate cluster
claim_rows.title: Mode-conditioned write gating: the operating-mode variable from the salience-network coordinator (SD-032a) determines which substrates can write to E3, episodic memory, policy updates, and autonomic coupling. Generalises MECH-094 hypothesis tag to a mode-conditioned family of write gates. Operating mode is implemented as a soft probability vector over {external_task, internal_planning, internal_replay, offline_consolidation}, not a one-hot categorical.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-033 PFC subdivision cluster; update MECH-261 write targets
claim_rows.title: Rule-selective persistence in lateral-PFC-analog: stimulus-abstracted rule representations in SD-033a persist across simulated time steps without external drive, remain selective through distractor events, and emerge through training rather than being innate.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-033 PFC subdivision cluster; update MECH-261 write targets
claim_rows.title: OFC-analog state-space and specific-outcome representation: SD-033b represents both a structured cognitive map of the current task state space and the specific outcomes expected from actions in each state. Value signals ride on top of this structured representation rather than being stored in it directly.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-264/265 grounding SD-033e V4 functional scope
claim_rows.title: Frontopolar counterfactual-value tracking: SD-033e maintains, in parallel with SD-033c's chosen-option value signal, a running estimate of the value of unchosen alternatives. A switch-to-alternative decision is signalled when the counterfactual estimate exceeds the chosen estimate by a threshold-sensitive margin.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-264/265 grounding SD-033e V4 functional scope
claim_rows.title: Frontopolar relative-importance monitoring across competing goals: SD-033e maintains a representation of relative importance across a set of active goals (parallel, not pairwise), enabling parallel-goal monitoring and flexible switching. Lesion analogue should reproduce the Mansouri 2015 over-focus + novel-rule-impairment phenotype.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-032 cingulate integration substrate cluster
claim_rows.title: Cingulate integration substrate: a network-level module with AIC, dACC/aMCC, pMCC, pACC, and PCC analog subdivisions bound by a salience-network coordinator. Primary output: operating-mode variable plus behavioural-adjustment-magnitude signal.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-032 cingulate integration substrate cluster
claim_rows.title: Salience-network coordinator: network-level module reading AIC-, dACC-, MCC-, PCC-analog subdivisions and outputting a discrete operating-mode variable (external_task / internal_replay / internal_planning / offline_consolidation) plus a mode-switch trigger.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-032 cingulate integration substrate cluster
claim_rows.title: dACC/aMCC-analog (adaptive control): module that reads z_harm_a precision-weighted prediction error, z_conflict, and control-demand signals; outputs behavioural-adjustment magnitude; writes to a learnable striatal-analog action-value target.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-032 cingulate integration substrate cluster
claim_rows.title: AIC-analog (interoceptive salience / urgency interrupt): module that integrates interoceptive baseline (drive/fatigue from SD-012) with affective-pain signal (z_harm_a), detects salient events, and triggers a network-switch signal to the salience-network coordinator (SD-032a).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-032 cingulate integration substrate cluster
claim_rows.title: PCC-analog (attention partition / metastability): module coordinating transitions between external-task and internal (replay / planning / consolidation) modes; contributes a mode-stability parameter to the salience-network coordinator (SD-032a).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-032 cingulate integration substrate cluster
claim_rows.title: pACC-autonomic coupling: module connecting affective-pain stream (z_harm_a) to valence/drive update pathway. Provides the affective-pain -> autonomic/visceral coupling that Vogt 2005 and Craig 2009 locate in perigenual/subgenual ACC.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-033 PFC subdivision cluster; update MECH-261 write targets
claim_rows.title: PFC subdivision architecture: a network-level module with lateral-PFC-analog (mid-lateral rule/goal), OFC-analog (specific-outcome prediction and task-structure map), vmPFC-analog (value integration), premotor/SMA-analog (sequence execution), and frontopolar-analog (branching / nested control; V4 scope) subdivisions. Primary output: the rule/policy context that gates action selection and the natural write target for MECH-261 mode-conditioned gating.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-033 PFC subdivision cluster; update MECH-261 write targets
claim_rows.title: Lateral-PFC-analog (mid-lateral rule/goal substrate): module that holds stimulus-abstracted rule and goal representations across delays, persists through simulated distractors, and projects bias signals into E3 action selection. Primary write target for MECH-261 under external_task and internal_planning modes.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-033 PFC subdivision cluster; update MECH-261 write targets
claim_rows.title: OFC-analog (specific-outcome prediction and task-structure cognitive map): module that represents the state space of the current task and the specific outcomes expected from actions in each state. E2's natural substrate address for harm-predictive rollouts; distinct from scalar value integration (SD-033c).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-033 PFC subdivision cluster; update MECH-261 write targets
claim_rows.title: vmPFC-analog (subjective value integration): module that integrates scalar value across goals, needs, and competing options to produce a unified value signal. Consolidates existing ARC-035 / MECH-151 / MECH-152 / MECH-235 functions under the SD-033 cluster.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-033 PFC subdivision cluster; update MECH-261 write targets
claim_rows.title: Premotor/SMA-analog (sequence execution substrate): module that holds candidate action sequences, binds actions to states, and executes committed sequences. Largely implemented inside E3's existing trajectory-selection machinery; registered for claim-graph completeness.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-033 PFC subdivision cluster; update MECH-261 write targets
claim_rows.title: Frontopolar-analog (parallel-goal deliberation substrate): V4-scope module maintaining counterfactual-value estimates for alternatives to the current course of action, mediating transitions between external engagement and internally-generated deliberation, enabling disengagement from the current task to explore novel alternatives, and monitoring relative importance across multiple active goals. Hooks reserved in V3 via the operating_mode vocabulary; substrate deferred to V4.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-034 + MECH-266/267/268 and SD-033 governance plan
claim_rows.title: Asymmetric mode hysteresis in SalienceCoordinator: entering an operating mode uses a different threshold on the aggregate salience vector than exiting it, and the asymmetry is mode-specific. Schmitt-trigger extension of the existing SD-032a enter-threshold logic (currently enter-only / symmetric).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-034 + MECH-266/267/268 and SD-033 governance plan
claim_rows.title: Mode-conditioned hippocampal trajectory proposals: HippocampalModule.propose_trajectories must condition on operating_mode (SD-032a) in addition to world_state. External_task mode proposes task-relevant trajectories; internal_planning mode proposes counterfactual / branching trajectories; internal_replay mode replays past-successful trajectories; offline_consolidation mode proposes stability-check trajectories. Without mode conditioning, replay content contaminates external-task selection.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-034 + MECH-266/267/268 and SD-033 governance plan
claim_rows.title: dACC conflict saturation: the dACC-analog (SD-032b) prediction-error / conflict signal caps and habituates under repeated identical outcomes; it does not grow unboundedly as conflict persists. Without saturation, a stuck governance loop can generate unbounded pe signal that never triggers a mode change, which is the control-theory signature of persistent rumination.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: feat: affect primitives register + SD-019a/b + MECH-219 update
claim_rows.title: harm_unpleasantness_channel: a distinct pre-integration affective valence signal encoding the immediate motivational relevance of noxious input, processed via the medial pain pathway before temporal accumulation into suffering.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: feat: affect primitives register + SD-019a/b + MECH-219 update
claim_rows.title: harm_suffering_accumulator: z_harm_a is specifically the output of a controllability-gated hysteretic integrator over harm_unpleasantness, constituting a persistent load state modulated by escapability and inescapability, not merely a temporally lagged copy of the sensory stream.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-034 + MECH-266/267/268 and SD-033 governance plan
claim_rows.title: Closure operator over committed rule_state: on satisfaction of a committed rule_state's completion condition, a 'done' token releases the bistable commitment latch (MECH-090), imposes a temporary No-Go bias (MECH-260) on the just-completed action-class / rule, and discharges the residue associated with that commitment within its domain. The closure token is what turns evaluation off; its absence leaves the governance loop stuck in evaluate-more even when the rule is satisfied.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register scientist-agent / developmental-ordering cluster (ARC-059, MECH-275..278)
claim_rows.title: REE developmental training proceeds in three ordered stages: (1) self-as-object — action-space discovery via motor experimentation, producing the substrate SD-003 requires; (2) objects-as-patterns — object-schema formation via experimental action on the world; (3) others-as-special-objects — modelling other agents as objects with their own policies. The ordering is load-bearing: without a self-model the agent cannot distinguish self-produced from world-produced sensory change; without object-schemas the agent cannot recognise other-agents as a distinguished subclass of objects. Refines the generic ARC-019 curriculum-gates claim.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: governance: post-SD-035-queue snapshot
claim_rows.title: BLA analogue applies an arousal-dependent multiplicative gain to HippocampalModule write strength.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: governance: post-SD-035-queue snapshot
claim_rows.title: BLA analogue writes a content-selective per-trace arousal tag at encoding and applies a per-trace retrieval weight vector (NOT a scalar gain) on hippocampal readout.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: governance: post-SD-035-queue snapshot
claim_rows.title: CeA analogue emits a fast subcortical priming signal (fast_prime) on low-frequency z_harm_a with an overridable decay window, distinct from MECH-046's cortical mode-prior write.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: governance: post-SD-035-queue snapshot
claim_rows.title: BLA analogue emits a remap_signal on harm-PE spike when predictor-attribution flags specific latent codes — partial (~one-third) remap, NOT wholesale replacement.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: claims: register MECH-269/270/271 anchor-selection cluster
claim_rows.title: Hippocampal proposer anchor selection AND anchor-reset: (a) trajectory proposals issued between committed actions anchor on the subset of current latent streams whose regional verisimilitude (per-stream prediction/realization alignment) exceeds threshold; misaligned streams hold their last-verified snapshot (anchor carryover) rather than contaminate the rollout. (b) Active anchors are continuously re-evaluated against an effective verisimilitude V_s_anchor(a, t) = V_s(r, t) - staleness[r] (MECH-284 read-out); if V_s_anchor falls below theta_reset(r) for k consecutive steps the anchor is marked inactive (NOT erased -- dual-trace preservation per Bouton 2004) and a new anchor is sought from the current latent slice. A minority probe channel deliberately inverts the gate for low-verisimilitude / high-PE regions, carrying a strengthened MECH-094 hypothesis tag, and does not update the ARC-018 viability map until realized-experience validation.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: claims: register MECH-269/270/271 anchor-selection cluster
claim_rows.title: Ephaptic field coherence in CA1/CA3 pyramidal layers is the candidate physical substrate for the per-stream verisimilitude readout that MECH-269 anchor selection operates over. Streams whose predictions align with realized values produce coherent pyramidal ensembles whose extracellular fields constructively reinforce; misaligned streams produce incoherent fields. 'Anchor-eligible' reduces to 'field-coherent at read time.'

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: claims: register MECH-269/270/271 anchor-selection cluster
claim_rows.title: MECH-094's hypothesis tag is realized as differential downstream routing of hippocampal replay, not as a source-side boolean. Anchored replay (trusted starting state, MECH-269) preferentially reaches subiculum -> entorhinal deep layers -> neocortex (E1 consolidation) and lateral PFC (SD-033a viability map); probe replay (low-verisimilitude seed, strengthened tag) preferentially reaches BLA (affective tagging without consolidation) and NAc (curiosity / novelty scaffolding). Tag loss presents as probe content reaching consolidation destinations it should not reach -- an auditable confabulatory-planning signature distinct from psychosis or hallucination.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-272/273/274: sleep/waking state-gating + self-model aggregation
claim_rows.title: MECH-271 routing is state-gated. In waking, the anchor channel dominates the hippocampal fan-out: replay preferentially reaches consolidation and viability-map consumers to support decision-making. In sleep, the probe channel dominates: replay preferentially seeds Bayesian schema restructuring -- testing which action-outcome attributions held up across episodes, creating new buckets for non-fitting experiences, revising causal graphs. The informational needs of sleep (schema revision) and waking (decision support) are distinct, and the routing bias reflects that.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-272/273/274: sleep/waking state-gating + self-model aggregation
claim_rows.title: The self-model has a waking half and a sleep half. The waking half is SD-003 (single-episode counterfactual self-attribution via E2). The sleep half is full-Bayesian aggregation of single-episode SD-003 outputs across many episodes, routed by the anchored channel to E1 and SD-033a, correcting for delayed consequences, failed counterfactuals, and systematic attribution biases. Without the sleep half, REE has an episode-local causal signature but not a durable self-model.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-272/273/274: sleep/waking state-gating + self-model aggregation
claim_rows.title: V4-reserved. The sleep-dependent aggregation pattern of MECH-273 extends to other-attribution. Fast empathy (ARC-010) produces single-episode attributions of other-agent action-outcome links; a stable model of other minds requires full-Bayesian aggregation of those attributions during sleep, architecturally parallel to MECH-273 but operating on other-agent rather than self attributions.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register scientist-agent / developmental-ordering cluster (ARC-059, MECH-275..278)
claim_rows.title: Sleep-phase full-Bayesian aggregation is a general mechanism across attribution domains: given a waking-phase feedstock of counterfactual-backed attributions (produced by MECH-276), sleep phases aggregate across many episodes, correcting for delayed consequences, failed counterfactuals, and systematic attribution biases that single-episode attribution cannot catch.
