MECH-273 (self-model aggregation) and MECH-274 (other-model aggregation, V4) are specialisations. Object-schema revision is a further specialisation. INV-049 (offline phases mathematically necessary for model-building agents) is operationalised here: what sleep is mathematically necessary FOR is this cross-episode Bayesian aggregation of counterfactual-backed attribution.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register scientist-agent / developmental-ordering cluster (ARC-059, MECH-275..278)
claim_rows.title: The scientist-agent principle: the waking-phase mechanism that feeds MECH-275 is deliberate intervention. The agent generates hypotheses (proposer-side, via MECH-269 probe channel), selects actions that will produce informative contrast under those hypotheses, executes the actions, observes the outcomes, and computes counterfactual-backed attribution. Correlational observation is insufficient -- the agent must behave like a scientist, performing experiments whose outcomes produce structured attribution signals. Applies across all three developmental stages; specialised by MECH-277 (action-space discovery), MECH-278 (object-schema formation), and a V4 social-intervention mechanism (parallel to MECH-278 for other-agents).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register scientist-agent / developmental-ordering cluster (ARC-059, MECH-275..278)
claim_rows.title: Stage-1 specialisation of MECH-276: the agent discovers its own action space via motor experimentation (motor babbling) before SD-003 counterfactual self-attribution is well-formed. The agent performs motor acts and observes which sensory changes covary with them; the output is the substrate SD-003 requires -- a set of actions the agent has reason to believe are self-initiated and for which it has counterfactual expectations. Without MECH-277, the counterfactual action space (a_cf) is not well-defined and SD-003 degenerates.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register scientist-agent / developmental-ordering cluster (ARC-059, MECH-275..278)
claim_rows.title: Stage-2 specialisation of MECH-276: once the agent can distinguish self-produced from world-produced sensory change (stage 1 complete via MECH-277), it forms object-schemas via experimental action on the world. An object is the stable bundle of features that behave causally together under interventional perturbation -- push here, these features move together; occlude this, that cluster disappears. Object-schema formation is the stage-2 specialisation of the scientist-agent principle, with world-features as the target of intervention. V3's z_world (SD-005) is currently engineered pre-split; this is an architectural shortcut past stage 2.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: governance: post-SD-035-queue snapshot
claim_rows.title: Amygdala analogue as BLA + CeA salience stage between z_harm_a and the cingulate/hippocampus — two peer non-trainable arithmetic modules owning the MECH-046 and MECH-074a-d behaviours.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-036 + MECH-279 + MECH-269 anchor reset criteria from EXQ-471 catatonia exemplar
claim_rows.title: PAG-analog gates the freeze response: freeze commit when z_harm_a x duration exceeds threshold; exit requires z_harm_a to fall below an exit_threshold scaled by gaba_tone; failure of exit produces sustained immobility characteristic of stuporous catatonia.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-037 orexin-analog override cluster + MECH-283/284/285 V_s bidirectional cluster
claim_rows.title: LH-PAG override projection: a direct projection from LH (orexin and/or peri-LC GABA analog) to PAG modulates the GABAergic freeze gate (MECH-279) under metabolic demand. The projection does not silence the freeze gate; it raises its threshold (theta_freeze_effective = theta_freeze_base x (1 + alpha_override x override_signal)). This produces the behavioural transition from freeze to active foraging under sustained hunger plus threat -- the foraging-under-predation phenotype the lit-pull surveys.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-037 orexin-analog override cluster + MECH-283/284/285 V_s bidirectional cluster
claim_rows.title: Orexin-analog gain modulation of drive-coupled arousal (motor-coupling axis): an orexin-analog modulator gates the coupling between drive_level and arousal-relevant downstream targets (PFC for SD-033a deliberation, BLA/CeA for SD-035 amygdala arbitration, beta-gate for MECH-090). Loss of this coupling produces a cataplexy-analog failure where emotional/drive input fails to recruit motor activation -- z_harm and drive_level compute normally but action selection does not integrate them. This is the motor-coupling axis of orexin function; the wake-stability axis (sleep-state gating, the dominant biological role) is MECH-286. Both axes are downstream of the same SD-037 override_signal, predicting clinical co-occurrence of cataplexy with sleep-state instability under orexin loss (narcolepsy).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-037 orexin-analog override cluster + MECH-283/284/285 V_s bidirectional cluster
claim_rows.title: LPB interoceptive routing into harm-arbitration: a lateral-parabrachial-nucleus analog (LPB) routes interoceptive distress signals (visceral malaise, taste-aversion analogs, hypoxia, hypoglycemia) into the harm-arbitration network via PBN-CGRP -> CeA -> PAG. This is the upstream broadcast arm of the threat-side architecture, parallel to VMHdm's predator-side broadcast. Both feed downstream arbiters where SD-037's override_signal reweights them. Architectural commitment: interoceptive harm has a separable input channel from external-threat z_harm, dissociable in pathology and in normal modulation.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-037 orexin-analog override cluster + MECH-283/284/285 V_s bidirectional cluster
claim_rows.title: Verisimilitude recognition-for-recall gate: V_s computed at retrieval time (not proposal time) gates whether a stored episode is even a candidate for re-entry into the proposal stream. Recognition (does this fit my current situation?) is logically prior to anchor-eligibility (is this a good place to start a rollout from?). MECH-269's V_s is computed against the proposed anchor state; MECH-283's V_s is computed against the retrieved episode content. Loss of MECH-283 produces intrusive recall -- episodes that don't fit current context get pulled into the proposal stream (PTSD flashback / schizophrenic loose-association phenomenology).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-037 orexin-analog override cluster + MECH-283/284/285 V_s bidirectional cluster
claim_rows.title: V_s residual schema-staleness accumulator: a region-indexed scalar that integrates broadcast invalidation events (MECH-287) with attribution_weight credit assignment over the active anchor set, leaks slowly, and is read by both online anchor-reset (MECH-269 hysteresis check, waking) and sleep-consolidation priority (MECH-285, offline). Distinct from generic prediction error (which operates on latent values and updates online via gradient): MECH-284 is region-indexed, accumulates across events, and exposes a dual read-out (online + offline). Refined 2026-04-22 from sleep-only formulation to dual-readout formulation after V3-EXQ-475 demonstrated that an agent trapped in a stale anchor needs an online consumer of the staleness signal -- MECH-285 sleep-only readout cannot rescue the agent during waking. Saturated map produces over-attention to schema revision (anxiety-analog); absent map produces schema rigidity (V3-EXQ-475 phenotype: 5-6 PAG releases per seed but never integrate to anchor invalidation -> 1000/1000 freeze-active steps).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-037 orexin-analog override cluster + MECH-283/284/285 V_s bidirectional cluster
claim_rows.title: Sleep-consolidation priority from V_s residuals: during sleep-phase Bayesian aggregation (MECH-275) and sleep-dependent self-model aggregation (MECH-273), the order and weight of replay events is biased by the schema-staleness map produced by MECH-284. Replay is not uniform across schema and is not solely salience-driven (dopaminergic tagging); it is also prioritised by accumulated verisimilitude residuals. Schema regions with the most accumulated 'this is wrong' evidence get replayed first, more often, and with higher schema-update authority during sleep. PTSD-rumination has a clean architectural account here: MECH-285 priority loss co-occurring with MECH-094 hypothesis-tag dysfunction, locking the staleness tag from ever clearing.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-286 (sleep-state transition gate) + hyperarousal-insomnia psychiatric failure mode
claim_rows.title: Override-gated sleep-state transition: SD-037 override_signal also gates entry to and exit from offline (sleep) mode. High override (sustained drive + threat under metabolic demand) suppresses sleep-mode onset; low override + accumulated MECH-284 V_s-residual staleness + permissive threat context permits onset and recruits the MECH-285 sleep-replay priority readout. Architecturally this is the recruitment authority for the offline arm of the V_s bidirectional cluster: MECH-284 accumulates the demand for offline schema repair, MECH-285 sets the priority order, and MECH-286 provides the on-switch. Without MECH-286, MECH-285 produces a priority list with no transition mechanism to consume it. This is the V3 architectural account of orexin's canonical role as wake-stability gate (Saper/Scammell flip-flop), which MECH-281 (drive-arousal coupling) understates by framing cataplexy purely as a motor-coupling failure.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-287 broadcast invalidation trigger; refine MECH-284/269 (V_s runtime invalidation cluster)
claim_rows.title: Dual-component online invalidation trigger: an UPSTREAM anchor-side comparator (CA1/CA3 mismatch flowing through subicular routing per Vinogradova 2001 + O'Mara 2009) coupled to a DOWNSTREAM broadcast event (LC phasic burst per Aston-Jones-Cohen 2005, with parallel signals from generalised dopaminergic prediction error per Schultz 1997 and lateral habenula negative-RPE per Matsumoto-Hikosaka 2007), wired together by the HC-VTA loop (Lisman & Grace 2005). The two components are coupled stages of one trigger event, not alternatives. Distinct from MECH-284 the accumulator: MECH-287 is the discrete trigger event (anchor-side mismatch + broadcast release) that drives accumulation. Triggered by latent-stream prediction failure (norm(z_pred(t-1) - z_obs(t)) > theta_trigger) OR strongly negative value-PE (value_PE(t) < -theta_value) OR exogenous surprise. Carries no schema-region credit on its own; downstream MECH-284 attributes the broadcast event to the active anchor set. Failure modes dissociate from MECH-284: trigger-loss produces single-event blindness (no anchor ever feels invalidated, but staleness map remains queryable); accumulator-loss produces V3-EXQ-475's phenotype directly (releases happen but never integrate). Failure modes also dissociate from MECH-285 sleep priority: trigger-loss prevents staleness from accruing, while sleep-priority loss prevents accrued staleness from being repaired. Within MECH-287 itself, anchor-side comparator failure dissociates from broadcast failure: comparator-loss = no upstream signal to broadcast (silent trigger, biologically a CA1/CA3 lesion); broadcast-loss = comparator fires but no global gain modulation downstream (silent invalidation, biologically an LC lesion).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-288 (event_segmenter) candidate v3_pending
claim_rows.title: Event-segment detection: a substrate-side two-level hierarchical detector that emits monotonic outer.inner segment IDs on detected event boundaries, feeding region-keyed substrates (anchor sets per MECH-269, V_s readouts per Phase 1, staleness accumulators per MECH-284) and the MECH-287 broadcast trigger at the schema/event-segment scale per Eichenbaum 2017 / Sols-DuBrow-Davachi 2017 / Baldassano 2017. Default substrate: PE-threshold detector on the fast scale (z_world+z_self) and BOCPD-Gaussian latent change-point on the slow scale (z_goal); MECH-287 broadcast fires downstream of MECH-288 boundaries (Clewett 2025) rather than via an independent comparator. The segment_id field is the region key consumed by the V_s invalidation runtime cluster; without it, MECH-269 anchor sets and per-region V_s aggregation have no substrate-native source for the region partition.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-036 + MECH-279 + MECH-269 anchor reset criteria from EXQ-471 catatonia exemplar
claim_rows.title: GABAergic regulatory layer applies cross-stream exponential decay (z_harm_s, z_harm_a, z_beta) modulated by tonic gaba_tone; missing-decay regulator is the proximal substrate cause of harm-stream lock-in (catatonia subtype II) observed in V3-EXQ-471.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-037 orexin-analog override cluster + MECH-283/284/285 V_s bidirectional cluster
claim_rows.title: Broadcast override regulator (orexin-analog) is the third regulatory layer of the V3 control stack: a small, broadly-projecting gain modulator that integrates internal homeostatic state and threat context to produce an override_signal that reweights z_harm at downstream commit gates and gates the SD-012 drive->z_goal seeding bridge. Dissociable from SD-036 (GABA decay) and from MECH-186/187/188 (5-HT goal-pipeline gain): each layer predicts a clinically distinct failure phenotype (catatonia subtype II / depression / narcolepsy + PWS-hyperphagia). SD-036 alone is architecturally insufficient to break harm-stream lock-in under sustained threat; SD-037 supplies the override authority that lets metabolic demand drive z_goal seeding when threat persists.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-038, MECH-289/290/291 from waking/sleep replay lit pull
claim_rows.title: The hippocampal SWR trajectory generator has anti-recency weighting: infrequently experienced trajectories are proposed more often than recently committed ones, and novel-path sequences (never behaviorally executed) are actively generated from available path segments.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-038, MECH-289/290/291 from waking/sleep replay lit pull
claim_rows.title: At trajectory completion, HippocampalModule performs a backward temporal credit sweep that propagates the terminal outcome (goal contact or failure) retroactively through preceding states, consistent with the reverse replay observed at reward endpoints in awake rats (Foster & Wilson 2006).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-038, MECH-289/290/291 from waking/sleep replay lit pull
claim_rows.title: Waking-online and quiescent-offline CEM modes require distinct parameter profiles: waking mode uses short rollout horizon, context-anchored start states, and low exploration weighting; quiescent mode uses longer rollout horizon, free start states drawn from the full map, and high exploration weighting (anti-recency bias per MECH-289).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-038, MECH-289/290/291 from waking/sleep replay lit pull
claim_rows.title: HippocampalModule CEM trajectory sampling must include an anti-recency exploration bonus that down-weights recently committed trajectory segments, ensuring the proposal distribution covers all available paths rather than converging on recency-weighted routes.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Add ghost-goal search claim pack
claim_rows.title: A good agent needs both a continuous wanting landscape and a discrete bank of unresolved goal traces: field-level wanting supports smooth local guidance, while ghost-goal traces preserve blocked or deferred goals whose local gradient has collapsed.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-294, MECH-269b, MECH-295, Q-040 + 3 lit-pulls
claim_rows.title: Regional verisimilitude V_s gates not only hippocampal proposer anchor selection but also which streams ground forward predictions in cortical world models (E1 sensory predictor, E2 transition model). Without symmetric V_s gating on E1/E2 rollouts, downstream consumers receive stale-but-confident-looking prediction errors -- the wired-but-inert failure mode.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Add ghost-goal search claim pack
claim_rows.title: Inactive or strained anchors whose preserved goal payload still matches the current goal form a ranked ghost-goal bank; priority scales with wanting, goal-match, staleness, and recoverability rather than with staleness alone.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Add ghost-goal search claim pack
claim_rows.title: Waking hippocampal search allocates a minority probe budget to top ghost-goal entries, seeding proposals around unresolved but still-wanted anchors instead of relying on pure current-anchor CEM or random probe noise.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-294, MECH-269b, MECH-295, Q-040 + 3 lit-pulls
claim_rows.title: Theta-burst packet contains multi-content joint binding: each ~125ms theta cycle binds a {goal_latent, action_proposal, risk_estimate, state_summary} tuple within one phase-aligned window, with verisimilitude grounding the rollout step that must stay ahead of real time.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-294, MECH-269b, MECH-295, Q-040 + 3 lit-pulls
claim_rows.title: Drive amplification (SD-012) reaches approach action selection only via liking-stream activation. Drive raises liking-stream gain on goal-congruent outcomes, which supplies the cue-side pull for approach. Without the liking-bridge, drive-amplified goal seeding produces a passive z_goal latent without behavioural consequence -- the EXQ-483 catatonic-lock signature.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-294, MECH-269b, MECH-295, Q-040 + 3 lit-pulls
claim_rows.title: Is V_s generalisation to E1/E2 forward predictions (MECH-269b) the missing link that unblocks SD-032b dACC behavioural-revision (i.e. the wired-but-inert failure mode of EXQ-483/483a)?

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Add ghost-goal search claim pack
claim_rows.title: Dual-trace anchors preserve a goal-state snapshot plus wanting/arousal payload at write or invalidation time, so unresolved goals remain queryable after the active plan fails.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: register 10 new candidate claims from 2026-04-28 lit-pull chain
claim_rows.title: Prototype-readout operator computes a softmax-attention match between the current LatentState and the type-keyed anchor pool, returning a small set of best-matched type-keys plus their confidences. Runs both during waking (moment-to-moment type recognition) and during sleep (consolidation refinement of the type-anchor pool).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: register 10 new candidate claims from 2026-04-28 lit-pull chain
claim_rows.title: Type-V_s gating extends MECH-269's per-stream / per-region V_s with a per-type V_s dimension keyed on the matched type-key from MECH-296. Allows the proposer / E3 to gate stream contributions by category-V_s as well as by per-stream V_s, downweighting type-confident-but-stream-degraded inputs and vice versa.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: register 10 new candidate claims from 2026-04-28 lit-pull chain
claim_rows.title: Event-gated frontal write at goal-instantiation moments: when GoalState transitions from inactive to active, or when z_goal changes substantially, perform a high-bandwidth one-shot transfer of LatentStack content into SD-033a rule_state and SD-033b state_code, replacing the slow-EMA update for that tick. Mirrors Spellman et al. 2015 encoding-direction HPC->PFC dependence at goal-cue encoding.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: lit-pull #4: theta packaging scales with substrate abstraction (5 entries + 3 MECHs)
claim_rows.title: Theta-cycle content scales with the agent's current substrate abstraction vocabulary: the unit packaged into a single theta cycle is the smallest reusable item available in the active substrate stack -- atomic actions when only those exist, action chunks when SD-045 lands, type-instance matches when SD-040/MECH-296 land, option invocations when SD-042 lands. Refinement of MECH-089 (theta-gamma nesting) on the content-of-packet axis.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: lit-pull #4: theta packaging scales with substrate abstraction (5 entries + 3 MECHs)
claim_rows.title: Cognitive map traversal via theta sequences operates at the agent's active abstraction level. Theta sequences do not have a fixed semantic content -- they simulate trajectories through whatever cognitive map the substrate vocabulary currently defines, whether spatial, conceptual, type-graph, or option-graph. Sister claim to MECH-299, on the map-being-traversed axis.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: lit-pull #4: theta packaging scales with substrate abstraction (5 entries + 3 MECHs)
claim_rows.title: Priority-weighted anchor replay (MECH-285) runs not only during sleep but also during brief waking quiescent pauses, surfacing remote / non-current stored content for goal-directed retrieval. The architectural gating is contextual (quiescent vs active behaviour, sensory input vs absence) rather than state-categorical (waking vs sleep). Refinement / generalisation of MECH-285.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: register 10 new candidate claims from 2026-04-28 lit-pull chain
claim_rows.title: Type-encoder produces a category-prototype feature vector that is written into the AnchorSet alongside z_world, so anchors can be queried by type-key as well as location-key. The type-encoder uses the same input substrate as the existing instance-encoder but produces a different (regularity-extracted) representation, mirroring the trisynaptic-vs-monosynaptic complementary-learning architecture within hippocampus.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: register 10 new candidate claims from 2026-04-28 lit-pull chain
claim_rows.title: An explicit thalamic-routing substrate (reuniens/MD-analogue) gates and amplifies bidirectional traffic between hippocampal anchor pool and frontal substrates. Currently abstracted into the GoalState->HippocampalModule call chain; making it explicit is needed when V3 dynamics demonstrate that the implicit routing is insufficient.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: register 10 new candidate claims from 2026-04-28 lit-pull chain
claim_rows.title: Option library substrate stores a discrete codebook of named, reusable action subroutines (each as initiation-set + termination-function + internal-policy triple, per Sutton-Precup-Singh 1999), distinct from the existing continuous SD-004 action_object_decoder. Required for hierarchical action composition, tool use, social-coordination protocols, and richer ghost-probe seeding.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: register 10 new candidate claims from 2026-04-28 lit-pull chain
claim_rows.title: vmPFC analogue gains an abstract task-structure encoding capacity that compresses anchor-pool geometry into a generalisable structural code, preserving similarity geometry across surface-different but structurally-matched problems. Without this, REE cannot exhibit Baram et al. 2020 task-structure abstraction signatures.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: register 10 new candidate claims from 2026-04-28 lit-pull chain
claim_rows.title: Motor primitive substrate at the bottom of the action-representation hierarchy: a small fixed dictionary of force-field-like primitive activations that vectorially combine to produce the action_object that E2 consumes. Required only when REE moves to continuous limb-like control.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: register 10 new candidate claims from 2026-04-28 lit-pull chain
claim_rows.title: Action-chunk cache stores frequently-traversed action sequences as cached lookups, indexed by (state-signature, expected-outcome-signature). Sits in the dorsolateral-loop slot of ARC-021. Provides the model-free habit pathway missing from V3 and the runaway-chunking failure mode underlying OCD compulsions and rituals (Graybiel 2008).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: register 10 new candidate claims from 2026-04-28 lit-pull chain
claim_rows.title: Multi-slot GoalState holds N>=2 simultaneously-active goal slots with per-slot z_goal, drive coupling, age, and persistence parameters. Each slot generates its own ghost-goal-bank rank, ghost-probe budget, and proposer trajectories; a dACC-style arbitrator selects which slot's best trajectory commits this tick.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register ARC-061: reafference comparator family architectural claim
claim_rows.title: Self-attribution is implemented via a family of forward-model comparators at motor, interoceptive, and propositional levels — each instantiating the same reafference-cancellation motif (forward model + comparator + authorship tag) at a distinct representational timescale and modality.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-302 (relief-completion event) + MECH-303 (safety-cue prediction)
claim_rows.title: Relief-completion event reuses goal-achievement / reward-circuit completion machinery. When a comparator on a suffering-stream derivative crosses a downward threshold (sustained suffering-reduction below baseline), the resulting event fires the same downstream tag-and-release pipeline as goal-achievement: MECH-057a (commitment-release / beta-gate-drop), MECH-091 (salient-event phase-reset), and MECH-094 (categorical hypothesis-tag write gate). The polarity of the reinforcement is set at the input -- what counts as the completion is the suffering-derivative crossing, not a reward-onset event -- but the consolidation pipeline is shared. 'Things that just reduced suffering' are tagged in the same approach-attractor structure as 'things liked'.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-302 (relief-completion event) + MECH-303 (safety-cue prediction)
claim_rows.title: Context-bound passive safety representation: the agent encodes 'this environment predicts absence of suffering' through sustained non-occurrence of harm, without requiring a discrete teaching event. Substrate is prefrontal-hippocampal (IL for expression gating; vHipp-to-PL-equivalent for contextual store). Update rule is diffuse and slow -- accumulated context exposure without harm drives the store. Output lowers background vigilance threshold: reduces the general avoidance commitment level when the agent is in an environment the store predicts as safe. Parallel to the 'things liked' goal-cue store but tracking suffering-absence rather than reward-presence. Sister claim to MECH-304 (cue-specific conditioned inhibition pathway).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Add SD-047 + pre-implementation lit-pull (5 PubMed entries)
claim_rows.title: Multi-source environmental dynamics: concurrent stochastic event sources at distinct spatial and temporal scales (spatial perturbation field + transient Poisson events + background drift sources) provide an agent-independent causal background dense enough for agency-detection comparators (MECH-095) and reafference cancellation (MECH-098) to be honestly tested at substrate level.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register SD-048: interoceptive noise dynamics (Level 2 reafference calibration)
claim_rows.title: Interoceptive noise dynamics: stochastic body-state perturbations independent of the agent's motor output (autonomic background noise + sensitisation spikes + fatigue drift) provide an agent-independent interoceptive background dense enough for the affective comparator (ARC-058, Level 2 of the reafference comparator family) to be honestly tested at substrate level.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: sd048: register implementation + queue V3-EXQ-511 partial-PASS manifest
claim_rows.title: Multi-resource heterogeneity: qualitatively distinct resource types (e.g. food / water / novelty) with per-type identity tags, type-specific spawn distributions, type-specific benefit profiles, and a per-axis homeostatic drive system, plus a curriculum-introduction hook. Provides the goal-identity vocabulary the wanting/liking + identity-distinct-goal cohort (MECH-229/230, MECH-117/216, ARC-030/032, Q-030, SD-015 unblock chain) needs to be honestly tested at substrate level, and the substrate scaffold for downstream developmental-schedule work.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: MECH-303/304 split: contextual passive vs cue-specific conditioned safety
claim_rows.title: Cue-specific conditioned safety prediction: a discrete predictive structure encodes 'this stimulus actively predicts that suffering will be omitted', updated by explicit MECH-302 relief-completion events as its teaching signal. Encoding substrate is cortico-striatal (dorsal striatum + dlPFC). Expression/output pathway is IL-to-CeA. This is the conditioned-inhibition mechanism: when a specific cue co-occurs with relief, a separate learned prediction forms that can gate avoidance commitment release when the cue is later present. Sister claim to MECH-303 (contextual passive safety representation).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Governance cycle 2026-05-04: MECH-305 registered, EXQ-517 non_contributory reclassification, 6 holds applied
claim_rows.title: z_harm_a requires a controllability-modulated weighting term beyond MECH-219 temporal hysteresis: perceived uncontrollability or inescapability amplifies the affective load integrator, while perceived controllability suppresses it. Biological locus is dorsal ACC, which integrates noxious stimulus input with controllability context and projects to the medial suffering pathway (ACC/insula, overlapping with salience network).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: MECH-302 substrate: SD-050 doc + claims.yaml + substrate_queue update
claim_rows.title: Suffering-derivative comparator: a non-trainable rolling-window descent detector on z_harm_a.norm() that fires a relief-completion event when a sustained drop from peak to trough exceeds a threshold. Provides the substrate for MECH-302 by detecting when a period of suffering has cleanly ended, reusing the same downstream tag-and-release pipeline as goal-achievement (MECH-057a beta-gate release, MECH-094 VALENCE_LIKING write). Architecturally adjacent to MECH-091 (urgency interrupt) but opposite polarity: MECH-091 fires on upward z_harm_a spike; SD-050 fires on downward sustained drop.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register Q-041: unified meta-level threshold supervisor research direction
claim_rows.title: Does REE require a unified meta-level threshold supervisor that adapts pass/fail and commit/release thresholds across substrates from system-wide instability metrics, or do the existing scattered adaptive loci (ARC-016 dynamic precision, SD-032c AIC interoceptive baseline EMA, SD-032d PCC stability scalar, SD-032e pACC drive bias) produce coherent meta-stability under chronic load without a supervisor?

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-309 + ARC-062/063 rule-apprehension cluster; correct SD-054 doc
claim_rows.title: Rule-apprehension architectural slot, weak reading: a non-Bayesian rule-creator at the policy layer that proposes discriminative policy modes for the updaters (E3, training loop) to refine. V3 instantiation: a gated-policy architecture in which at least two policy heads share encoder features but receive different gating from a learned context discriminator (e.g., reef-context vs open-context heads). Tests the logical-necessity claim of MECH-309 within the existing V3 substrate without registering the heavier CandidateRule machinery (ARC-063, V4-deferred). Architectural slot, not yet implemented.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-309 + ARC-062/063 rule-apprehension cluster; correct SD-054 doc
claim_rows.title: Rule-apprehension architectural slot, strong reading: a distributed CandidateRule field with tolerance-gated availability, hippocampal-rollout-eligibility shaping, structured per-action evidence-trace records, and waking-vs-sleep refinement asymmetry. The biology-faithful form of the rule-apprehension layer, formalising the 2026-05-04 thought-intake on tolerance-gated rule apprehension (PNAS 10.1073/pnas.2508061123). Implementation deferred to V4. Persistent flag for governance: this slot is expected to be needed if ARC-062 (weak reading) fails or proves insufficient at scale, AND independently as the architectural commitment that supports moral-residue attribution to the rule-field, sleep-vs-waking refinement asymmetry, and clinically-realistic failure modes (trauma schemas, paranoid rule fields, depressive rollout constraint).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-307 anticipatory_affect_conjunction; SD-014 6-channel amendment proposal
claim_rows.title: Anticipatory positive affect (excitement) and anticipatory negative affect (dread) emerge as derived states from the conjunction of (a) signed VALENCE_SURPRISE, (b) MECH-216 schema readout coupled to z_beta arousal, (c) anticipatory VALENCE_LIKING write at predicted-imminent-positive-event locations, and (d) MECH-216 writes at predicted rather than current location. Four-gap substrate amendment to MECH-216 + MECH-205 + the residue valence buffer, NOT a new VALENCE channel.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: claims: register MECH-308 (language acquisition tracks play_mode maturation)
claim_rows.title: Language acquisition tracks play_mode maturation: socially-grounded compositional language emerges as a specialised game type instantiated within play_mode (INV-058 / MECH-194 / ARC-049), not via a parallel language-acquisition substrate. The basic expression catalog (play pose, head tilt, laughter, mutual gaze, distress vocalisation, approach cue, vocal mimicry, pointing) acts as the bilateral frame-opening signal; conversational violations function as synthetic z_harm; utterance-as-goal acts as synthetic z_goal; proto-symbols accrete as conditional modifiers attached to basic-expression channels. Predicts that systems trained without play_mode-like episodes fail to acquire socially-grounded compositional language even when pattern-matching imitation succeeds.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register MECH-309 + ARC-062/063 rule-apprehension cluster; correct SD-054 doc
claim_rows.title: Monomodal policy collapse is the equilibrium of a parametric-policy agent without a rule-apprehension layer. Bayesian update and gradient descent revise weights over a hypothesis space they do not invent; without a non-Bayesian rule-creator that proposes discriminative policy modes ('near-hazard -> reef regime; else -> forage regime'), the trainer collapses to the smoothest single regime good-enough across the whole state space. Monostrategy is therefore not a bug of training but the predicted output of an architecture in which only updaters exist and no apprehender does. Falsifiable by the weak-reading rule-apprehension experiment (ARC-062): a gated-policy architecture trained on the same substrate should break the collapse where standard E3 does not.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register Q-042: precision update call site (Option A confirmed by biology + ML)
claim_rows.title: Should the running-variance / dynamic-precision update fire at action-selection time (early, control-plane-coupled), at outcome-integration time (late, residue-coupled, current location), or at both? Equivalently: is the StepHarness contract that requires experiment loops to call agent.update_residue() each step sufficient, or does ARC-016 precision need a call site that is structurally guaranteed to fire whenever the agent is selecting actions?

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: claims: register MECH-308 (language acquisition tracks play_mode maturation)
claim_rows.title: Conditioned safety store: a non-trainable cue-specific predictive structure encoding 'this z_world prototype predicts that suffering will be omitted'. EMA-prototype encoder updated by MECH-302 relief-completion events; cosine-similarity expression head provides commitment-release gate when current z_world matches the learned safety prototype. Implements MECH-304 (cue-specific conditioned inhibition substrate): the encoded prototype is the dorsal-striatum / dlPFC encoding-pathway analog; the cosine-similarity gate is the IL->CeA expression-pathway analog.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: claims: register MECH-308 (language acquisition tracks play_mode maturation)
claim_rows.title: Contextual passive safety terrain: a non-trainable RBF-field accumulator over z_world that integrates 'suffering-absent' waking ticks into a slow contextual safety representation. Provides the substrate for MECH-303 (contextual passive safety pathway; vmPFC + hippocampus / vHipp-to-PL biological analog). When the field's local mean exceeds release threshold and beta_gate is elevated, drops the avoidance commitment to lower background vigilance. Parallel architecture to ARC-030 / MECH-117 benefit_terrain; uses a separate RBF field, no sharing with benefit_terrain or main residue values.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: claims: register MECH-308 (language acquisition tracks play_mode maturation)
claim_rows.title: Reef enrichment substrate: env-level behavioral-diversity substrate adding coral-reef safe zones (hazard-free patches with a static scent gradient) and food-attracted hazard drift to CausalGridWorldV2. Creates two competing behavioral attractors -- 'flee to reef' vs 'forage' -- to break monomodal route-exploitation in agents whose policy collapses to a single fixed trajectory, unblocking SD-029 C2 / C3 measurement. Pure environment substrate; no trainable parameters; no MECH-094 interaction. Renamed from SD-050 on 2026-05-08 to resolve a registry-ID collision with the suffering-derivative comparator.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register ARC-064 + ARC-065 + MECH-312 sub-MECH split + MECH-319 cluster
claim_rows.title: bottom_up_behavioral_pattern_extraction_pathway (hippocampal_CLS_bi_pathway + dorsolateral_striatum_chunking + OFC_cognitive_map analog). Architectural commitment: rule discovery from observed-behaviour clustering is logically and architecturally distinct from rule application from instructed/external context (ARC-062 top-down rule-apprehension). Where ARC-062 receives a context cue and selects a discriminative policy mode, ARC-064 receives an observed-behaviour stream and extracts cross-episode regularities, compressed behavioural patterns, and rule-state abstractions. Both pathways presuppose ARC-065 behavioural diversity generation upstream. Multi-substrate distributed instantiation: hippocampal Complementary Learning Systems bi-pathway (Schapiro et al. 2017), dorsolateral striatum action chunking (Smith & Graybiel 2013/2016), OFC cognitive-map state abstraction (Wilson et al. 2014; Schuck et al. 2016).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register ARC-064 + ARC-065 + MECH-312 sub-MECH split + MECH-319 cluster
claim_rows.title: behavioral_diversity_generation_pathway (multi-substrate distributed: LC-NE tonic + frontopolar curiosity + striatal novelty + hippocampal trajectory sampling). Architectural commitment: a non-trivial behavioural diversity generation pathway is upstream-of and logically prior to both rule pathways (ARC-062 top-down rule-apprehension and ARC-064 bottom-up rule-discovery). Without it, neither pathway has anything to weight or cluster -- gradient descent on a parametric policy without diversity pressure collapses to the smoothest single regime, the predicted equilibrium MECH-309 identifies. The biology distributes diversity generation across at least four substrates: LC-NE tonic noise floor, frontopolar uncertainty-driven curiosity, striatal novelty bonus, and hippocampal trajectory sampling. REE registers this as a foundational architectural slot whose specific child mechanisms (MECH-313 noise-floor, MECH-314 structured-curiosity with three sub-flavours, and the MECH-315-absorbed proposal-diversity channel) are independently testable but jointly load-bearing.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: register ARC-066/067/068 non_deficit_action_drives architectural family
claim_rows.title: tonic_vigor_coupling (capacity-to-action-bias, average-reward-rate / LC-NE tonic / DA effort-vigor analog). Architectural commitment: behaviour-bias toward action scales with capacity (high energy AND low recent prediction error AND low drive -- 'things are going well, deploy'), independent of any specific target. Distinct from existing behavioural-source slots (z_harm threats, z_goal deficit-seeded wants, novelty curiosity) which all fall to zero when the agent is well-fed, safe, and the world is familiar. Without ARC-066 a healthy REE agent has no gradient to act; biology has a positive gradient (felt phenomenology: drive to deploy energy when one has it). First of three slots in the non_deficit_action_drives family; companion ARC-067 (idle aversion / boredom) and ARC-068 (opportunity cost) cover the aversive-of-rest and cost-of-passivity halves of the same architectural commitment. Family principle: behaviour comes from surplus capacity AND from deficits, not deficits alone.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: register ARC-066/067/068 non_deficit_action_drives architectural family
claim_rows.title: idle_aversion_boredom (sustained-low-engagement aversive valence accumulator). Architectural commitment: prolonged low-engagement is itself negatively valenced; the agent acts to escape boredom, even in the absence of specific targets, threats, or novelty pressure. Distinct from the policy-side ARC-066 vigor coupling: ARC-067 instantiates an aversive-side accumulator that recruits the same downstream as actual harm (z_harm-like channel), so engagement-poverty competes for action-selection priority on the same axis as discomfort. Companion to ARC-066 (vigor / capacity-deploy) and ARC-068 (opportunity cost) in the non_deficit_action_drives family.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: register ARC-066/067/068 non_deficit_action_drives architectural family
claim_rows.title: opportunity_cost_no_op_penalty (waiting accumulates forgone-reward cost; passive trajectories pay for time consumed). Architectural commitment: trajectories that consume time without progress are not free in E3 scoring; the score function carries an additive cost on no-op / repeated-stationary candidates that scales with the agent's average expected reward rate. Companion to ARC-066 (capacity-to-vigor) and ARC-067 (idle aversion). Existing dACC switch_value (SD-032b / Kolling 2015 foraging) is the closest current substrate but covers a different framing (when to switch FROM the current option to alternatives), not the always-on cost of choosing the null action.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: register ARC-069/070/071 policy_primitive_granularity architectural family
claim_rows.title: policy_hierarchy_dynamic_regranularisation (parent commitment for dynamic policy-primitive granularity in hippocampal rollout). Architectural commitment: the unit-of-policy that the rule-apprehension layer (ARC-062) and the diversity-generation layer (ARC-065) operate on is itself a dynamic representation, not a fixed primitive. The granularity rescales based on simulation outcomes -- decomposed into finer primitives when a chunk fails to ground at execution / prediction resolution (ARC-070), composed into a single primitive when a sequence has been repeatedly grounded with consistent outcomes (ARC-071). Without this commitment, ARC-007 hippocampal proposals are flat action sequences at fixed grain, and the rule layer must apprehend rules at whatever grain the proposer happens to emit, which may be too fine (combinatorial explosion in rollout) or too coarse (chunks fail to map onto the actual state). Cluster parent for ARC-070 (decomposition) + ARC-071 (composition); registers the architectural commitment that primitives are dynamic before any mechanism work.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: register ARC-069/070/071 policy_primitive_granularity architectural family
claim_rows.title: policy_decomposition_on_prediction_failure (zoom-in / re-segment imagined chains when chunks fail to ground at execution resolution). Child of ARC-069 dynamic-regranularisation parent commitment. Architectural commitment: when an imagined chunk's predicted outcome diverges from what its sub-elements would predict (or when MECH-269 V_s on the chunk's region drops), the chunk is broken into finer primitives in the rollout proposal stream. Trigger: simulation-side prediction failure. Direction: zoom in. Phenomenology anchor: 'I planned go-to-the-kitchen; turns out I need to plan the steps.'

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: register ARC-069/070/071 policy_primitive_granularity architectural family
claim_rows.title: policy_composition_via_repeated_grounding (zoom-out / chunk a sequence of primitives into a single atomic primitive after repeated successful execution). Child of ARC-069 dynamic-regranularisation parent commitment. Architectural commitment: sequences of policy primitives that have been repeatedly executed together with consistent outcomes are accumulated into a single primitive that the rule-apprehension and diversity-generation layers can treat atomically. Trigger: repetition count + outcome consistency (slow accumulator). Direction: zoom out. Phenomenology anchor: 'making coffee was once seventeen motor acts; after a thousand repetitions it is one unit.' Names the TRANSITION mechanism (planned -> habitual chunk) that MECH-163 dual systems presupposes but does not specify.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register ARC-064 + ARC-065 + MECH-312 sub-MECH split + MECH-319 cluster
claim_rows.title: rule_arbitration_multi_variable_multi_channel_dynamic_within_session. Parent claim for the multi-variable, multi-channel, dynamic-within-session arbitration that selects between competing rules / policy modes / action sources at the policy layer. Arbitration is governed by at least four distinct sub-mechanisms (MECH-312a/b/c/d), each falsifiable independently, with a candidate fifth (controllability/agency) deferred pending V3 substrate availability. Recommended combination rule: multiplicative gate (per-channel softmax of reliability * cost * agency * V_s * practice_maturity products) per Pull 3 R4 verdict; falsified against additive-logit baseline in V3-EXQ-543b/c. Reframed 2026-05-10 from earlier dual-channel-arbitration sketch following Pull 3 SYNTHESIS R5 SUB-MECH SPLIT recommendation (conf 0.78).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register ARC-064 + ARC-065 + MECH-312 sub-MECH split + MECH-319 cluster
claim_rows.title: uncertainty_reliability_weighting (Daw_2005_Lee_2014_dual_systems_arbitration_analog). Arbitration weight tracks the inverse-uncertainty / reliability of each candidate rule or policy mode; high-reliability sources receive higher arbitration weight. Biological substrate: model-based / model-free dual-systems arbitration (Daw et al. 2005 Nat Neurosci; Lee et al. 2014 Neuron). LOW divergence from existing literature; direct mapping. Sub-claim of MECH-312.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register ARC-064 + ARC-065 + MECH-312 sub-MECH split + MECH-319 cluster
claim_rows.title: practice_maturity_weighting (Smith_Graybiel_habit_takeover_analog). Arbitration weight tracks practice-maturity / habit-strength of each candidate rule or policy mode; well-practiced behaviour receives higher arbitration weight via a habit-takeover dynamic. Biological substrate: dorsolateral striatum habit consolidation (Smith & Graybiel 2013/2016); successor-representation maturation (Stachenfeld et al. 2017). LOW-MEDIUM divergence; partial mapping (the maturity dimension is well-anchored; the integration into a multi-channel arbitration layer is more REE-specific). Sub-claim of MECH-312.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register ARC-064 + ARC-065 + MECH-312 sub-MECH split + MECH-319 cluster
claim_rows.title: affective_stream_modulation_of_arbitration_REE_novel. Arbitration weight is modulated by affective stream load: when the SD-010 / SD-011 affective stream produces high load (high salience harm or affect), the arbitration layer routes more weight to rules associated with affect-laden context, suppressing arbitration weight on neutral-context rules. The REE-novel claim is the FUNCTIONAL CONSEQUENCE: dual-stream architecture (SD-010/SD-011) is well-anchored in Murray-Rudebeck 2018 and Pessoa-Adolphs 2010, but the modulation of rule-arbitration weights by affective-stream load is REE-specific (MEDIUM-HIGH divergence). Sub-claim of MECH-312.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register ARC-064 + ARC-065 + MECH-312 sub-MECH split + MECH-319 cluster
claim_rows.title: V_s_freshness_modulation_per_region_REE_novel. Arbitration weight is modulated per-region by V_s freshness (the per-region staleness scalar from MECH-269 / MECH-284 / MECH-287); rules associated with stale regions receive lower arbitration trust, regardless of their reliability or practice. HIGH divergence (REE-novel per-region scope + rule-trust function): Behrens 2007 ACC volatility and Bouton 2004 contextual renewal are nearest cousins, but per-region continuous scalar + arbitration-trust routing are REE-specific. Sub-claim of MECH-312.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register ARC-064 + ARC-065 + MECH-312 sub-MECH split + MECH-319 cluster
claim_rows.title: stochastic_noise_floor (max_entropy_policy_regularisation_LC_NE_tonic_analog). A floor-level stochastic action-selection noise that prevents complete deterministic collapse of the policy. Biological substrate: locus coeruleus tonic firing producing baseline action-selection variability (Aston-Jones & Cohen 2005 adaptive-gain model). Computational analog: max-entropy policy regularisation / SAC entropy bonus (Haarnoja et al. 2018). Distinct from MECH-260 dACC anti-recency: MECH-313 is a state-independent noise floor, while MECH-260 is a state-dependent recency penalty. Both can contribute to anti-monostrategy pressure but operate via different mechanisms; whether they collapse into a single substrate or are mutually load-bearing is open (Q-045).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register ARC-064 + ARC-065 + MECH-312 sub-MECH split + MECH-319 cluster
claim_rows.title: structured_curiosity_bonus (frontopolar_uncertainty_driven_exploration_expected_free_energy_analog). A reward bonus on action-selection that rewards information-gain or uncertainty-reduction, distinct from a state-independent noise floor (MECH-313). Biological substrate: rostrolateral prefrontal exploration bonus (Daw et al. 2006 Nature) operating jointly with striatal novelty (Wittmann et al. 2008 Neuron). Three sub-flavours (MECH-314a/b/c) that the lit-pull recommended NOT to collapse prematurely: striatal novelty (Wittmann anchor), frontopolar uncertainty-driven curiosity (Daw anchor), learning-progress / intrinsic-motivation curiosity (Schmidhuber/Pathak tradition). Active-inference (Friston 2010/2015 expected free energy) provides the formal-level unification. Q-044 captures the open question of whether the three sub-flavours are distinct substrates or three readings of one mechanism with different upstream inputs.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register ARC-064 + ARC-065 + MECH-312 sub-MECH split + MECH-319 cluster
claim_rows.title: novelty_bonus_striatal_analog. A reward bonus that tracks recency-of-encounter; new or rarely-encountered states/actions receive a positive bonus independent of reward prediction error. Biological substrate: ventral striatum response to stimulus novelty (Wittmann et al. 2008 Neuron). Sub-flavour of MECH-314 structured curiosity bonus.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register ARC-064 + ARC-065 + MECH-312 sub-MECH split + MECH-319 cluster
claim_rows.title: uncertainty_driven_curiosity_frontopolar_analog. A reward bonus that tracks epistemic value -- how much the agent would learn from sampling a state or action. Biological substrate: rostrolateral prefrontal exploration bonus (Daw et al. 2006 Nature). Sub-flavour of MECH-314 structured curiosity bonus. Active-inference framing: bonus equals epistemic value term in expected free energy decomposition (Friston 2010/2015).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register ARC-064 + ARC-065 + MECH-312 sub-MECH split + MECH-319 cluster
claim_rows.title: learning_progress_curiosity_intrinsic_motivation_analog. A reward bonus that tracks the rate-of-improvement of the agent's predictive model (or any internal-state quantity); actions that produce a steepening learning curve receive a positive bonus. Most computationally instantiated in ML literature (Schmidhuber 1991, Pathak et al. 2017); least biologically anchored of the three MECH-314 sub-flavours -- no clean cellular or regional analog. Distinguishes from MECH-314a (recency-based) and MECH-314b (uncertainty-based) by tracking second-order signal (improvement rate) rather than first-order (count or uncertainty).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register ARC-064 + ARC-065 + MECH-312 sub-MECH split + MECH-319 cluster
claim_rows.title: cross_episode_regularity_extraction (episodic_RL_successor_representation_CLS_monosynaptic_analog). A mechanism for extracting cross-episode statistical regularities from observed behaviour streams, producing a representation that supports prediction of future state-occupancy distributions. Biological substrate: hippocampal monosynaptic CA1 path (Schapiro et al. 2017 CLS bi-pathway); statistical learning in hippocampus (Davachi 2015). Computational analog: successor representation (Stachenfeld et al. 2017 Nat Neurosci). Sub-claim of ARC-064 bottom-up rule discovery.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register ARC-064 + ARC-065 + MECH-312 sub-MECH split + MECH-319 cluster
claim_rows.title: behavioural_pattern_compression (option_formation_striatal_chunking_analog). A mechanism for compressing repeated behavioural patterns into reusable options / action-chunks, producing a representation that supports temporally-extended action selection. Biological substrate: dorsolateral striatum sequence consolidation (Smith & Graybiel 2013/2016; Martiros & Graybiel 2018). Computational analog: options framework / option-critic (Bacon, Harb & Precup 2017). Sub-claim of ARC-064 bottom-up rule discovery.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register ARC-064 + ARC-065 + MECH-312 sub-MECH split + MECH-319 cluster
claim_rows.title: rule_state_abstraction_substrate (meta_RL_recurrent_task_state_representation). A mechanism for abstracting the higher-level rule-state itself as a latent variable in the agent's representation, supporting policy adaptation that depends on inferred rule-context rather than only observable cue. Biological substrate: OFC cognitive map (Wilson, Takahashi, Schoenbaum & Niv 2014; Schuck et al. 2016 OFC encodes task state). Computational analog: meta-RL recurrent task-state representation (Wang et al. 2018 prefrontal-as-meta-RL; Duan et al. 2016 RL^2; Botvinick et al. 2019 review). Sub-claim of ARC-064 bottom-up rule discovery. ABSORPTION CHECK 2026-05-10: VERDICT (B) PARTIALLY ABSORBED. Within-V3 functional weight is borne by SD-033a LateralPFCAnalog rule_state buffer (W1 EMA recurrence + W3 substrate-readiness + W4 downstream bias) plus ARC-062 Phase 1 gated_policy multi-stream context discriminator (W3 per-tick rule-context discrimination + W4 score-aggregation training pressure), with ARC-062 Phase 3 GAP-C planned wiring closing the loop between the two. Two residual gaps remain: W2 (multi-task training distribution -- blocked on multi-rule-context substrate, SD-054 single-context insufficient) and W5 (cross-episode hidden-state continuity -- likely V4-scope; SD-033a per-episode reset is architecturally load-bearing for the rest of the agent state machine). Empirical retire-vs-promote verdict deferred to V3-EXQ-543c-successor on multi-rule-context substrate. See REE_assembly/docs/architecture/mech_318_absorption_check.md.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register ARC-064 + ARC-065 + MECH-312 sub-MECH split + MECH-319 cluster
claim_rows.title: simulation_mode_rule_write_gating_categorical_replay_tag (SWR_machinery_substrate_REE_novel_function). The substrate-level instantiation of MECH-094's hypothesis-tag write gate at the rule-arbitration layer: a categorical write-gate keyed to a simulation-mode tag that suppresses arbitration-weight updates during ghost / replay / DMN passes, allowing rule-arbitration to be exercised without overwriting the active rule weights from non-realized data. Substrate-availability premise is well-anchored: SWR machinery (Joo & Frank 2018 review) + reverse-replay discriminable signature (Foster & Wilson 2006). The specific REE function (categorical write-gate keyed to a simulation tag suppressing arbitration-weight updates) is plausible biologically but unverified at cellular / synaptic level.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: MECH-320 register: tonic_vigor_coupling_score_bias (ARC-066 first child)
claim_rows.title: tonic_vigor_coupling_score_bias (capacity-keyed E3 score-side action drive / mesolimbic-DA-vigor-analog / average-reward-rate opportunity-cost regulator). First child mechanism for ARC-066. Adds a tonic vigor scalar v_t to E3 trajectory scoring as an additive bias toward action-trajectories (or equivalently an additive cost on no-op trajectories), where v_t is a slow EWMA over the realised E3-score-receipt stream. Target-free: bias applies regardless of whether any z_goal is currently active. Distinct from MECH-313 (LC-NE noise floor -- noise on choice, orthogonal axis), MECH-216 (target-conditioned wanting), SD-012 (deficit-keyed drive, opposite coupling), and ARC-068 (opportunity-cost no-op penalty -- mathematical complement that may collapse with MECH-320 into one signed scalar at design refinement).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: register MECH-321 policy.decomposition_via_event_segmenter (ARC-070 first child)
claim_rows.title: policy_decomposition_via_event_segmenter (rollout-side consumer of MECH-288 boundary pulses; re-segments the rollout proposal stream at finer grain when a chunk's region shows low V_s / boundary fires on the imagined trajectory). First child mechanism for ARC-070. Bidirectional extension of MECH-288 substrate (R2 lit-pull verdict 2026-05-10): MECH-288 already detects boundaries on whatever latent + PE streams it consumes; MECH-321 wires the rollout / imagination input stream into MECH-288 and consumes the resulting boundary pulses at the policy-primitive layer to decompose chunked primitives into finer-grain sub-elements. PE-driven primary trigger (V_s drop on chunk's region per Zacks 2007 / Schapiro 2017); bottleneck-state framing is a separate consolidation-phase mechanism, not the primary trigger. Recursive multi-level decomposition with depth cap 3-4 (Badre & D'Esposito 2009; Koechlin & Summerfield 2007). Both pre-commit and mid-execution phases supported via the same mechanism, with downstream effects gated by MECH-094 hypothesis_tag (rollout fires under hypothesis_tag=True write nothing; observation / execution fires under hypothesis_tag=False enable the existing observation-side consumer chain unchanged).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register ARC-064 + ARC-065 + MECH-312 sub-MECH split + MECH-319 cluster
claim_rows.title: How should the relative weights of MECH-313 (stochastic noise floor / LC-NE tonic analog) and MECH-314 (structured curiosity bonus / frontopolar curiosity) be calibrated for V3 substrates? Falsifiable with parametric sweep on SD-054 reef substrate plus ARC-062 gated-policy.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register ARC-064 + ARC-065 + MECH-312 sub-MECH split + MECH-319 cluster
claim_rows.title: Are MECH-314a (striatal novelty), MECH-314b (frontopolar uncertainty-driven curiosity), and MECH-314c (learning-progress curiosity) three distinct substrates with independent contributions, or three different readings of one mechanism with different upstream inputs (e.g., novelty as a special case of uncertainty as a special case of learning progress)?

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register ARC-064 + ARC-065 + MECH-312 sub-MECH split + MECH-319 cluster
claim_rows.title: Is MECH-313 (LC-NE tonic noise floor) a separate parameter from MECH-260 (dACC anti-recency penalty), or do they collapse into one anti-monostrategy substrate? Falsifiable with the four-arm ablation: both-OFF / 313-only / 260-only / both-ON, on SD-054 reef substrate with ARC-062 gated-policy enabled.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: MECH-322 sleep-replay value-conditioned chunking carve-out (R6 governance decision: Option B)
claim_rows.title: policy_composition.sleep_replay_value_conditioned_chunking_consolidation -- narrow exception path that permits ARC-071 chunk formation from replayed (hypothesis_tag=True) sequences during designated sleep phase, IF the replayed sequence carries a value-tag from prior real-executed episodes AND the formed chunk carries a replay_origin=True audit flag with accelerated dissolution if not corroborated by real waking execution within N episodes. Resolves ARC-071 lit-pull R6 governance escalation (Option B carve-out, picked 2026-05-11).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: MECH-323 policy_composition_chunk_accumulator (ARC-071 first child: formation operator)
claim_rows.title: policy_composition_chunk_accumulator -- striatum/DLS-analog formation operator that builds chunk candidates from sequences of policy primitives repeatedly executed together with consistent outcomes. First child mechanism for ARC-071 (the maintenance operator MECH-324 is registered separately). Encodes the lit-pull R1 verdict (repetition + outcome consistency as primary trigger, evaluative-gate upstream, V_s-positive secondary) + R2 verdict partial (striatum-analog formation substrate; vmPFC/IL maintenance substrate handled by MECH-324) + R4 verdict (chunked primitive carries initiation-set + termination-condition fields per Sutton 1999 options structure) + R5 verdict (gradual hysteresis with F_low formation < F_high dissolution; chunk-size budget 2-5 elements per level). Two write paths: default MECH-094 strict (hypothesis_tag=False real executions only); sleep-replay carve-out under MECH-322 conditions (replay_origin=True audit flag with accelerated dissolution if not corroborated by real waking execution).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: MECH-324 policy_composition_chunk_maintenance (ARC-071 second child: maintenance operator)
claim_rows.title: policy_composition_chunk_maintenance -- IL/vmPFC-analog maintenance operator that gates chunk crystallisation, persistence under continued corroboration, and dissolution under outcome inconsistency. Second child mechanism for ARC-071 (paired with MECH-323 formation operator). Causally required for chunk crystallisation per Smith & Graybiel 2013 selective optogenetic disruption of infralimbic cortex during overtraining (which PREVENTS habit formation despite intact striatal accumulator activity). Encodes the lit-pull R2 verdict (IL/vmPFC-analog substrate component of the phase-dependent multi-substrate chunking machinery) + R5 verdict (asymmetric hysteresis with F_high dissolution threshold > F_low formation threshold and slower dissolution timescale than formation timescale) + MECH-322 verdict (accelerated dissolution for replay-origin chunks not corroborated by real waking execution within N episodes).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register INV-073, ARC-072, MECH-325, MECH-326 from developmental bootstrapping lit pull
claim_rows.title: developmental_bootstrapping_and_cue_indexed_retrieval_gaps -- REE lacks (1) a dedicated diversity-bootstrapping epoch that populates the hippocampal trajectory store before reinforcement narrowing; and (2) a differentiable cue-indexed retrieval path from PFC context representation to trajectory generation. EXQ-561 cluster / MECH-269 is diagnostic of gap (1); EXP-0155 zero-gradient cue_action_proj is diagnostic of gap (2). The two gaps are inter-dependent: the severed cue gradient (gap 2) is the mechanism that prevents diverse option population (gap 1).

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register INV-073, ARC-072, MECH-325, MECH-326 from developmental bootstrapping lit pull
claim_rows.title: Developmental bootstrapping necessity: any model-building agent requiring flexible multi-option behavioral selection must undergo a dedicated motor-sensory exploration epoch before reinforcement learning narrows the repertoire; insufficient exploration permanently restricts the option library.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register INV-073, ARC-072, MECH-325, MECH-326 from developmental bootstrapping lit pull
claim_rows.title: hippocampal_cue_indexed_trajectory_library -- the hippocampal module should function as a content-addressable trajectory store where PFC context/goal cues pattern-complete against the stored library to retrieve trajectory templates appropriate for the current context; different PFC context states retrieve different trajectory subsets, enabling context-differentiated behavioral option selection without regenerating trajectories from scratch each tick.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: Register INV-073, ARC-072, MECH-325, MECH-326 from developmental bootstrapping lit pull
claim_rows.title: pfc_context_bias_as_hippocampal_retrieval_gate -- PFC active goal/task representations send top-down bias signals that steer which hippocampal trajectory templates are retrieved or replayed; different PFC context states should produce different hippocampal retrieval subsets, enabling context-appropriate behavioral option selection; without this routing, the trajectory library is queried uniformly regardless of goal state.

claim_rows.first_seen_subject: SD-055: register claim + V3-EXQ-568 PASS manifests
claim_rows.title: Differentiable CEM selection approximation -- replaces the non-differentiable argmax / argsort elite-selection step in HippocampalModule.propose_trajectories() with a softmax-weighted candidate mean so that gradient flows from task reward back through candidate selection to SD-016 cue_action_proj. Opt-in via use_differentiable_cem flag (default False; legacy argmax path bit-identical when off). Preserves ARC-007 STRICT value-flat constraint: scoring uses existing residue-terrain evaluation, not a new value head.

cycle_audit.rationale: Large multi-claim reciprocal architecture cluster; likely reflects real feedback coupling rather than a simple ordering bug.

top_internal_sources.title: Sleep modes consolidate learning and ethical residue across regimes.
Quiescent E3 heartbeat cycles trigger hippocampal SWR-equivalent replay for viability map consolidation.

The system maintains a functional distinction between simulation-mode content and real-experience content, such that simulation content does not accumulate in the viability map as committed experience; failures of this distinction produce confabulation (simulated events encoded as real).

When harm-trace salience dominates offline replay content, consolidation selectively amplifies harm predictions, progressively contracting option space -- a distinct failure mode from Q-021 behavioral flatness.
HippocampalModule must emit a trajectory completion signal wired to BetaGate to couple the candidacy and propagation gates.

vmPFC is the substrate that converts stored affective, normative, and residue content -- prior outcome history, social and identity constraints, learned value associations, and safety memories -- into active components of the navigable state used by E3 during trajectory evaluation.

Hippocampal terrain maps encode separable valence dimensions (wanting, liking, harm-discriminative, surprise); ARC-007 residue-field navigation is the harm-causal special case of this general architecture.
Responsibility-bearing durable updates occur only at typed commit boundaries.

top_internal_targets.title: E3 selects and commits trajectories.
Hippocampal systems store and replay paths through residue-field terrain.
Three BG-like cortico-striatal loops require distinct learning channels.
Sensory prediction error, motor-sensory error, and harm/goal error are incommensurable and cannot be collapsed.
Responsibility arises through commitment, not prediction alone.
Three BG-like loops operate at characteristic thalamic heartbeat rates.
Sleep modes consolidate learning and ethical residue across regimes.
Quiescent E3 heartbeat cycles trigger hippocampal SWR-equivalent replay for viability map consolidation.

cycle_audit.rationale: Large multi-claim reciprocal architecture cluster; likely reflects real feedback coupling rather than a simple ordering bug.

top_internal_sources.title: Mode-conditioned write gating: the operating-mode variable from the salience-network coordinator (SD-032a) determines which substrates can write to E3, episodic memory, policy updates, and autonomic coupling. Generalises MECH-094 hypothesis tag to a mode-conditioned family of write gates. Operating mode is implemented as a soft probability vector over {external_task, internal_planning, internal_replay, offline_consolidation}, not a one-hot categorical.

Lateral-PFC-analog (mid-lateral rule/goal substrate): module that holds stimulus-abstracted rule and goal representations across delays, persists through simulated distractors, and projects bias signals into E3 action selection. Primary write target for MECH-261 under external_task and internal_planning modes.

Rule-selective persistence in lateral-PFC-analog: stimulus-abstracted rule representations in SD-033a persist across simulated time steps without external drive, remain selective through distractor events, and emerge through training rather than being innate.

Salience-network coordinator: network-level module reading AIC-, dACC-, MCC-, PCC-analog subdivisions and outputting a discrete operating-mode variable (external_task / internal_replay / internal_planning / offline_consolidation) plus a mode-switch trigger.

PFC subdivision architecture: a network-level module with lateral-PFC-analog (mid-lateral rule/goal), OFC-analog (specific-outcome prediction and task-structure map), vmPFC-analog (value integration), premotor/SMA-analog (sequence execution), and frontopolar-analog (branching / nested control; V4 scope) subdivisions. Primary output: the rule/policy context that gates action selection and the natural write target for MECH-261 mode-conditioned gating.

OFC-analog (specific-outcome prediction and task-structure cognitive map): module that represents the state space of the current task and the specific outcomes expected from actions in each state. E2's natural substrate address for harm-predictive rollouts; distinct from scalar value integration (SD-033c).

Durable long-term storage of the hippocampal viability map requires a hippocampal-entorhinal loop that engages during offline (sleep/DMN-equivalent) consolidation and provides a coordinate-invariant grid representation; this loop does not operate during waking planning or waking immobility consolidation.

Any agent that builds a model of the world, acts in that world, and learns from experience cannot safely update its world model while using it to navigate the world; it therefore requires periodic offline phases in which action is suspended and the model is reorganised via replay and simulation -- this is not a biological contingency but a general computational necessity for model-building agents.

top_internal_targets.title: Mode-conditioned write gating: the operating-mode variable from the salience-network coordinator (SD-032a) determines which substrates can write to E3, episodic memory, policy updates, and autonomic coupling. Generalises MECH-094 hypothesis tag to a mode-conditioned family of write gates. Operating mode is implemented as a soft probability vector over {external_task, internal_planning, internal_replay, offline_consolidation}, not a one-hot categorical.

Salience-network coordinator: network-level module reading AIC-, dACC-, MCC-, PCC-analog subdivisions and outputting a discrete operating-mode variable (external_task / internal_replay / internal_planning / offline_consolidation) plus a mode-switch trigger.

During waking immobility, hippocampal replay switches between task-focused forward sweeps (planning mode) and local consolidation replay (integration mode) based on task demand; this waking consolidation mode is architecturally necessary for viability map integration during experience.

Lateral-PFC-analog (mid-lateral rule/goal substrate): module that holds stimulus-abstracted rule and goal representations across delays, persists through simulated distractors, and projects bias signals into E3 action selection. Primary write target for MECH-261 under external_task and internal_planning modes.

E1's LSTM hidden state serves as the working memory substrate for goal representation; when conditioned on z_goal_latent, E1 maintains goal context recurrently across steps without requiring ongoing benefit signals.

PFC subdivision architecture: a network-level module with lateral-PFC-analog (mid-lateral rule/goal), OFC-analog (specific-outcome prediction and task-structure map), vmPFC-analog (value integration), premotor/SMA-analog (sequence execution), and frontopolar-analog (branching / nested control; V4 scope) subdivisions. Primary output: the rule/policy context that gates action selection and the natural write target for MECH-261 mode-conditioned gating.

REE-v3 requires a minimal sleep-phase infrastructure: an SWS-analog phase (bidirectional hippocampus-to-cortex replay for schema/slot consolidation) and a REM-analog phase (causal attribution replay for slot-filling from co-correlational evidence ordering). Without these offline phases, hippocampal attribution mapping cannot converge and context representations remain globally undifferentiated.

AIC-analog (interoceptive salience / urgency interrupt): module that integrates interoceptive baseline (drive/fatigue from SD-012) with affective-pain signal (z_harm_a), detects salient events, and triggers a network-switch signal to the salience-network coordinator (SD-032a).

cycle_audit.rationale: Large multi-claim reciprocal architecture cluster; likely reflects real feedback coupling rather than a simple ordering bug.

top_internal_sources.title: Sleep-phase full-Bayesian aggregation is a general mechanism across attribution domains: given a waking-phase feedstock of counterfactual-backed attributions (produced by MECH-276), sleep phases aggregate across many episodes, correcting for delayed consequences, failed counterfactuals, and systematic attribution biases that single-episode attribution cannot catch. MECH-273 (self-model aggregation) and MECH-274 (other-model aggregation, V4) are specialisations. Object-schema revision is a further specialisation. INV-049 (offline phases mathematically necessary for model-building agents) is operationalised here: what sleep is mathematically necessary FOR is this cross-episode Bayesian aggregation of counterfactual-backed attribution.

Sleep-consolidation priority from V_s residuals: during sleep-phase Bayesian aggregation (MECH-275) and sleep-dependent self-model aggregation (MECH-273), the order and weight of replay events is biased by the schema-staleness map produced by MECH-284. Replay is not uniform across schema and is not solely salience-driven (dopaminergic tagging); it is also prioritised by accumulated verisimilitude residuals. Schema regions with the most accumulated 'this is wrong' evidence get replayed first, more often, and with higher schema-update authority during sleep. PTSD-rumination has a clean architectural account here: MECH-285 priority loss co-occurring with MECH-094 hypothesis-tag dysfunction, locking the staleness tag from ever clearing.

REE developmental training proceeds in three ordered stages: (1) self-as-object — action-space discovery via motor experimentation, producing the substrate SD-003 requires; (2) objects-as-patterns — object-schema formation via experimental action on the world; (3) others-as-special-objects — modelling other agents as objects with their own policies. The ordering is load-bearing: without a self-model the agent cannot distinguish self-produced from world-produced sensory change; without object-schemas the agent cannot recognise other-agents as a distinguished subclass of objects. Refines the generic ARC-019 curriculum-gates claim.

The self-model has a waking half and a sleep half. The waking half is SD-003 (single-episode counterfactual self-attribution via E2). The sleep half is full-Bayesian aggregation of single-episode SD-003 outputs across many episodes, routed by the anchored channel to E1 and SD-033a, correcting for delayed consequences, failed counterfactuals, and systematic attribution biases. Without the sleep half, REE has an episode-local causal signature but not a durable self-model.

The scientist-agent principle: the waking-phase mechanism that feeds MECH-275 is deliberate intervention. The agent generates hypotheses (proposer-side, via MECH-269 probe channel), selects actions that will produce informative contrast under those hypotheses, executes the actions, observes the outcomes, and computes counterfactual-backed attribution. Correlational observation is insufficient -- the agent must behave like a scientist, performing experiments whose outcomes produce structured attribution signals. Applies across all three developmental stages; specialised by MECH-277 (action-space discovery), MECH-278 (object-schema formation), and a V4 social-intervention mechanism (parallel to MECH-278 for other-agents).

MECH-271 routing is state-gated. In waking, the anchor channel dominates the hippocampal fan-out: replay preferentially reaches consolidation and viability-map consumers to support decision-making. In sleep, the probe channel dominates: replay preferentially seeds Bayesian schema restructuring -- testing which action-outcome attributions held up across episodes, creating new buckets for non-fitting experiences, revising causal graphs. The informational needs of sleep (schema revision) and waking (decision support) are distinct, and the routing bias reflects that.

V4-reserved. The sleep-dependent aggregation pattern of MECH-273 extends to other-attribution. Fast empathy (ARC-010) produces single-episode attributions of other-agent action-outcome links; a stable model of other minds requires full-Bayesian aggregation of those attributions during sleep, architecturally parallel to MECH-273 but operating on other-agent rather than self attributions.

Stage-2 specialisation of MECH-276: once the agent can distinguish self-produced from world-produced sensory change (stage 1 complete via MECH-277), it forms object-schemas via experimental action on the world. An object is the stable bundle of features that behave causally together under interventional perturbation -- push here, these features move together; occlude this, that cluster disappears. Object-schema formation is the stage-2 specialisation of the scientist-agent principle, with world-features as the target of intervention. V3's z_world (SD-005) is currently engineered pre-split; this is an architectural shortcut past stage 2.

top_internal_targets.title: MECH-271 routing is state-gated. In waking, the anchor channel dominates the hippocampal fan-out: replay preferentially reaches consolidation and viability-map consumers to support decision-making. In sleep, the probe channel dominates: replay preferentially seeds Bayesian schema restructuring -- testing which action-outcome attributions held up across episodes, creating new buckets for non-fitting experiences, revising causal graphs. The informational needs of sleep (schema revision) and waking (decision support) are distinct, and the routing bias reflects that.

Hippocampal proposer anchor selection AND anchor-reset: (a) trajectory proposals issued between committed actions anchor on the subset of current latent streams whose regional verisimilitude (per-stream prediction/realization alignment) exceeds threshold; misaligned streams hold their last-verified snapshot (anchor carryover) rather than contaminate the rollout.
