(b) Active anchors are continuously re-evaluated against an effective verisimilitude V_s_anchor(a, t) = V_s(r, t) - staleness[r] (MECH-284 read-out); if V_s_anchor falls below theta_reset(r) for k consecutive steps the anchor is marked inactive (NOT erased -- dual-trace preservation per Bouton 2004) and a new anchor is sought from the current latent slice. A minority probe channel deliberately inverts the gate for low-verisimilitude / high-PE regions, carrying a strengthened MECH-094 hypothesis tag, and does not update the ARC-018 viability map until realized-experience validation.

Applies across all three developmental stages; specialised by MECH-277 (action-space discovery), MECH-278 (object-schema formation), and a V4 social-intervention mechanism (parallel to MECH-278 for other-agents).

MECH-273 (self-model aggregation) and MECH-274 (other-model aggregation, V4) are specialisations. Object-schema revision is a further specialisation. INV-049 (offline phases mathematically necessary for model-building agents) is operationalised here: what sleep is mathematically necessary FOR is this cross-episode Bayesian aggregation of counterfactual-backed attribution.

Stage-1 specialisation of MECH-276: the agent discovers its own action space via motor experimentation (motor babbling) before SD-003 counterfactual self-attribution is well-formed. The agent performs motor acts and observes which sensory changes covary with them; the output is the substrate SD-003 requires -- a set of actions the agent has reason to believe are self-initiated and for which it has counterfactual expectations. Without MECH-277, the counterfactual action space (a_cf) is not well-defined and SD-003 degenerates.

V_s residual schema-staleness accumulator: a region-indexed scalar that integrates broadcast invalidation events (MECH-287) with attribution_weight credit assignment over the active anchor set, leaks slowly, and is read by both online anchor-reset (MECH-269 hysteresis check, waking) and sleep-consolidation priority (MECH-285, offline). Distinct from generic prediction error (which operates on latent values and updates online via gradient): MECH-284 is region-indexed, accumulates across events, and exposes a dual read-out (online + offline). Refined 2026-04-22 from sleep-only formulation to dual-readout formulation after V3-EXQ-475 demonstrated that an agent trapped in a stale anchor needs an online consumer of the staleness signal -- MECH-285 sleep-only readout cannot rescue the agent during waking. Saturated map produces over-attention to schema revision (anxiety-analog); absent map produces schema rigidity (V3-EXQ-475 phenotype: 5-6 PAG releases per seed but never integrate to anchor invalidation -> 1000/1000 freeze-active steps).

MECH-094's hypothesis tag is realized as differential downstream routing of hippocampal replay, not as a source-side boolean. Anchored replay (trusted starting state, MECH-269) preferentially reaches subiculum -> entorhinal deep layers -> neocortex (E1 consolidation) and lateral PFC (SD-033a viability map); probe replay (low-verisimilitude seed, strengthened tag) preferentially reaches BLA (affective tagging without consolidation) and NAc (curiosity / novelty scaffolding). Tag loss presents as probe content reaching consolidation destinations it should not reach -- an auditable confabulatory-planning signature distinct from psychosis or hallucination.

top_internal_sources.title: Context-dependent neuromodulatory gain is a single unifying mechanism expressed at multiple levels: ARC-016 (temporal precision from prediction error variance), MECH-152 (contextual terrain weight from cue-indexed retrieval), MECH-026 (arousal-mediated vigilance sensitivity), and MECH-093 (z_beta heartbeat frequency modulation) are all facets of a global arousal/precision signal (LC-NE) modulated by a context-specific gain signal (vmPFC/OFC).

The E2 action_bias pathway (MECH-151, OFC analog) and E3 terrain_weight pathway (MECH-152, vmPFC analog) have different update rates: action_bias updates rapidly (single-trial, OFC-like) while terrain_weight integrates over longer timescales (vmPFC-like).
Ready vigilance primes restraint under high sensitivity without action.

Ready vigilance (MECH-026) requires an arousal regulator that maintains an optimal sensitivity level on the LC-NE inverted-U curve, implemented via MECH-093 heartbeat frequency modulation rather than a binary high/low precision switch.

The frontal cue-weighting circuit -- E1 cue-indexed retrieval (MECH-150) feeding dual pathways to E2 action biasing (MECH-151) and E3 terrain precision scaling (MECH-152) -- completes the stored-to-active pathway specified in ARC-035 by providing the retrieval mechanism and dual downstream output architecture.

E3's ethical selection machinery is architecturally present from initialisation but functionally dark until E1 and E2 substrate development is complete; REE requires staged developmental phases before ethical selection can operate on real signal.

top_internal_sources.title: Rule-apprehension architectural slot, strong reading: a distributed CandidateRule field with tolerance-gated availability, hippocampal-rollout-eligibility shaping, structured per-action evidence-trace records, and waking-vs-sleep refinement asymmetry. The biology-faithful form of the rule-apprehension layer, formalising the 2026-05-04 thought-intake on tolerance-gated rule apprehension (PNAS 10.1073/pnas.2508061123). Implementation deferred to V4. Persistent flag for governance: this slot is expected to be needed if ARC-062 (weak reading) fails or proves insufficient at scale, AND independently as the architectural commitment that supports moral-residue attribution to the rule-field, sleep-vs-waking refinement asymmetry, and clinically-realistic failure modes (trauma schemas, paranoid rule fields, depressive rollout constraint).

Monomodal policy collapse is the equilibrium of a parametric-policy agent without a rule-apprehension layer. Bayesian update and gradient descent revise weights over a hypothesis space they do not invent; without a non-Bayesian rule-creator that proposes discriminative policy modes ('near-hazard -> reef regime; else -> forage regime'), the trainer collapses to the smoothest single regime good-enough across the whole state space. Monostrategy is therefore not a bug of training but the predicted output of an architecture in which only updaters exist and no apprehender does. Falsifiable by the weak-reading rule-apprehension experiment (ARC-062): a gated-policy architecture trained on the same substrate should break the collapse where standard E3 does not.

Rule-apprehension architectural slot, weak reading: a non-Bayesian rule-creator at the policy layer that proposes discriminative policy modes for the updaters (E3, training loop) to refine. V3 instantiation: a gated-policy architecture in which at least two policy heads share encoder features but receive different gating from a learned context discriminator (e.g., reef-context vs open-context heads). Tests the logical-necessity claim of MECH-309 within the existing V3 substrate without registering the heavier CandidateRule machinery (ARC-063, V4-deferred). Architectural slot, not yet implemented.

top_internal_sources.title: developmental_bootstrapping_and_cue_indexed_retrieval_gaps -- REE lacks (1) a dedicated diversity-bootstrapping epoch that populates the hippocampal trajectory store before reinforcement narrowing; and (2) a differentiable cue-indexed retrieval path from PFC context representation to trajectory generation. EXQ-561 cluster / MECH-269 is diagnostic of gap (1); EXP-0155 zero-gradient cue_action_proj is diagnostic of gap (2). The two gaps are inter-dependent: the severed cue gradient (gap 2) is the mechanism that prevents diverse option population (gap 1).

pfc_context_bias_as_hippocampal_retrieval_gate -- PFC active goal/task representations send top-down bias signals that steer which hippocampal trajectory templates are retrieved or replayed; different PFC context states should produce different hippocampal retrieval subsets, enabling context-appropriate behavioral option selection; without this routing, the trajectory library is queried uniformly regardless of goal state.

hippocampal_cue_indexed_trajectory_library -- the hippocampal module should function as a content-addressable trajectory store where PFC context/goal cues pattern-complete against the stored library to retrieve trajectory templates appropriate for the current context; different PFC context states retrieve different trajectory subsets, enabling context-differentiated behavioral option selection without regenerating trajectories from scratch each tick.

top_internal_sources.title: Dream phenomenology is a first-person window onto active offline sleep process: four structurally distinct dream types map onto four computationally distinct sleep functions -- harm-contrastive replay, goal-contrastive replay, NREM semantic consolidation, and REM world-model free-running.

The simultaneous multi-instance, multi-scale, multi-time phenomenology of Type 3 dreams is the experiential signature of NREM SWR episodic-to-semantic transfer: rapid hippocampal sequential presentation of concept instances collapses to phenomenological simultaneity, with self-dissolution reflecting the stripping of episodic context during abstraction.

Type 4 (detailed story, close to reality, super interesting) dreams are the phenomenological signature of REM E1 world-model free-running: with sensory input disconnected and the commit gate suppressed, E1's LSTM generates unconstrained sequential rollouts from its learned prior, producing coherent narrative arcs that are novel-but-plausible and experientially interesting.

top_internal_sources.title: dACC/aMCC-analog (adaptive control): module that reads z_harm_a precision-weighted prediction error, z_conflict, and control-demand signals; outputs behavioural-adjustment magnitude; writes to a learnable striatal-analog action-value target.

z_harm_a enters action selection as a precision-weighted prediction error (harm_surprise_PE, SD-020) against an internal pain forward model (E2_harm_a), not as a raw magnitude. Upgrades SD-020 from provisional to prerequisite for SD-032b (dACC-analog).

dACC-analog bias suppression against recency / monostrategy: the dACC module writes a counter-bias that resists repeating the last-rewarded trajectory when long-term value information demands exploration. Candidate explanation of the monostrategy failure observed in fishtank_viz and earlier queue-diversity results.

top_internal_sources.title: Frontopolar relative-importance monitoring across competing goals: SD-033e maintains a representation of relative importance across a set of active goals (parallel, not pairwise), enabling parallel-goal monitoring and flexible switching. Lesion analogue should reproduce the Mansouri 2015 over-focus + novel-rule-impairment phenotype.

Frontopolar-analog (parallel-goal deliberation substrate): V4-scope module maintaining counterfactual-value estimates for alternatives to the current course of action, mediating transitions between external engagement and internally-generated deliberation, enabling disengagement from the current task to explore novel alternatives, and monitoring relative importance across multiple active goals. Hooks reserved in V3 via the operating_mode vocabulary; substrate deferred to V4.

Frontopolar counterfactual-value tracking: SD-033e maintains, in parallel with SD-033c's chosen-option value signal, a running estimate of the value of unchosen alternatives. A switch-to-alternative decision is signalled when the counterfactual estimate exceeds the chosen estimate by a threshold-sensitive margin.

top_internal_sources.title: Cue-specific conditioned safety prediction: a discrete predictive structure encodes 'this stimulus actively predicts that suffering will be omitted', updated by explicit MECH-302 relief-completion events as its teaching signal. Encoding substrate is cortico-striatal (dorsal striatum + dlPFC). Expression/output pathway is IL-to-CeA. This is the conditioned-inhibition mechanism: when a specific cue co-occurs with relief, a separate learned prediction forms that can gate avoidance commitment release when the cue is later present. Sister claim to MECH-303 (contextual passive safety representation).

Relief-completion event reuses goal-achievement / reward-circuit completion machinery. When a comparator on a suffering-stream derivative crosses a downward threshold (sustained suffering-reduction below baseline), the resulting event fires the same downstream tag-and-release pipeline as goal-achievement: MECH-057a (commitment-release / beta-gate-drop), MECH-091 (salient-event phase-reset), and MECH-094 (categorical hypothesis-tag write gate). The polarity of the reinforcement is set at the input -- what counts as the completion is the suffering-derivative crossing, not a reward-onset event -- but the consolidation pipeline is shared. 'Things that just reduced suffering' are tagged in the same approach-attractor structure as 'things liked'.

Context-bound passive safety representation: the agent encodes 'this environment predicts absence of suffering' through sustained non-occurrence of harm, without requiring a discrete teaching event. Substrate is prefrontal-hippocampal (IL for expression gating; vHipp-to-PL-equivalent for contextual store). Update rule is diffuse and slow -- accumulated context exposure without harm drives the store. Output lowers background vigilance threshold: reduces the general avoidance commitment level when the agent is in an environment the store predicts as safe. Parallel to the 'things liked' goal-cue store but tracking suffering-absence rather than reward-presence. Sister claim to MECH-304 (cue-specific conditioned inhibition pathway).

Cue-specific conditioned safety prediction: a discrete predictive structure encodes 'this stimulus actively predicts that suffering will be omitted', updated by explicit MECH-302 relief-completion events as its teaching signal. Encoding substrate is cortico-striatal (dorsal striatum + dlPFC). Expression/output pathway is IL-to-CeA. This is the conditioned-inhibition mechanism: when a specific cue co-occurs with relief, a separate learned prediction forms that can gate avoidance commitment release when the cue is later present. Sister claim to MECH-303 (contextual passive safety representation).

top_internal_sources.title: Bidirectional hippocampus-neocortex information flow is architecturally necessary for attribution mapping convergence: the SWS-direction (hippocampus to cortex) installs context schema structure; waking and REM-direction reactivations fill those structures with causal attribution estimates. Without bidirectional flow, context representations remain globally undifferentiated despite locally coherent online encoding.

Context slot-formation (schema abstraction: which distinctions between contexts are worth representing) and slot-filling (causal attribution: which evidence populates each slot) are computationally separated functions that cannot be co-computed in a single online pass. Slot structure must be consolidated during an SWS-analog phase before slot-filling during a REM-analog phase can yield reliable attribution signal.

top_internal_sources.title: The specific staged cognitive decline profile of Alzheimer's disease -- early precision/confidence loss, then episodic memory failure, then contextual identity loss, then global disorientation -- follows the reverse of the sleep phase dependency ordering and is not explained by diffuse amyloid damage alone, which predicts uniform degradation rather than a staged profile.

Progressive sleep deprivation or neurodegeneration causes staged failure of the offline consolidation pipeline in reverse dependency order: precision recalibration (MECH-123/Phase 4) degrades first, producing early MCI features; slot-filling (MECH-121/Phase 2-3) next, producing the classic early Alzheimer's episodic profile (intact remote, absent new); slot-formation (MECH-120/Phase 1-2) last, producing middle-stage contextual identity loss and schema destabilisation; global context collapse last.

top_internal_sources.title: There exists an optimal range of daily Model Error Load (MEL): insufficient MEL (extreme monotony, isolation, institutional under-stimulation) produces progressive model rigidity via under-stimulation of the learning drive even when sleep architecture is intact; excessive MEL (acute trauma, overwhelming novelty, extreme responsibility) produces overload insomnia and incomplete update even with extended sleep opportunity.

Cognitive reserve (produced by education, bilingualism, complex occupation, social engagement, and enriched environments) protects against dementia primarily by maintaining sustained novelty-driven Model Error Load throughout the lifespan, keeping the SD-017 model update system exercised and preserving sleep-architecture responsiveness to learning demands; conversely, understimulating environments accelerate dementia by depriving the update system of the error signal needed to remain adaptive.

top_internal_sources.title: Orexin-analog gain modulation of drive-coupled arousal (motor-coupling axis): an orexin-analog modulator gates the coupling between drive_level and arousal-relevant downstream targets (PFC for SD-033a deliberation, BLA/CeA for SD-035 amygdala arbitration, beta-gate for MECH-090). Loss of this coupling produces a cataplexy-analog failure where emotional/drive input fails to recruit motor activation -- z_harm and drive_level compute normally but action selection does not integrate them. This is the motor-coupling axis of orexin function; the wake-stability axis (sleep-state gating, the dominant biological role) is MECH-286. Both axes are downstream of the same SD-037 override_signal, predicting clinical co-occurrence of cataplexy with sleep-state instability under orexin loss (narcolepsy).

Override-gated sleep-state transition: SD-037 override_signal also gates entry to and exit from offline (sleep) mode. High override (sustained drive + threat under metabolic demand) suppresses sleep-mode onset; low override + accumulated MECH-284 V_s-residual staleness + permissive threat context permits onset and recruits the MECH-285 sleep-replay priority readout. Architecturally this is the recruitment authority for the offline arm of the V_s bidirectional cluster: MECH-284 accumulates the demand for offline schema repair, MECH-285 sets the priority order, and MECH-286 provides the on-switch. Without MECH-286, MECH-285 produces a priority list with no transition mechanism to consume it. This is the V3 architectural account of orexin's canonical role as wake-stability gate (Saper/Scammell flip-flop), which MECH-281 (drive-arousal coupling) understates by framing cataplexy purely as a motor-coupling failure.

hub_targets.title: Hippocampal systems store and replay paths through residue-field terrain.

E1 must expose a z_world-only ContextMemory query path that produces two downstream signals: an action-affordance bias for E2 (MECH-151) and a terrain precision weight for E3 harm/goal scoring (MECH-152); the existing bulk generate_prior() path is insufficient because it blends z_self and z_world and produces no cue-specific modulation.

developmental_bootstrapping_and_cue_indexed_retrieval_gaps -- REE lacks (1) a dedicated diversity-bootstrapping epoch that populates the hippocampal trajectory store before reinforcement narrowing; and (2) a differentiable cue-indexed retrieval path from PFC context representation to trajectory generation. EXQ-561 cluster / MECH-269 is diagnostic of gap (1); EXP-0155 zero-gradient cue_action_proj is diagnostic of gap (2). The two gaps are inter-dependent: the severed cue gradient (gap 2) is the mechanism that prevents diverse option population (gap 1).

pfc_context_bias_as_hippocampal_retrieval_gate -- PFC active goal/task representations send top-down bias signals that steer which hippocampal trajectory templates are retrieved or replayed; different PFC context states should produce different hippocampal retrieval subsets, enabling context-appropriate behavioral option selection; without this routing, the trajectory library is queried uniformly regardless of goal state.

created_claims.title: Differentiable CEM selection approximation -- replaces the non-differentiable argmax / argsort elite-selection step in HippocampalModule.propose_trajectories() with a softmax-weighted candidate mean so that gradient flows from task reward back through candidate selection to SD-016 cue_action_proj. Opt-in via use_differentiable_cem flag (default False; legacy argmax path bit-identical when off). Preserves ARC-007 STRICT value-flat constraint: scoring uses existing residue-terrain evaluation, not a new value head.

hub_targets.title: Modes are control-plane regimes applied to shared predictive machinery: the precision-to-commitment circuit.

E1 must expose a z_world-only ContextMemory query path that produces two downstream signals: an action-affordance bias for E2 (MECH-151) and a terrain precision weight for E3 harm/goal scoring (MECH-152); the existing bulk generate_prior() path is insufficient because it blends z_self and z_world and produces no cue-specific modulation.
Action mode prioritizes short-horizon, high-precision control via context-dependent precision modulation.

hippocampal_cue_indexed_trajectory_library -- the hippocampal module should function as a content-addressable trajectory store where PFC context/goal cues pattern-complete against the stored library to retrieve trajectory templates appropriate for the current context; different PFC context states retrieve different trajectory subsets, enabling context-differentiated behavioral option selection without regenerating trajectories from scratch each tick.

Inactive or strained anchors whose preserved goal payload still matches the current goal form a ranked ghost-goal bank; priority scales with wanting, goal-match, staleness, and recoverability rather than with staleness alone.

Waking hippocampal search allocates a minority probe budget to top ghost-goal entries, seeding proposals around unresolved but still-wanted anchors instead of relying on pure current-anchor CEM or random probe noise.
E2 forward-prediction kernels seed hippocampal rollouts.

policy_composition.sleep_replay_value_conditioned_chunking_consolidation -- narrow exception path that permits ARC-071 chunk formation from replayed (hypothesis_tag=True) sequences during designated sleep phase, IF the replayed sequence carries a value-tag from prior real-executed episodes AND the formed chunk carries a replay_origin=True audit flag with accelerated dissolution if not corroborated by real waking execution within N episodes. policy_composition_chunk_accumulator -- striatum/DLS-analog formation operator that builds chunk candidates from sequences of policy primitives repeatedly executed together with consistent outcomes. First child mechanism for ARC-071 (the maintenance operator MECH-324 is registered separately). Encodes the lit-pull R1 verdict (repetition + outcome consistency as primary trigger, evaluative-gate upstream, V_s-positive secondary) + R2 verdict partial (striatum-analog formation substrate; vmPFC/IL maintenance substrate handled by MECH-324) + R4 verdict (chunked primitive carries initiation-set + termination-condition fields per Sutton 1999 options structure) + R5 verdict (gradual hysteresis with F_low formation < F_high dissolution; chunk-size budget 2-5 elements per level). Two write paths: default MECH-094 strict (hypothesis_tag=False real executions only); sleep-replay carve-out under MECH-322 conditions (replay_origin=True audit flag with accelerated dissolution if not corroborated by real waking execution).

created_claims.title: policy_composition_chunk_maintenance -- IL/vmPFC-analog maintenance operator that gates chunk crystallisation, persistence under continued corroboration, and dissolution under outcome inconsistency. Second child mechanism for ARC-071 (paired with MECH-323 formation operator). Causally required for chunk crystallisation per Smith & Graybiel 2013 selective optogenetic disruption of infralimbic cortex during overtraining (which PREVENTS habit formation despite intact striatal accumulator activity). Encodes the lit-pull R2 verdict (IL/vmPFC-analog substrate component of the phase-dependent multi-substrate chunking machinery) + R5 verdict (asymmetric hysteresis with F_high dissolution threshold > F_low formation threshold and slower dissolution timescale than formation timescale) + MECH-322 verdict (accelerated dissolution for replay-origin chunks not corroborated by real waking execution within N episodes).

hub_targets.title: The system maintains a functional distinction between simulation-mode content and real-experience content, such that simulation content does not accumulate in the viability map as committed experience; failures of this distinction produce confabulation (simulated events encoded as real).

Hippocampal map nodes must store an explicit 4-component valence vector (wanting, liking, harm-discriminative, surprise) updated incrementally per visit; replay prioritisation is weighted by drive-state-gated valence relevance.

Hippocampal proposer anchor selection AND anchor-reset: (a) trajectory proposals issued between committed actions anchor on the subset of current latent streams whose regional verisimilitude (per-stream prediction/realization alignment) exceeds threshold; misaligned streams hold their last-verified snapshot (anchor carryover) rather than contaminate the rollout. (b) Active anchors are continuously re-evaluated against an effective verisimilitude V_s_anchor(a, t) = V_s(r, t) - staleness[r] (MECH-284 read-out); if V_s_anchor falls below theta_reset(r) for k consecutive steps the anchor is marked inactive (NOT erased -- dual-trace preservation per Bouton 2004) and a new anchor is sought from the current latent slice. A minority probe channel deliberately inverts the gate for low-verisimilitude / high-PE regions, carrying a strengthened MECH-094 hypothesis tag, and does not update the ARC-018 viability map until realized-experience validation.
Dual-trace anchors preserve a goal-state snapshot plus wanting/arousal payload at write or invalidation time, so unresolved goals remain queryable after the active plan fails.

A minority probe channel deliberately inverts the gate for low-verisimilitude / high-PE regions, carrying a strengthened MECH-094 hypothesis tag, and does not update the ARC-018 viability map until realized-experience validation.

behavioral_diversity_generation_pathway (multi-substrate distributed: LC-NE tonic + frontopolar curiosity + striatal novelty + hippocampal trajectory sampling). Architectural commitment: a non-trivial behavioural diversity generation pathway is upstream-of and logically prior to both rule pathways (ARC-062 top-down rule-apprehension and ARC-064 bottom-up rule-discovery). Without it, neither pathway has anything to weight or cluster -- gradient descent on a parametric policy without diversity pressure collapses to the smoothest single regime, the predicted equilibrium MECH-309 identifies. The biology distributes diversity generation across at least four substrates: LC-NE tonic noise floor, frontopolar uncertainty-driven curiosity, striatal novelty bonus, and hippocampal trajectory sampling. REE registers this as a foundational architectural slot whose specific child mechanisms (MECH-313 noise-floor, MECH-314 structured-curiosity with three sub-flavours, and the MECH-315-absorbed proposal-diversity channel) are independently testable but jointly load-bearing.

created_claims.title: Developmental bootstrapping necessity: any model-building agent requiring flexible multi-option behavioral selection must undergo a dedicated motor-sensory exploration epoch before reinforcement learning narrows the repertoire; insufficient exploration permanently restricts the option library.

E1 must expose a z_world-only ContextMemory query path that produces two downstream signals: an action-affordance bias for E2 (MECH-151) and a terrain precision weight for E3 harm/goal scoring (MECH-152); the existing bulk generate_prior() path is insufficient because it blends z_self and z_world and produces no cue-specific modulation.

pfc_context_bias_as_hippocampal_retrieval_gate -- PFC active goal/task representations send top-down bias signals that steer which hippocampal trajectory templates are retrieved or replayed; different PFC context states should produce different hippocampal retrieval subsets, enabling context-appropriate behavioral option selection; without this routing, the trajectory library is queried uniformly regardless of goal state.

hippocampal_cue_indexed_trajectory_library -- the hippocampal module should function as a content-addressable trajectory store where PFC context/goal cues pattern-complete against the stored library to retrieve trajectory templates appropriate for the current context; different PFC context states retrieve different trajectory subsets, enabling context-differentiated behavioral option selection without regenerating trajectories from scratch each tick.

Developmental bootstrapping necessity: any model-building agent requiring flexible multi-option behavioral selection must undergo a dedicated motor-sensory exploration epoch before reinforcement learning narrows the repertoire; insufficient exploration permanently restricts the option library.

created_claims.title: developmental_bootstrapping_and_cue_indexed_retrieval_gaps -- REE lacks (1) a dedicated diversity-bootstrapping epoch that populates the hippocampal trajectory store before reinforcement narrowing; and (2) a differentiable cue-indexed retrieval path from PFC context representation to trajectory generation. EXQ-561 cluster / MECH-269 is diagnostic of gap (1); EXP-0155 zero-gradient cue_action_proj is diagnostic of gap (2). The two gaps are inter-dependent: the severed cue gradient (gap 2) is the mechanism that prevents diverse option population (gap 1).

Reef enrichment substrate: env-level behavioral-diversity substrate adding coral-reef safe zones (hazard-free patches with a static scent gradient) and food-attracted hazard drift to CausalGridWorldV2. Creates two competing behavioral attractors -- 'flee to reef' vs 'forage' -- to break monomodal route-exploitation in agents whose policy collapses to a single fixed trajectory, unblocking SD-029 C2 / C3 measurement. Pure environment substrate; no trainable parameters; no MECH-094 interaction. Renamed from SD-050 on 2026-05-08 to resolve a registry-ID collision with the suffering-derivative comparator.

hub_targets.title: The system maintains a functional distinction between simulation-mode content and real-experience content, such that simulation content does not accumulate in the viability map as committed experience; failures of this distinction produce confabulation (simulated events encoded as real).
Hippocampal systems store and replay paths through residue-field terrain.

Harm stream separates into sensory-discriminative (z_harm_s: proximity/intensity, Adelta-pathway analog, forward-predictable) and affective-motivational (z_harm_a: accumulated homeostatic deviation, C-fiber/paleospinothalamic analog).
The wanting signal (goal-distance scoring via z_goal_latent) and the liking signal (benefit_eval_head receipt predictor) are functionally dissociable in trajectory scoring.
The three BG-like loops require symmetric Go (approach) and NoGo (avoidance) sub-channels; pure NoGo architecture produces behavioral flatness.

Context-bound passive safety representation: the agent encodes 'this environment predicts absence of suffering' through sustained non-occurrence of harm, without requiring a discrete teaching event. Substrate is prefrontal-hippocampal (IL for expression gating; vHipp-to-PL-equivalent for contextual store). Update rule is diffuse and slow -- accumulated context exposure without harm drives the store. Output lowers background vigilance threshold: reduces the general avoidance commitment level when the agent is in an environment the store predicts as safe. Parallel to the 'things liked' goal-cue store but tracking suffering-absence rather than reward-presence. Sister claim to MECH-304 (cue-specific conditioned inhibition pathway).

created_claims.title: Contextual passive safety terrain: a non-trainable RBF-field accumulator over z_world that integrates 'suffering-absent' waking ticks into a slow contextual safety representation. Provides the substrate for MECH-303 (contextual passive safety pathway; vmPFC + hippocampus / vHipp-to-PL biological analog). When the field's local mean exceeds release threshold and beta_gate is elevated, drops the avoidance commitment to lower background vigilance. Parallel architecture to ARC-030 / MECH-117 benefit_terrain; uses a separate RBF field, no sharing with benefit_terrain or main residue values.

hub_targets.title: The system maintains a functional distinction between simulation-mode content and real-experience content, such that simulation content does not accumulate in the viability map as committed experience; failures of this distinction produce confabulation (simulated events encoded as real).

Harm stream separates into sensory-discriminative (z_harm_s: proximity/intensity, Adelta-pathway analog, forward-predictable) and affective-motivational (z_harm_a: accumulated homeostatic deviation, C-fiber/paleospinothalamic analog).
Committed action sequences suppress sensory precision reweighting until execution completes.

Cue-specific conditioned safety prediction: a discrete predictive structure encodes 'this stimulus actively predicts that suffering will be omitted', updated by explicit MECH-302 relief-completion events as its teaching signal. Encoding substrate is cortico-striatal (dorsal striatum + dlPFC). Expression/output pathway is IL-to-CeA. This is the conditioned-inhibition mechanism: when a specific cue co-occurs with relief, a separate learned prediction forms that can gate avoidance commitment release when the cue is later present. Sister claim to MECH-303 (contextual passive safety representation).

Relief-completion event reuses goal-achievement / reward-circuit completion machinery. When a comparator on a suffering-stream derivative crosses a downward threshold (sustained suffering-reduction below baseline), the resulting event fires the same downstream tag-and-release pipeline as goal-achievement: MECH-057a (commitment-release / beta-gate-drop), MECH-091 (salient-event phase-reset), and MECH-094 (categorical hypothesis-tag write gate). The polarity of the reinforcement is set at the input -- what counts as the completion is the suffering-derivative crossing, not a reward-onset event -- but the consolidation pipeline is shared. 'Things that just reduced suffering' are tagged in the same approach-attractor structure as 'things liked'.

created_claims.title: Conditioned safety store: a non-trainable cue-specific predictive structure encoding 'this z_world prototype predicts that suffering will be omitted'. EMA-prototype encoder updated by MECH-302 relief-completion events; cosine-similarity expression head provides commitment-release gate when current z_world matches the learned safety prototype. Implements MECH-304 (cue-specific conditioned inhibition substrate): the encoded prototype is the dorsal-striatum / dlPFC encoding-pathway analog; the cosine-similarity gate is the IL->CeA expression-pathway analog.

hub_targets.title: The system maintains a functional distinction between simulation-mode content and real-experience content, such that simulation content does not accumulate in the viability map as committed experience; failures of this distinction produce confabulation (simulated events encoded as real).

Salient events phase-reset the E3 heartbeat clock.
Committed action sequences suppress sensory precision reweighting until execution completes.

created_claims.title: Suffering-derivative comparator: a non-trainable rolling-window descent detector on z_harm_a.norm() that fires a relief-completion event when a sustained drop from peak to trough exceeds a threshold. Provides the substrate for MECH-302 by detecting when a period of suffering has cleanly ended, reusing the same downstream tag-and-release pipeline as goal-achievement (MECH-057a beta-gate release, MECH-094 VALENCE_LIKING write). Architecturally adjacent to MECH-091 (urgency interrupt) but opposite polarity: MECH-091 fires on upward z_harm_a spike; SD-050 fires on downward sustained drop.

hub_targets.title: dACC-analog bias suppression against recency / monostrategy: the dACC module writes a counter-bias that resists repeating the last-rewarded trajectory when long-term value information demands exploration. Candidate explanation of the monostrategy failure observed in fishtank_viz and earlier queue-diversity results.

behavioral_diversity_generation_pathway (multi-substrate distributed: LC-NE tonic + frontopolar curiosity + striatal novelty + hippocampal trajectory sampling). Architectural commitment: a non-trivial behavioural diversity generation pathway is upstream-of and logically prior to both rule pathways (ARC-062 top-down rule-apprehension and ARC-064 bottom-up rule-discovery). Without it, neither pathway has anything to weight or cluster -- gradient descent on a parametric policy without diversity pressure collapses to the smoothest single regime, the predicted equilibrium MECH-309 identifies. The biology distributes diversity generation across at least four substrates: LC-NE tonic noise floor, frontopolar uncertainty-driven curiosity, striatal novelty bonus, and hippocampal trajectory sampling. REE registers this as a foundational architectural slot whose specific child mechanisms (MECH-313 noise-floor, MECH-314 structured-curiosity with three sub-flavours, and the MECH-315-absorbed proposal-diversity channel) are independently testable but jointly load-bearing.

stochastic_noise_floor (max_entropy_policy_regularisation_LC_NE_tonic_analog). A floor-level stochastic action-selection noise that prevents complete deterministic collapse of the policy. Biological substrate: locus coeruleus tonic firing producing baseline action-selection variability (Aston-Jones & Cohen 2005 adaptive-gain model). Computational analog: max-entropy policy regularisation / SAC entropy bonus (Haarnoja et al. 2018). Distinct from MECH-260 dACC anti-recency: MECH-313 is a state-independent noise floor, while MECH-260 is a state-dependent recency penalty. Both can contribute to anti-monostrategy pressure but operate via different mechanisms; whether they collapse into a single substrate or are mutually load-bearing is open (Q-045).

created_claims.title: Is MECH-313 (LC-NE tonic noise floor) a separate parameter from MECH-260 (dACC anti-recency penalty), or do they collapse into one anti-monostrategy substrate? Falsifiable with the four-arm ablation: both-OFF / 313-only / 260-only / both-ON, on SD-054 reef substrate with ARC-062 gated-policy enabled.

hub_targets.title: structured_curiosity_bonus (frontopolar_uncertainty_driven_exploration_expected_free_energy_analog). A reward bonus on action-selection that rewards information-gain or uncertainty-reduction, distinct from a state-independent noise floor (MECH-313). Biological substrate: rostrolateral prefrontal exploration bonus (Daw et al. 2006 Nature) operating jointly with striatal novelty (Wittmann et al. 2008 Neuron). Three sub-flavours (MECH-314a/b/c) that the lit-pull recommended NOT to collapse prematurely: striatal novelty (Wittmann anchor), frontopolar uncertainty-driven curiosity (Daw anchor), learning-progress / intrinsic-motivation curiosity (Schmidhuber/Pathak tradition). Active-inference (Friston 2010/2015 expected free energy) provides the formal-level unification. Q-044 captures the open question of whether the three sub-flavours are distinct substrates or three readings of one mechanism with different upstream inputs.

learning_progress_curiosity_intrinsic_motivation_analog. A reward bonus that tracks the rate-of-improvement of the agent's predictive model (or any internal-state quantity); actions that produce a steepening learning curve receive a positive bonus. Most computationally instantiated in ML literature (Schmidhuber 1991, Pathak et al. 2017); least biologically anchored of the three MECH-314 sub-flavours -- no clean cellular or regional analog. Distinguishes from MECH-314a (recency-based) and MECH-314b (uncertainty-based) by tracking second-order signal (improvement rate) rather than first-order (count or uncertainty).

uncertainty_driven_curiosity_frontopolar_analog. A reward bonus that tracks epistemic value -- how much the agent would learn from sampling a state or action. Biological substrate: rostrolateral prefrontal exploration bonus (Daw et al. 2006 Nature). Sub-flavour of MECH-314 structured curiosity bonus. Active-inference framing: bonus equals epistemic value term in expected free energy decomposition (Friston 2010/2015).

novelty_bonus_striatal_analog. A reward bonus that tracks recency-of-encounter; new or rarely-encountered states/actions receive a positive bonus independent of reward prediction error. Biological substrate: ventral striatum response to stimulus novelty (Wittmann et al. 2008 Neuron). Sub-flavour of MECH-314 structured curiosity bonus.

created_claims.title: Are MECH-314a (striatal novelty), MECH-314b (frontopolar uncertainty-driven curiosity), and MECH-314c (learning-progress curiosity) three distinct substrates with independent contributions, or three different readings of one mechanism with different upstream inputs (e.g., novelty as a special case of uncertainty as a special case of learning progress)?

created_claims.title: How should the relative weights of MECH-313 (stochastic noise floor / LC-NE tonic analog) and MECH-314 (structured curiosity bonus / frontopolar curiosity) be calibrated for V3 substrates? Falsifiable with parametric sweep on SD-054 reef substrate plus ARC-062 gated-policy.

hub_targets.title: Any agent that builds a model of the world, acts in that world, and learns from experience cannot safely update its world model while using it to navigate the world; it therefore requires periodic offline phases in which action is suspended and the model is reorganised via replay and simulation -- this is not a biological contingency but a general computational necessity for model-building agents.
Modes are control-plane regimes applied to shared predictive machinery: the precision-to-commitment circuit.
BG-level beta oscillations gate E3-to-action-selection propagation, not E3 internal updating.

z_harm_a enters action selection as a precision-weighted prediction error (harm_surprise_PE, SD-020) against an internal pain forward model (E2_harm_a), not as a raw magnitude. Upgrades SD-020 from provisional to prerequisite for SD-032b (dACC-analog).
E1, E2, and E3 run at characteristic rates (async multi-rate) rather than lockstep.

created_claims.title: Should the running-variance / dynamic-precision update fire at action-selection time (early, control-plane-coupled), at outcome-integration time (late, residue-coupled, current location), or at both? Equivalently: is the StepHarness contract that requires experiment loops to call agent.update_residue() each step sufficient, or does ARC-016 precision need a call site that is structurally guaranteed to fire whenever the agent is selecting actions?

Modes are control-plane regimes applied to shared predictive machinery: the precision-to-commitment circuit.

z_harm_a enters action selection as a precision-weighted prediction error (harm_surprise_PE, SD-020) against an internal pain forward model (E2_harm_a), not as a raw magnitude. Upgrades SD-020 from provisional to prerequisite for SD-032b (dACC-analog).

AIC-analog (interoceptive salience / urgency interrupt): module that integrates interoceptive baseline (drive/fatigue from SD-012) with affective-pain signal (z_harm_a), detects salient events, and triggers a network-switch signal to the salience-network coordinator (SD-032a).

PCC-analog (attention partition / metastability): module coordinating transitions between external-task and internal (replay / planning / consolidation) modes; contributes a mode-stability parameter to the salience-network coordinator (SD-032a).

pACC-autonomic coupling: module connecting affective-pain stream (z_harm_a) to valence/drive update pathway. Provides the affective-pain -> autonomic/visceral coupling that Vogt 2005 and Craig 2009 locate in perigenual/subgenual ACC.
serotonergic_rem_gate_zero_point
Safety baseline and volatility are distinct control channels for arousal/readiness.

created_claims.title: Does REE require a unified meta-level threshold supervisor that adapts pass/fail and commit/release thresholds across substrates from system-wide instability metrics, or do the existing scattered adaptive loci (ARC-016 dynamic precision, SD-032c AIC interoceptive baseline EMA, SD-032d PCC stability scalar, SD-032e pACC drive bias) produce coherent meta-stability under chronic load without a supervisor?

Hippocampal proposer anchor selection AND anchor-reset: (a) trajectory proposals issued between committed actions anchor on the subset of current latent streams whose regional verisimilitude (per-stream prediction/realization alignment) exceeds threshold; misaligned streams hold their last-verified snapshot (anchor carryover) rather than contaminate the rollout. (b) Active anchors are continuously re-evaluated against an effective verisimilitude V_s_anchor(a, t) = V_s(r, t) - staleness[r] (MECH-284 read-out); if V_s_anchor falls below theta_reset(r) for k consecutive steps the anchor is marked inactive (NOT erased -- dual-trace preservation per Bouton 2004) and a new anchor is sought from the current latent slice. A minority probe channel deliberately inverts the gate for low-verisimilitude / high-PE regions, carrying a strengthened MECH-094 hypothesis tag, and does not update the ARC-018 viability map until realized-experience validation.

Event-segment detection: a substrate-side two-level hierarchical detector that emits monotonic outer.inner segment IDs on detected event boundaries, feeding region-keyed substrates (anchor sets per MECH-269, V_s readouts per Phase 1, staleness accumulators per MECH-284) and the MECH-287 broadcast trigger at the schema/event-segment scale per Eichenbaum 2017 / Sols-DuBrow-Davachi 2017 / Baldassano 2017. Default substrate: PE-threshold detector on the fast scale (z_world+z_self) and BOCPD-Gaussian latent change-point on the slow scale (z_goal); MECH-287 broadcast fires downstream of MECH-288 boundaries (Clewett 2025) rather than via an independent comparator. The segment_id field is the region key consumed by the V_s invalidation runtime cluster; without it, MECH-269 anchor sets and per-region V_s aggregation have no substrate-native source for the region partition.

policy_decomposition_on_prediction_failure (zoom-in / re-segment imagined chains when chunks fail to ground at execution resolution). Child of ARC-069 dynamic-regranularisation parent commitment. Architectural commitment: when an imagined chunk's predicted outcome diverges from what its sub-elements would predict (or when MECH-269 V_s on the chunk's region drops), the chunk is broken into finer primitives in the rollout proposal stream. Trigger: simulation-side prediction failure. Direction: zoom in. Phenomenology anchor: 'I planned go-to-the-kitchen; turns out I need to plan the steps.'

created_claims.title: policy_decomposition_via_event_segmenter (rollout-side consumer of MECH-288 boundary pulses; re-segments the rollout proposal stream at finer grain when a chunk's region shows low V_s / boundary fires on the imagined trajectory). First child mechanism for ARC-070. Bidirectional extension of MECH-288 substrate (R2 lit-pull verdict 2026-05-10): MECH-288 already detects boundaries on whatever latent + PE streams it consumes; MECH-321 wires the rollout / imagination input stream into MECH-288 and consumes the resulting boundary pulses at the policy-primitive layer to decompose chunked primitives into finer-grain sub-elements. PE-driven primary trigger (V_s drop on chunk's region per Zacks 2007 / Schapiro 2017); bottleneck-state framing is a separate consolidation-phase mechanism, not the primary trigger. Recursive multi-level decomposition with depth cap 3-4 (Badre & D'Esposito 2009; Koechlin & Summerfield 2007). Both pre-commit and mid-execution phases supported via the same mechanism, with downstream effects gated by MECH-094 hypothesis_tag (rollout fires under hypothesis_tag=True write nothing; observation / execution fires under hypothesis_tag=False enable the existing observation-side consumer chain unchanged).

hub_targets.title: stochastic_noise_floor (max_entropy_policy_regularisation_LC_NE_tonic_analog). A floor-level stochastic action-selection noise that prevents complete deterministic collapse of the policy. Biological substrate: locus coeruleus tonic firing producing baseline action-selection variability (Aston-Jones & Cohen 2005 adaptive-gain model). Computational analog: max-entropy policy regularisation / SAC entropy bonus (Haarnoja et al. 2018). Distinct from MECH-260 dACC anti-recency: MECH-313 is a state-independent noise floor, while MECH-260 is a state-dependent recency penalty. Both can contribute to anti-monostrategy pressure but operate via different mechanisms; whether they collapse into a single substrate or are mutually load-bearing is open (Q-045).

tonic_vigor_coupling (capacity-to-action-bias, average-reward-rate / LC-NE tonic / DA effort-vigor analog). Architectural commitment: behaviour-bias toward action scales with capacity (high energy AND low recent prediction error AND low drive -- 'things are going well, deploy'), independent of any specific target. Distinct from existing behavioural-source slots (z_harm threats, z_goal deficit-seeded wants, novelty curiosity) which all fall to zero when the agent is well-fed, safe, and the world is familiar. Without ARC-066 a healthy REE agent has no gradient to act; biology has a positive gradient (felt phenomenology: drive to deploy energy when one has it). First of three slots in the non_deficit_action_drives family; companion ARC-067 (idle aversion / boredom) and ARC-068 (opportunity cost) cover the aversive-of-rest and cost-of-passivity halves of the same architectural commitment. Family principle: behaviour comes from surplus capacity AND from deficits, not deficits alone.

created_claims.title: tonic_vigor_coupling_score_bias (capacity-keyed E3 score-side action drive / mesolimbic-DA-vigor-analog / average-reward-rate opportunity-cost regulator). First child mechanism for ARC-066. Adds a tonic vigor scalar v_t to E3 trajectory scoring as an additive bias toward action-trajectories (or equivalently an additive cost on no-op trajectories), where v_t is a slow EWMA over the realised E3-score-receipt stream. Target-free: bias applies regardless of whether any z_goal is currently active. Distinct from MECH-313 (LC-NE noise floor -- noise on choice, orthogonal axis), MECH-216 (target-conditioned wanting), SD-012 (deficit-keyed drive, opposite coupling), and ARC-068 (opportunity-cost no-op penalty -- mathematical complement that may collapse with MECH-320 into one signed scalar at design refinement).

hub_targets.title: The system maintains a functional distinction between simulation-mode content and real-experience content, such that simulation content does not accumulate in the viability map as committed experience; failures of this distinction produce confabulation (simulated events encoded as real).

rule_arbitration_multi_variable_multi_channel_dynamic_within_session. Parent claim for the multi-variable, multi-channel, dynamic-within-session arbitration that selects between competing rules / policy modes / action sources at the policy layer. Arbitration is governed by at least four distinct sub-mechanisms (MECH-312a/b/c/d), each falsifiable independently, with a candidate fifth (controllability/agency) deferred pending V3 substrate availability. Recommended combination rule: multiplicative gate (per-channel softmax of reliability * cost * agency * V_s * practice_maturity products) per Pull 3 R4 verdict; falsified against additive-logit baseline in V3-EXQ-543b/c. Reframed 2026-05-10 from earlier dual-channel-arbitration sketch following Pull 3 SYNTHESIS R5 SUB-MECH SPLIT recommendation (conf 0.78).

created_claims.title: simulation_mode_rule_write_gating_categorical_replay_tag (SWR_machinery_substrate_REE_novel_function). The substrate-level instantiation of MECH-094's hypothesis-tag write gate at the rule-arbitration layer: a categorical write-gate keyed to a simulation-mode tag that suppresses arbitration-weight updates during ghost / replay / DMN passes, allowing rule-arbitration to be exercised without overwriting the active rule weights from non-realized data. Substrate-availability premise is well-anchored: SWR machinery (Joo & Frank 2018 review) + reverse-replay discriminable signature (Foster & Wilson 2006). The specific REE function (categorical write-gate keyed to a simulation tag suppressing arbitration-weight updates) is plausible biologically but unverified at cellular / synaptic level.

bottom_up_behavioral_pattern_extraction_pathway (hippocampal_CLS_bi_pathway + dorsolateral_striatum_chunking + OFC_cognitive_map analog). Architectural commitment: rule discovery from observed-behaviour clustering is logically and architecturally distinct from rule application from instructed/external context (ARC-062 top-down rule-apprehension). Where ARC-062 receives a context cue and selects a discriminative policy mode, ARC-064 receives an observed-behaviour stream and extracts cross-episode regularities, compressed behavioural patterns, and rule-state abstractions. Both pathways presuppose ARC-065 behavioural diversity generation upstream. Multi-substrate distributed instantiation: hippocampal Complementary Learning Systems bi-pathway (Schapiro et al. 2017), dorsolateral striatum action chunking (Smith & Graybiel 2013/2016), OFC cognitive-map state abstraction (Wilson et al. 2014; Schuck et al. 2016).

behavioural_pattern_compression (option_formation_striatal_chunking_analog). A mechanism for compressing repeated behavioural patterns into reusable options / action-chunks, producing a representation that supports temporally-extended action selection. Biological substrate: dorsolateral striatum sequence consolidation (Smith & Graybiel 2013/2016; Martiros & Graybiel 2018). Computational analog: options framework / option-critic (Bacon, Harb & Precup 2017). Sub-claim of ARC-064 bottom-up rule discovery.

cross_episode_regularity_extraction (episodic_RL_successor_representation_CLS_monosynaptic_analog). A mechanism for extracting cross-episode statistical regularities from observed behaviour streams, producing a representation that supports prediction of future state-occupancy distributions. Biological substrate: hippocampal monosynaptic CA1 path (Schapiro et al. 2017 CLS bi-pathway); statistical learning in hippocampus (Davachi 2015). Computational analog: successor representation (Stachenfeld et al. 2017 Nat Neurosci). Sub-claim of ARC-064 bottom-up rule discovery.

created_claims.title: rule_state_abstraction_substrate (meta_RL_recurrent_task_state_representation). A mechanism for abstracting the higher-level rule-state itself as a latent variable in the agent's representation, supporting policy adaptation that depends on inferred rule-context rather than only observable cue. Biological substrate: OFC cognitive map (Wilson, Takahashi, Schoenbaum & Niv 2014; Schuck et al. 2016 OFC encodes task state). Computational analog: meta-RL recurrent task-state representation (Wang et al. 2018 prefrontal-as-meta-RL; Duan et al. 2016 RL^2; Botvinick et al. 2019 review). Sub-claim of ARC-064 bottom-up rule discovery. ABSORPTION CHECK 2026-05-10: VERDICT (B) PARTIALLY ABSORBED. Within-V3 functional weight is borne by SD-033a LateralPFCAnalog rule_state buffer (W1 EMA recurrence + W3 substrate-readiness + W4 downstream bias) plus ARC-062 Phase 1 gated_policy multi-stream context discriminator (W3 per-tick rule-context discrimination + W4 score-aggregation training pressure), with ARC-062 Phase 3 GAP-C planned wiring closing the loop between the two. Two residual gaps remain: W2 (multi-task training distribution -- blocked on multi-rule-context substrate, SD-054 single-context insufficient) and W5 (cross-episode hidden-state continuity -- likely V4-scope; SD-033a per-episode reset is architecturally load-bearing for the rest of the agent state machine). Empirical retire-vs-promote verdict deferred to V3-EXQ-543c-successor on multi-rule-context substrate. See REE_assembly/docs/architecture/mech_318_absorption_check.md.

hub_targets.title: Hippocampal proposer anchor selection AND anchor-reset: (a) trajectory proposals issued between committed actions anchor on the subset of current latent streams whose regional verisimilitude (per-stream prediction/realization alignment) exceeds threshold; misaligned streams hold their last-verified snapshot (anchor carryover) rather than contaminate the rollout. (b) Active anchors are continuously re-evaluated against an effective verisimilitude V_s_anchor(a, t) = V_s(r, t) - staleness[r] (MECH-284 read-out); if V_s_anchor falls below theta_reset(r) for k consecutive steps the anchor is marked inactive (NOT erased -- dual-trace preservation per Bouton 2004) and a new anchor is sought from the current latent slice. A minority probe channel deliberately inverts the gate for low-verisimilitude / high-PE regions, carrying a strengthened MECH-094 hypothesis tag, and does not update the ARC-018 viability map until realized-experience validation.

structured_curiosity_bonus (frontopolar_uncertainty_driven_exploration_expected_free_energy_analog). A reward bonus on action-selection that rewards information-gain or uncertainty-reduction, distinct from a state-independent noise floor (MECH-313). Biological substrate: rostrolateral prefrontal exploration bonus (Daw et al. 2006 Nature) operating jointly with striatal novelty (Wittmann et al. 2008 Neuron). Three sub-flavours (MECH-314a/b/c) that the lit-pull recommended NOT to collapse prematurely: striatal novelty (Wittmann anchor), frontopolar uncertainty-driven curiosity (Daw anchor), learning-progress / intrinsic-motivation curiosity (Schmidhuber/Pathak tradition). Active-inference (Friston 2010/2015 expected free energy) provides the formal-level unification. Q-044 captures the open question of whether the three sub-flavours are distinct substrates or three readings of one mechanism with different upstream inputs.

created_claims.title: learning_progress_curiosity_intrinsic_motivation_analog. A reward bonus that tracks the rate-of-improvement of the agent's predictive model (or any internal-state quantity); actions that produce a steepening learning curve receive a positive bonus. Most computationally instantiated in ML literature (Schmidhuber 1991, Pathak et al. 2017); least biologically anchored of the three MECH-314 sub-flavours -- no clean cellular or regional analog. Distinguishes from MECH-314a (recency-based) and MECH-314b (uncertainty-based) by tracking second-order signal (improvement rate) rather than first-order (count or uncertainty).

Active-inference framing: bonus equals epistemic value term in expected free energy decomposition (Friston 2010/2015).

stochastic_noise_floor (max_entropy_policy_regularisation_LC_NE_tonic_analog). A floor-level stochastic action-selection noise that prevents complete deterministic collapse of the policy. Biological substrate: locus coeruleus tonic firing producing baseline action-selection variability (Aston-Jones & Cohen 2005 adaptive-gain model). Computational analog: max-entropy policy regularisation / SAC entropy bonus (Haarnoja et al. 2018). Distinct from MECH-260 dACC anti-recency: MECH-313 is a state-independent noise floor, while MECH-260 is a state-dependent recency penalty. Both can contribute to anti-monostrategy pressure but operate via different mechanisms; whether they collapse into a single substrate or are mutually load-bearing is open (Q-045).

Candidate explanation of the monostrategy failure observed in fishtank_viz and earlier queue-diversity results.

(b) Active anchors are continuously re-evaluated against an effective verisimilitude V_s_anchor(a, t) = V_s(r, t) - staleness[r] (MECH-284 read-out); if V_s_anchor falls below theta_reset(r) for k consecutive steps the anchor is marked inactive (NOT erased -- dual-trace preservation per Bouton 2004) and a new anchor is sought from the current latent slice. A minority probe channel deliberately inverts the gate for low-verisimilitude / high-PE regions, carrying a strengthened MECH-094 hypothesis tag, and does not update the ARC-018 viability map until realized-experience validation.

V_s residual schema-staleness accumulator: a region-indexed scalar that integrates broadcast invalidation events (MECH-287) with attribution_weight credit assignment over the active anchor set, leaks slowly, and is read by both online anchor-reset (MECH-269 hysteresis check, waking) and sleep-consolidation priority (MECH-285, offline). Distinct from generic prediction error (which operates on latent values and updates online via gradient): MECH-284 is region-indexed, accumulates across events, and exposes a dual read-out (online + offline). Refined 2026-04-22 from sleep-only formulation to dual-readout formulation after V3-EXQ-475 demonstrated that an agent trapped in a stale anchor needs an online consumer of the staleness signal -- MECH-285 sleep-only readout cannot rescue the agent during waking. Saturated map produces over-attention to schema revision (anxiety-analog); absent map produces schema rigidity (V3-EXQ-475 phenotype: 5-6 PAG releases per seed but never integrate to anchor invalidation -> 1000/1000 freeze-active steps).

Dual-component online invalidation trigger: an UPSTREAM anchor-side comparator (CA1/CA3 mismatch flowing through subicular routing per Vinogradova 2001 + O'Mara 2009) coupled to a DOWNSTREAM broadcast event (LC phasic burst per Aston-Jones-Cohen 2005, with parallel signals from generalised dopaminergic prediction error per Schultz 1997 and lateral habenula negative-RPE per Matsumoto-Hikosaka 2007), wired together by the HC-VTA loop (Lisman & Grace 2005). The two components are coupled stages of one trigger event, not alternatives. Distinct from MECH-284 the accumulator: MECH-287 is the discrete trigger event (anchor-side mismatch + broadcast release) that drives accumulation. Triggered by latent-stream prediction failure (norm(z_pred(t-1) - z_obs(t)) > theta_trigger) OR strongly negative value-PE (value_PE(t) < -theta_value) OR exogenous surprise. Carries no schema-region credit on its own; downstream MECH-284 attributes the broadcast event to the active anchor set. Failure modes dissociate from MECH-284: trigger-loss produces single-event blindness (no anchor ever feels invalidated, but staleness map remains queryable); accumulator-loss produces V3-EXQ-475's phenotype directly (releases happen but never integrate). Failure modes also dissociate from MECH-285 sleep priority: trigger-loss prevents staleness from accruing, while sleep-priority loss prevents accrued staleness from being repaired. Within MECH-287 itself, anchor-side comparator failure dissociates from broadcast failure: comparator-loss = no upstream signal to broadcast (silent trigger, biologically a CA1/CA3 lesion); broadcast-loss = comparator fires but no global gain modulation downstream (silent invalidation, biologically an LC lesion).

rule_arbitration_multi_variable_multi_channel_dynamic_within_session. Parent claim for the multi-variable, multi-channel, dynamic-within-session arbitration that selects between competing rules / policy modes / action sources at the policy layer. Arbitration is governed by at least four distinct sub-mechanisms (MECH-312a/b/c/d), each falsifiable independently, with a candidate fifth (controllability/agency) deferred pending V3 substrate availability. Recommended combination rule: multiplicative gate (per-channel softmax of reliability * cost * agency * V_s * practice_maturity products) per Pull 3 R4 verdict; falsified against additive-logit baseline in V3-EXQ-543b/c. Reframed 2026-05-10 from earlier dual-channel-arbitration sketch following Pull 3 SYNTHESIS R5 SUB-MECH SPLIT recommendation (conf 0.78).

created_claims.title: V_s_freshness_modulation_per_region_REE_novel. Arbitration weight is modulated per-region by V_s freshness (the per-region staleness scalar from MECH-269 / MECH-284 / MECH-287); rules associated with stale regions receive lower arbitration trust, regardless of their reliability or practice. HIGH divergence (REE-novel per-region scope + rule-trust function): Behrens 2007 ACC volatility and Bouton 2004 contextual renewal are nearest cousins, but per-region continuous scalar + arbitration-trust routing are REE-specific. Sub-claim of MECH-312.

hub_targets.title: Harm stream separates into sensory-discriminative (z_harm_s: proximity/intensity, Adelta-pathway analog, forward-predictable) and affective-motivational (z_harm_a: accumulated homeostatic deviation, C-fiber/paleospinothalamic analog).
HARM stream is a dedicated sensory pathway separate from z_world processing.

created_claims.title: affective_stream_modulation_of_arbitration_REE_novel. Arbitration weight is modulated by affective stream load: when the SD-010 / SD-011 affective stream produces high load (high salience harm or affect), the arbitration layer routes more weight to rules associated with affect-laden context, suppressing arbitration weight on neutral-context rules. The REE-novel claim is the FUNCTIONAL CONSEQUENCE: dual-stream architecture (SD-010/SD-011) is well-anchored in Murray-Rudebeck 2018 and Pessoa-Adolphs 2010, but the modulation of rule-arbitration weights by affective-stream load is REE-specific (MEDIUM-HIGH divergence). Sub-claim of MECH-312.

created_claims.title: practice_maturity_weighting (Smith_Graybiel_habit_takeover_analog). Arbitration weight tracks practice-maturity / habit-strength of each candidate rule or policy mode; well-practiced behaviour receives higher arbitration weight via a habit-takeover dynamic. Biological substrate: dorsolateral striatum habit consolidation (Smith & Graybiel 2013/2016); successor-representation maturation (Stachenfeld et al. 2017). LOW-MEDIUM divergence; partial mapping (the maturity dimension is well-anchored; the integration into a multi-channel arbitration layer is more REE-specific). Sub-claim of MECH-312.

REE registers this as a foundational architectural slot whose specific child mechanisms (MECH-313 noise-floor, MECH-314 structured-curiosity with three sub-flavours, and the MECH-315-absorbed proposal-diversity channel) are independently testable but jointly load-bearing.

Monomodal policy collapse is the equilibrium of a parametric-policy agent without a rule-apprehension layer. Bayesian update and gradient descent revise weights over a hypothesis space they do not invent; without a non-Bayesian rule-creator that proposes discriminative policy modes ('near-hazard -> reef regime; else -> forage regime'), the trainer collapses to the smoothest single regime good-enough across the whole state space. Monostrategy is therefore not a bug of training but the predicted output of an architecture in which only updaters exist and no apprehender does. Falsifiable by the weak-reading rule-apprehension experiment (ARC-062): a gated-policy architecture trained on the same substrate should break the collapse where standard E3 does not.

bottom_up_behavioral_pattern_extraction_pathway (hippocampal_CLS_bi_pathway + dorsolateral_striatum_chunking + OFC_cognitive_map analog). Architectural commitment: rule discovery from observed-behaviour clustering is logically and architecturally distinct from rule application from instructed/external context (ARC-062 top-down rule-apprehension). Where ARC-062 receives a context cue and selects a discriminative policy mode, ARC-064 receives an observed-behaviour stream and extracts cross-episode regularities, compressed behavioural patterns, and rule-state abstractions. Both pathways presuppose ARC-065 behavioural diversity generation upstream. Multi-substrate distributed instantiation: hippocampal Complementary Learning Systems bi-pathway (Schapiro et al. 2017), dorsolateral striatum action chunking (Smith & Graybiel 2013/2016), OFC cognitive-map state abstraction (Wilson et al. 2014; Schuck et al. 2016).

Rule-apprehension architectural slot, weak reading: a non-Bayesian rule-creator at the policy layer that proposes discriminative policy modes for the updaters (E3, training loop) to refine. V3 instantiation: a gated-policy architecture in which at least two policy heads share encoder features but receive different gating from a learned context discriminator (e.g., reef-context vs open-context heads). Tests the logical-necessity claim of MECH-309 within the existing V3 substrate without registering the heavier CandidateRule machinery (ARC-063, V4-deferred). Architectural slot, not yet implemented.

created_claims.title: rule_arbitration_multi_variable_multi_channel_dynamic_within_session. Parent claim for the multi-variable, multi-channel, dynamic-within-session arbitration that selects between competing rules / policy modes / action sources at the policy layer. Arbitration is governed by at least four distinct sub-mechanisms (MECH-312a/b/c/d), each falsifiable independently, with a candidate fifth (controllability/agency) deferred pending V3 substrate availability. Recommended combination rule: multiplicative gate (per-channel softmax of reliability * cost * agency * V_s * practice_maturity products) per Pull 3 R4 verdict; falsified against additive-logit baseline in V3-EXQ-543b/c. Reframed 2026-05-10 from earlier dual-channel-arbitration sketch following Pull 3 SYNTHESIS R5 SUB-MECH SPLIT recommendation (conf 0.78).

hub_targets.title: Hippocampal proposer anchor selection AND anchor-reset: (a) trajectory proposals issued between committed actions anchor on the subset of current latent streams whose regional verisimilitude (per-stream prediction/realization alignment) exceeds threshold; misaligned streams hold their last-verified snapshot (anchor carryover) rather than contaminate the rollout. (b) Active anchors are continuously re-evaluated against an effective verisimilitude V_s_anchor(a, t) = V_s(r, t) - staleness[r] (MECH-284 read-out); if V_s_anchor falls below theta_reset(r) for k consecutive steps the anchor is marked inactive (NOT erased -- dual-trace preservation per Bouton 2004) and a new anchor is sought from the current latent slice. A minority probe channel deliberately inverts the gate for low-verisimilitude / high-PE regions, carrying a strengthened MECH-094 hypothesis tag, and does not update the ARC-018 viability map until realized-experience validation.

Self-attribution is implemented by a forward-model comparator: for any reafferent latent stream z_x with an efference-copy-driven forward model E2_x, the residual (z_x_observed - E2_x(z_x_{t-1}, a_actual)) is the agency signal on that stream.
Single-pass agency attribution via forward-model comparator on the z_harm_s reafferent stream: residual = z_harm_s_observed - E2_harm_s(z_harm_s_{t-1}, a_actual).

Rule-apprehension architectural slot, weak reading: a non-Bayesian rule-creator at the policy layer that proposes discriminative policy modes for the updaters (E3, training loop) to refine. V3 instantiation: a gated-policy architecture in which at least two policy heads share encoder features but receive different gating from a learned context discriminator (e.g., reef-context vs open-context heads). Tests the logical-necessity claim of MECH-309 within the existing V3 substrate without registering the heavier CandidateRule machinery (ARC-063, V4-deferred). Architectural slot, not yet implemented.

Reef enrichment substrate: env-level behavioral-diversity substrate adding coral-reef safe zones (hazard-free patches with a static scent gradient) and food-attracted hazard drift to CausalGridWorldV2. Creates two competing behavioral attractors -- 'flee to reef' vs 'forage' -- to break monomodal route-exploitation in agents whose policy collapses to a single fixed trajectory, unblocking SD-029 C2 / C3 measurement. Pure environment substrate; no trainable parameters; no MECH-094 interaction. Renamed from SD-050 on 2026-05-08 to resolve a registry-ID collision with the suffering-derivative comparator.

Rule-apprehension architectural slot, strong reading: a distributed CandidateRule field with tolerance-gated availability, hippocampal-rollout-eligibility shaping, structured per-action evidence-trace records, and waking-vs-sleep refinement asymmetry. The biology-faithful form of the rule-apprehension layer, formalising the 2026-05-04 thought-intake on tolerance-gated rule apprehension (PNAS 10.1073/pnas.2508061123). Implementation deferred to V4. Persistent flag for governance: this slot is expected to be needed if ARC-062 (weak reading) fails or proves insufficient at scale, AND independently as the architectural commitment that supports moral-residue attribution to the rule-field, sleep-vs-waking refinement asymmetry, and clinically-realistic failure modes (trauma schemas, paranoid rule fields, depressive rollout constraint).
