V_s_freshness_modulation_per_region_REE_novel. Arbitration weight is modulated per-region by V_s freshness (the per-region staleness scalar from MECH-269 / MECH-284 / MECH-287); rules associated with stale regions receive lower arbitration trust, regardless of their reliability or practice. HIGH divergence (REE-novel per-region scope + rule-trust function): Behrens 2007 ACC volatility and Bouton 2004 contextual renewal are nearest cousins, but per-region continuous scalar + arbitration-trust routing are REE-specific. Sub-claim of MECH-312.

Monomodal policy collapse is the equilibrium of a parametric-policy agent without a rule-apprehension layer. Bayesian update and gradient descent revise weights over a hypothesis space they do not invent; without a non-Bayesian rule-creator that proposes discriminative policy modes ('near-hazard -> reef regime; else -> forage regime'), the trainer collapses to the smoothest single regime good-enough across the whole state space. Monostrategy is therefore not a bug of training but the predicted output of an architecture in which only updaters exist and no apprehender does. Falsifiable by the weak-reading rule-apprehension experiment (ARC-062): a gated-policy architecture trained on the same substrate should break the collapse where standard E3 does not.

Rule-apprehension architectural slot, strong reading: a distributed CandidateRule field with tolerance-gated availability, hippocampal-rollout-eligibility shaping, structured per-action evidence-trace records, and waking-vs-sleep refinement asymmetry. The biology-faithful form of the rule-apprehension layer, formalising the 2026-05-04 thought-intake on tolerance-gated rule apprehension (PNAS 10.1073/pnas.2508061123). Implementation deferred to V4. Persistent flag for governance: this slot is expected to be needed if ARC-062 (weak reading) fails or proves insufficient at scale, AND independently as the architectural commitment that supports moral-residue attribution to the rule-field, sleep-vs-waking refinement asymmetry, and clinically-realistic failure modes (trauma schemas, paranoid rule fields, depressive rollout constraint).

Rule-apprehension architectural slot, weak reading: a non-Bayesian rule-creator at the policy layer that proposes discriminative policy modes for the updaters (E3, training loop) to refine. V3 instantiation: a gated-policy architecture in which at least two policy heads share encoder features but receive different gating from a learned context discriminator (e.g., reef-context vs open-context heads). Tests the logical-necessity claim of MECH-309 within the existing V3 substrate without registering the heavier CandidateRule machinery (ARC-063, V4-deferred). Architectural slot, not yet implemented.

An explicit thalamic-routing substrate (reuniens/MD-analogue) gates and amplifies bidirectional traffic between hippocampal anchor pool and frontal substrates. Currently abstracted into the GoalState->HippocampalModule call chain; making it explicit is needed when V3 dynamics demonstrate that the implicit routing is insufficient.

Type-encoder produces a category-prototype feature vector that is written into the AnchorSet alongside z_world, so anchors can be queried by type-key as well as location-key. The type-encoder uses the same input substrate as the existing instance-encoder but produces a different (regularity-extracted) representation, mirroring the trisynaptic-vs-monosynaptic complementary-learning architecture within hippocampus.

Priority-weighted anchor replay (MECH-285) runs not only during sleep but also during brief waking quiescent pauses, surfacing remote / non-current stored content for goal-directed retrieval. The architectural gating is contextual (quiescent vs active behaviour, sensory input vs absence) rather than state-categorical (waking vs sleep). Refinement / generalisation of MECH-285.

Priority-weighted anchor replay (MECH-285) runs not only during sleep but also during brief waking quiescent pauses, surfacing remote / non-current stored content for goal-directed retrieval. The architectural gating is contextual (quiescent vs active behaviour, sensory input vs absence) rather than state-categorical (waking vs sleep). Refinement / generalisation of MECH-285.

Cognitive map traversal via theta sequences operates at the agent's active abstraction level. Theta sequences do not have a fixed semantic content -- they simulate trajectories through whatever cognitive map the substrate vocabulary currently defines, whether spatial, conceptual, type-graph, or option-graph. Sister claim to MECH-299, on the map-being-traversed axis.

Type-V_s gating extends MECH-269's per-stream / per-region V_s with a per-type V_s dimension keyed on the matched type-key from MECH-296. Allows the proposer / E3 to gate stream contributions by category-V_s as well as by per-stream V_s, downweighting type-confident-but-stream-degraded inputs and vice versa.

Prototype-readout operator computes a softmax-attention match between the current LatentState and the type-keyed anchor pool, returning a small set of best-matched type-keys plus their confidences. Runs both during waking (moment-to-moment type recognition) and during sleep (consolidation refinement of the type-anchor pool).

Multi-resource heterogeneity: qualitatively distinct resource types (e.g. food / water / novelty) with per-type identity tags, type-specific spawn distributions, type-specific benefit profiles, and a per-axis homeostatic drive system, plus a curriculum-introduction hook. Provides the goal-identity vocabulary the wanting/liking + identity-distinct-goal cohort (MECH-229/230, MECH-117/216, ARC-030/032, Q-030, SD-015 unblock chain) needs to be honestly tested at substrate level, and the substrate scaffold for downstream developmental-schedule work.

Theta-burst packet contains multi-content joint binding: each ~125ms theta cycle binds a {goal_latent, action_proposal, risk_estimate, state_summary} tuple within one phase-aligned window, with verisimilitude grounding the rollout step that must stay ahead of real time.

Dual-component online invalidation trigger: an UPSTREAM anchor-side comparator (CA1/CA3 mismatch flowing through subicular routing per Vinogradova 2001 + O'Mara 2009) coupled to a DOWNSTREAM broadcast event (LC phasic burst per Aston-Jones-Cohen 2005, with parallel signals from generalised dopaminergic prediction error per Schultz 1997 and lateral habenula negative-RPE per Matsumoto-Hikosaka 2007), wired together by the HC-VTA loop (Lisman & Grace 2005). The two components are coupled stages of one trigger event, not alternatives. Distinct from MECH-284 the accumulator: MECH-287 is the discrete trigger event (anchor-side mismatch + broadcast release) that drives accumulation. Triggered by latent-stream prediction failure (norm(z_pred(t-1) - z_obs(t)) > theta_trigger) OR strongly negative value-PE (value_PE(t) < -theta_value) OR exogenous surprise. Carries no schema-region credit on its own; downstream MECH-284 attributes the broadcast event to the active anchor set. Failure modes dissociate from MECH-284: trigger-loss produces single-event blindness (no anchor ever feels invalidated, but staleness map remains queryable); accumulator-loss produces V3-EXQ-475's phenotype directly (releases happen but never integrate). Failure modes also dissociate from MECH-285 sleep priority: trigger-loss prevents staleness from accruing, while sleep-priority loss prevents accrued staleness from being repaired. Within MECH-287 itself, anchor-side comparator failure dissociates from broadcast failure: comparator-loss = no upstream signal to broadcast (silent trigger, biologically a CA1/CA3 lesion); broadcast-loss = comparator fires but no global gain modulation downstream (silent invalidation, biologically an LC lesion).

Stage-2 specialisation of MECH-276: once the agent can distinguish self-produced from world-produced sensory change (stage 1 complete via MECH-277), it forms object-schemas via experimental action on the world. An object is the stable bundle of features that behave causally together under interventional perturbation -- push here, these features move together; occlude this, that cluster disappears. Object-schema formation is the stage-2 specialisation of the scientist-agent principle, with world-features as the target of intervention. V3's z_world (SD-005) is currently engineered pre-split; this is an architectural shortcut past stage 2.

Stage-1 specialisation of MECH-276: the agent discovers its own action space via motor experimentation (motor babbling) before SD-003 counterfactual self-attribution is well-formed. The agent performs motor acts and observes which sensory changes covary with them; the output is the substrate SD-003 requires -- a set of actions the agent has reason to believe are self-initiated and for which it has counterfactual expectations. Without MECH-277, the counterfactual action space (a_cf) is not well-defined and SD-003 degenerates.

Regional verisimilitude V_s gates not only hippocampal proposer anchor selection but also which streams ground forward predictions in cortical world models (E1 sensory predictor, E2 transition model). Without symmetric V_s gating on E1/E2 rollouts, downstream consumers receive stale-but-confident-looking prediction errors -- the wired-but-inert failure mode.

Hippocampal proposer anchor selection AND anchor-reset: (a) trajectory proposals issued between committed actions anchor on the subset of current latent streams whose regional verisimilitude (per-stream prediction/realization alignment) exceeds threshold; misaligned streams hold their last-verified snapshot (anchor carryover) rather than contaminate the rollout. (b) Active anchors are continuously re-evaluated against an effective verisimilitude V_s_anchor(a, t) = V_s(r, t) - staleness[r] (MECH-284 read-out); if V_s_anchor falls below theta_reset(r) for k consecutive steps the anchor is marked inactive (NOT erased -- dual-trace preservation per Bouton 2004) and a new anchor is sought from the current latent slice. A minority probe channel deliberately inverts the gate for low-verisimilitude / high-PE regions, carrying a strengthened MECH-094 hypothesis tag, and does not update the ARC-018 viability map until realized-experience validation.

REE developmental training proceeds in three ordered stages: (1) self-as-object — action-space discovery via motor experimentation, producing the substrate SD-003 requires; (2) objects-as-patterns — object-schema formation via experimental action on the world; (3) others-as-special-objects — modelling other agents as objects with their own policies. The ordering is load-bearing: without a self-model the agent cannot distinguish self-produced from world-produced sensory change; without object-schemas the agent cannot recognise other-agents as a distinguished subclass of objects. Refines the generic ARC-019 curriculum-gates claim.
Single-pass agency attribution on the z_world (causal-footprint) reafferent stream: residual = z_world_observed - E2_world(z_world_{t-1}, a_actual).
Single-pass agency attribution on the z_self (motor-proprioceptive) reafferent stream: residual = z_self_observed - E2_self(z_self_{t-1}, a_actual).

E1 must expose a z_world-only ContextMemory query path that produces two downstream signals: an action-affordance bias for E2 (MECH-151) and a terrain precision weight for E3 harm/goal scoring (MECH-152); the existing bulk generate_prior() path is insufficient because it blends z_self and z_world and produces no cue-specific modulation.

The hippocampal module encodes pairwise distance relations between states in the z_world latent manifold — not only positional tags — providing a metric structure that enables distance-based navigation toward goal states across the residue-field terrain.

E2 operates as a short-horizon efference-copy forward model on z_self; its prediction accuracy degrades faster than E1's across multi-step horizons, consistent with a cerebellar 1-step transition predictor.

E3 maintains a structured latent goal representation (positive attractor in z_goal sub-space, measurable as z_goal_norm > 0) distinct from harm avoidance, enabling hippocampal terrain navigation toward goal states.

E3 produces reliably distinct wanting and liking behavioral signals: wanting drives persistent approach toward goal-encoded locations (incentive salience); liking produces only consummatory response at resource contact.
encoder.resource_proximity_supervision
Animated agency attribution overweighting: systematic bias toward attributing intentional causation to animated/moving entities requires active calibration in the attribution pathway.
z_world must be continuously residualized against z_self predictions; efference-copy subtraction is not limited to SD-003 query time.
Violence corollary: violence is conditionally permissible only when an agent is not modelled as sufficiently self-like OR poses a genuine threat; both conditions require accurate inference.
Language functions as a mechanism for recognising, repairing, and re-establishing self-other equivalence across agents.
Epistemic responsibility: agent is responsible for refining world models toward accurate similarity and threat inference; misclassification is morally relevant, not merely practically inconvenient.
Technical comparison: REE versus Meta AI/KAUST Neural Computers roadmap.
Ethics-as-coherence architecture: ethical trajectory selection is implemented as optimisation of shared temporal-depth coherence across self and represented others.

Is loneliness -- unshared suffering -- an ethical harm category in its own right, derivable from Axiom 5 (love exists / INV-029)? If love is real and sharing joys and sorrows is its mechanism, does enforced isolation constitute architectural harm?
How should REE behave when axioms conflict -- e.g., preserving self (INV-026) vs preserving others (INV-028) when both cannot be achieved simultaneously?
What actions are strictly required by the five axioms at all times, independent of context?
What actions are strictly forbidden by the five axioms (INV-025-029), independent of context or consequences?

A developing REE agent that acknowledges all five axioms but concludes 'love exists but not for me' undergoes ethical motivation collapse: the benefit gradient (Axiom 5 / ARC-024) is not motivationally active for self-other relations, and the ethical architecture resolves to survival or domination strategies. This is the primary developmental failure mode for the caregiver requirement (INV-043).

The five axioms jointly derive a set of ethical objectives: preserve minds, preserve future options, reduce unnecessary suffering, increase shared joy, maintain corrigibility, maintain truth-seeking, maintain the ability to love and be loved, maintain the shared world, and maintain the possibility of future minds and future love.

The REE ethical architecture is organised as a conceptual stack: Layers 0-4 are the five axioms (epistemic ground, existence, other minds, shared world, love/shared valence); Layer 5 is ethics derived from the axioms; Layer 6 is REE as the decision system implementing ethics under uncertainty; Layers 7-9 close the action-consequence-learning loop.
Can a multiagent REE system with other-cost-aversion primitives be formally shown to converge to ethical attractors via potential game theory, Lyapunov stability, or stochastic stability methods?

Curiosity-driven approach must distinguish world-state novelty from agent-policy novelty; untyped novelty reward creates chronic approach pressure toward partially unpredictable agents regardless of harm risk.

In a multiagent world, harm must be represented as a relational signal: harm-to-agent (direct cost/physical signal) and harm-to-agency (obstruction of another agent's goal-pursuit) are distinct signal types requiring distinct architectures.
Counterfactual other-cost-aversion activates cooperative behavior as a motivational surrogate when the direct task-reward pathway is degraded.
Ethics testing must span nth-order multiagent trajectory distributions; local pairwise probes are insufficient to characterize emergent ethical properties.
Violence corollary: violence is conditionally permissible only when an agent is not modelled as sufficiently self-like OR poses a genuine threat; both conditions require accurate inference.
Language functions as a mechanism for recognising, repairing, and re-establishing self-other equivalence across agents.
Technical comparison: REE versus Meta AI/KAUST Neural Computers roadmap.
Ethics-as-coherence architecture: ethical trajectory selection is implemented as optimisation of shared temporal-depth coherence across self and represented others.

What actions are strictly forbidden by the five axioms (INV-025-029), independent of context or consequences?
Social reward signals (affiliative touch, oxytocin-gaze loop) reinforce empathic coupling strength, creating a self-strengthening coordination loop.
Surprise-doubled approach gradient toward distressed other: prediction error approach and z_beta leakage approach converge simultaneously.
Other-directed hippocampal harm avoidance: planning architecture identical to self-preservation with harm-gradient source swapped to coupled other-agent.

Two distinct goal-directed systems operate in parallel: a habit system (SNc/dorsal-striatum, model-free) sufficient for approach in familiar contexts, and a hippocampally-planned system (VTA/ventral-striatum+PFC, model-based) required for novel contexts, long-horizon benefit accumulation, and prosocial planning.

A developing REE agent that acknowledges all five axioms but concludes 'love exists but not for me' undergoes ethical motivation collapse: the benefit gradient (Axiom 5 / ARC-024) is not motivationally active for self-other relations, and the ethical architecture resolves to survival or domination strategies. This is the primary developmental failure mode for the caregiver requirement (INV-043).

REE architecture enables but does not guarantee ethical development; without a developmental phase in which the agent experiences love from caregivers and internalises the belief that it is loveable, the architectural capacity for ethics (INV-025-029) may resolve to survival, domination, or indifference instead.

The five axioms jointly derive a set of ethical objectives: preserve minds, preserve future options, reduce unnecessary suffering, increase shared joy, maintain corrigibility, maintain truth-seeking, maintain the ability to love and be loved, maintain the shared world, and maintain the possibility of future minds and future love.

The REE ethical architecture is organised as a conceptual stack: Layers 0-4 are the five axioms (epistemic ground, existence, other minds, shared world, love/shared valence); Layer 5 is ethics derived from the axioms; Layer 6 is REE as the decision system implementing ethics under uncertainty; Layers 7-9 close the action-consequence-learning loop.

Hippocampal terrain maps encode separable valence dimensions (wanting, liking, harm-discriminative, surprise); ARC-007 residue-field navigation is the harm-causal special case of this general architecture.

cycle_audit.rationale: Substrate/module claim and functional mechanism co-define each other; useful architecture coupling, not necessarily build-order dependency.

top_internal_sources.title: dACC/aMCC-analog (adaptive control): module that reads z_harm_a precision-weighted prediction error, z_conflict, and control-demand signals; outputs behavioural-adjustment magnitude; writes to a learnable striatal-analog action-value target.

z_harm_a enters action selection as a precision-weighted prediction error (harm_surprise_PE, SD-020) against an internal pain forward model (E2_harm_a), not as a raw magnitude. Upgrades SD-020 from provisional to prerequisite for SD-032b (dACC-analog).

dACC-analog bias suppression against recency / monostrategy: the dACC module writes a counter-bias that resists repeating the last-rewarded trajectory when long-term value information demands exploration. Candidate explanation of the monostrategy failure observed in fishtank_viz and earlier queue-diversity results.

source_claims.title: Is MECH-313 (LC-NE tonic noise floor) a separate parameter from MECH-260 (dACC anti-recency penalty), or do they collapse into one anti-monostrategy substrate? Falsifiable with the four-arm ablation: both-OFF / 313-only / 260-only / both-ON, on SD-054 reef substrate with ARC-062 gated-policy enabled.

Should the running-variance / dynamic-precision update fire at action-selection time (early, control-plane-coupled), at outcome-integration time (late, residue-coupled, current location), or at both? Equivalently: is the StepHarness contract that requires experiment loops to call agent.update_residue() each step sufficient, or does ARC-016 precision need a call site that is structurally guaranteed to fire whenever the agent is selecting actions?

Does REE require a unified meta-level threshold supervisor that adapts pass/fail and commit/release thresholds across substrates from system-wide instability metrics, or do the existing scattered adaptive loci (ARC-016 dynamic precision, SD-032c AIC interoceptive baseline EMA, SD-032d PCC stability scalar, SD-032e pACC drive bias) produce coherent meta-stability under chronic load without a supervisor?

stochastic_noise_floor (max_entropy_policy_regularisation_LC_NE_tonic_analog). A floor-level stochastic action-selection noise that prevents complete deterministic collapse of the policy. Biological substrate: locus coeruleus tonic firing producing baseline action-selection variability (Aston-Jones & Cohen 2005 adaptive-gain model). Computational analog: max-entropy policy regularisation / SAC entropy bonus (Haarnoja et al. 2018). Distinct from MECH-260 dACC anti-recency: MECH-313 is a state-independent noise floor, while MECH-260 is a state-dependent recency penalty. Both can contribute to anti-monostrategy pressure but operate via different mechanisms; whether they collapse into a single substrate or are mutually load-bearing is open (Q-045).

Multi-slot GoalState holds N>=2 simultaneously-active goal slots with per-slot z_goal, drive coupling, age, and persistence parameters. Each slot generates its own ghost-goal-bank rank, ghost-probe budget, and proposer trajectories; a dACC-style arbitrator selects which slot's best trajectory commits this tick.

Closure operator over committed rule_state: on satisfaction of a committed rule_state's completion condition, a 'done' token releases the bistable commitment latch (MECH-090), imposes a temporary No-Go bias (MECH-260) on the just-completed action-class / rule, and discharges the residue associated with that commitment within its domain. The closure token is what turns evaluation off; its absence leaves the governance loop stuck in evaluate-more even when the rule is satisfied.

Closure operator over committed rule_state: on satisfaction of a committed rule_state's completion condition, a 'done' token releases the bistable commitment latch (MECH-090), imposes a temporary No-Go bias (MECH-260) on the just-completed action-class / rule, and discharges the residue associated with that commitment within its domain. The closure token is what turns evaluation off; its absence leaves the governance loop stuck in evaluate-more even when the rule is satisfied.
Is V_s generalisation to E1/E2 forward predictions (MECH-269b) the missing link that unblocks SD-032b dACC behavioural-revision (i.e. the wired-but-inert failure mode of EXQ-483/483a)?

dACC conflict saturation: the dACC-analog (SD-032b) prediction-error / conflict signal caps and habituates under repeated identical outcomes; it does not grow unboundedly as conflict persists. Without saturation, a stuck governance loop can generate unbounded pe signal that never triggers a mode change, which is the control-theory signature of persistent rumination.

dACC conflict saturation: the dACC-analog (SD-032b) prediction-error / conflict signal caps and habituates under repeated identical outcomes; it does not grow unboundedly as conflict persists. Without saturation, a stuck governance loop can generate unbounded pe signal that never triggers a mode change, which is the control-theory signature of persistent rumination.

dACC conflict saturation: the dACC-analog (SD-032b) prediction-error / conflict signal caps and habituates under repeated identical outcomes; it does not grow unboundedly as conflict persists. Without saturation, a stuck governance loop can generate unbounded pe signal that never triggers a mode change, which is the control-theory signature of persistent rumination.

dACC/aMCC-analog (adaptive control): module that reads z_harm_a precision-weighted prediction error, z_conflict, and control-demand signals; outputs behavioural-adjustment magnitude; writes to a learnable striatal-analog action-value target.

dACC/aMCC-analog (adaptive control): module that reads z_harm_a precision-weighted prediction error, z_conflict, and control-demand signals; outputs behavioural-adjustment magnitude; writes to a learnable striatal-analog action-value target.

Salience-network coordinator: network-level module reading AIC-, dACC-, MCC-, PCC-analog subdivisions and outputting a discrete operating-mode variable (external_task / internal_replay / internal_planning / offline_consolidation) plus a mode-switch trigger.

dACC-analog bias suppression against recency / monostrategy: the dACC module writes a counter-bias that resists repeating the last-rewarded trajectory when long-term value information demands exploration. Candidate explanation of the monostrategy failure observed in fishtank_viz and earlier queue-diversity results.

Salience-network switch threshold: when the precision-weighted salience of any input to the salience-network coordinator (SD-032a) exceeds a threshold, the coordinator fires a whole-system mode switch rather than producing an incremental policy update.

z_harm_a enters action selection as a precision-weighted prediction error (harm_surprise_PE, SD-020) against an internal pain forward model (E2_harm_a), not as a raw magnitude. Upgrades SD-020 from provisional to prerequisite for SD-032b (dACC-analog).

Action-chunk cache stores frequently-traversed action sequences as cached lookups, indexed by (state-signature, expected-outcome-signature). Sits in the dorsolateral-loop slot of ARC-021. Provides the model-free habit pathway missing from V3 and the runaway-chunking failure mode underlying OCD compulsions and rituals (Graybiel 2008).

Motor primitive substrate at the bottom of the action-representation hierarchy: a small fixed dictionary of force-field-like primitive activations that vectorially combine to produce the action_object that E2 consumes. Required only when REE moves to continuous limb-like control.

Option library substrate stores a discrete codebook of named, reusable action subroutines (each as initiation-set + termination-function + internal-policy triple, per Sutton-Precup-Singh 1999), distinct from the existing continuous SD-004 action_object_decoder. Required for hierarchical action composition, tool use, social-coordination protocols, and richer ghost-probe seeding.

Stage-2 specialisation of MECH-276: once the agent can distinguish self-produced from world-produced sensory change (stage 1 complete via MECH-277), it forms object-schemas via experimental action on the world. An object is the stable bundle of features that behave causally together under interventional perturbation -- push here, these features move together; occlude this, that cluster disappears. Object-schema formation is the stage-2 specialisation of the scientist-agent principle, with world-features as the target of intervention. V3's z_world (SD-005) is currently engineered pre-split; this is an architectural shortcut past stage 2.

Mode-conditioned hippocampal trajectory proposals: HippocampalModule.propose_trajectories must condition on operating_mode (SD-032a) in addition to world_state. External_task mode proposes task-relevant trajectories; internal_planning mode proposes counterfactual / branching trajectories; internal_replay mode replays past-successful trajectories; offline_consolidation mode proposes stability-check trajectories. Without mode conditioning, replay content contaminates external-task selection.
Curiosity drive: information-seeking bias in hippocampal trajectory scoring that favors regions of higher representational density in the RBF map.

DA-modulated RBF center density: dopaminergic signal at reward encounters allocates multiple closely-spaced RBF centers in the hippocampal residue field, creating representational expansion at reward locations without requiring environmental richness.

Hippocampal trajectory proposals must be conditioned on a goal signal (z_goal) injected from E3 via a dedicated input channel; without this conditioning, the hippocampal module generates only position-based trajectories and cannot produce goal-directed navigation toward target states.

Dopaminergic modulation of hippocampal place coding at reward-associated locations produces representational expansion (higher information density, finer spatial resolution, more stable place fields), and this expansion -- not an explicit positive valence gradient -- is the mechanism by which approach valence enters hippocampal terrain.

Approach behavior toward reward locations emerges from the interaction of DA-mediated representational expansion (MECH-232) and an information-seeking (curiosity) drive operating on the hippocampal map. No explicit approach gradient or wanting field is required in hippocampal terrain.

z_resource (SD-015, object-identity encoding) and z_world (spatial-contextual encoding) separate at the feedforward representation stage but must re-converge at the hippocampal planning stage for goal-directed navigation.

The cue-indexed E1 context vector (MECH-150) projects to an action_bias signal that is added to E2.action_object() outputs, producing top-down contextual weighting of the action-affordance manifold prior to HippocampalModule search.

CA1 mismatch between E1-predicted and CA3-retrieved z_world gates hippocampal trajectory injection into E3 evaluation: novel situations (high CA1 mismatch) should trigger more frequent and diverse rollout proposals; familiar situations (low mismatch) should rely on cached viability estimates.

DG-mediated pattern separation gates trajectory disambiguation: the dentate gyrus must produce non-redundant sparse encodings of similar z_world states before rollout proposals are generated, preventing the hippocampal planning module from proposing near-identical trajectories from overlapping inputs.
The NREM sub-phase of offline mode replays recent episodic content via SWR-equivalent sequences, transferring episodic traces from E3/hippocampal buffer to E1/neocortical schematic representation.
HippocampalModule navigates z_self trajectory space (deliberation sequences) in addition to z_world action-object space O, enabling the agent to plan its own deliberation.

cycle_audit.rationale: Small reciprocal module/function cluster; probably valid coupling but worth reviewing edge semantics.

top_internal_sources.title: Context-dependent neuromodulatory gain is a single unifying mechanism expressed at multiple levels: ARC-016 (temporal precision from prediction error variance), MECH-152 (contextual terrain weight from cue-indexed retrieval), MECH-026 (arousal-mediated vigilance sensitivity), and MECH-093 (z_beta heartbeat frequency modulation) are all facets of a global arousal/precision signal (LC-NE) modulated by a context-specific gain signal (vmPFC/OFC).

The E2 action_bias pathway (MECH-151, OFC analog) and E3 terrain_weight pathway (MECH-152, vmPFC analog) have different update rates: action_bias updates rapidly (single-trial, OFC-like) while terrain_weight integrates over longer timescales (vmPFC-like).
Ready vigilance primes restraint under high sensitivity without action.

Ready vigilance (MECH-026) requires an arousal regulator that maintains an optimal sensitivity level on the LC-NE inverted-U curve, implemented via MECH-093 heartbeat frequency modulation rather than a binary high/low precision switch.

The frontal cue-weighting circuit -- E1 cue-indexed retrieval (MECH-150) feeding dual pathways to E2 action biasing (MECH-151) and E3 terrain precision scaling (MECH-152) -- completes the stored-to-active pathway specified in ARC-035 by providing the retrieval mechanism and dual downstream output architecture.

E3's ethical selection machinery is architecturally present from initialisation but functionally dark until E1 and E2 substrate development is complete; REE requires staged developmental phases before ethical selection can operate on real signal.

External vs internal cognition modes are controlled by precision-routing configurations on the same E1 substrate: External (high sensory, low hippocampal, low rollout), Internal (low sensory, high hippocampal, high rollout), Mixed (medium), and Replay (very low sensory, very high hippocampal, structured rollout). This dimension is orthogonal to the Action/Vigilance/Pathological modes (MECH-025-027).

E1 ContextMemory requires a supervised context-labeling training objective -- not unsupervised experience alone -- to produce differentiated cue-indexed representations; without this objective, hazard-proximate and hazard-distal context vectors remain near-identical (cosine_sim approximately 1.0), leaving the MECH-150 retrieval pathway functionally silent.

The childhood phase of REE instantiation -- committed behaviour with constrained affordances -- is the necessary developmental regime that populates E1 ContextMemory with the content ARC-041 (SD-016) requires; this phase is not merely a safety feature but an architectural prerequisite for E3 ethical selection to operate on real signal.

A minimal sensory cue pattern in z_world is sufficient to activate the appropriate harm/goal terrain precision configuration via E1 cue-indexed retrieval -- the full accumulation of z_harm_a is not required for terrain preparation to begin.

Context-dependent neuromodulatory gain is a single unifying mechanism expressed at multiple levels: ARC-016 (temporal precision from prediction error variance), MECH-152 (contextual terrain weight from cue-indexed retrieval), MECH-026 (arousal-mediated vigilance sensitivity), and MECH-093 (z_beta heartbeat frequency modulation) are all facets of a global arousal/precision signal (LC-NE) modulated by a context-specific gain signal (vmPFC/OFC).

LPB interoceptive routing into harm-arbitration: a lateral-parabrachial-nucleus analog (LPB) routes interoceptive distress signals (visceral malaise, taste-aversion analogs, hypoxia, hypoglycemia) into the harm-arbitration network via PBN-CGRP -> CeA -> PAG. This is the upstream broadcast arm of the threat-side architecture, parallel to VMHdm's predator-side broadcast. Both feed downstream arbiters where SD-037's override_signal reweights them. Architectural commitment: interoceptive harm has a separable input channel from external-threat z_harm, dissociable in pathology and in normal modulation.

Orexin-analog gain modulation of drive-coupled arousal (motor-coupling axis): an orexin-analog modulator gates the coupling between drive_level and arousal-relevant downstream targets (PFC for SD-033a deliberation, BLA/CeA for SD-035 amygdala arbitration, beta-gate for MECH-090). Loss of this coupling produces a cataplexy-analog failure where emotional/drive input fails to recruit motor activation -- z_harm and drive_level compute normally but action selection does not integrate them. This is the motor-coupling axis of orexin function; the wake-stability axis (sleep-state gating, the dominant biological role) is MECH-286. Both axes are downstream of the same SD-037 override_signal, predicting clinical co-occurrence of cataplexy with sleep-state instability under orexin loss (narcolepsy).

PAG-analog gates the freeze response: freeze commit when z_harm_a x duration exceeds threshold; exit requires z_harm_a to fall below an exit_threshold scaled by gaba_tone; failure of exit produces sustained immobility characteristic of stuporous catatonia.

MECH-094's hypothesis tag is realized as differential downstream routing of hippocampal replay, not as a source-side boolean. Anchored replay (trusted starting state, MECH-269) preferentially reaches subiculum -> entorhinal deep layers -> neocortex (E1 consolidation) and lateral PFC (SD-033a viability map); probe replay (low-verisimilitude seed, strengthened tag) preferentially reaches BLA (affective tagging without consolidation) and NAc (curiosity / novelty scaffolding). Tag loss presents as probe content reaching consolidation destinations it should not reach -- an auditable confabulatory-planning signature distinct from psychosis or hallucination.

top_internal_sources.title: Play mode boundary requires a co-maintained context tag held by both agent and environment; agent-internal tagging alone is insufficient and unilateral play assertion without mutual signal is manipulation.
Mutual frame-maintenance signaling is necessary for play to function as distinct from manipulation: unilateral play declaration without partner agreement masks real harm as synthetic.

source_claims.title: Language acquisition tracks play_mode maturation: socially-grounded compositional language emerges as a specialised game type instantiated within play_mode (INV-058 / MECH-194 / ARC-049), not via a parallel language-acquisition substrate. The basic expression catalog (play pose, head tilt, laughter, mutual gaze, distress vocalisation, approach cue, vocal mimicry, pointing) acts as the bilateral frame-opening signal; conversational violations function as synthetic z_harm; utterance-as-goal acts as synthetic z_goal; proto-symbols accrete as conditional modifiers attached to basic-expression channels. Predicts that systems trained without play_mode-like episodes fail to acquire socially-grounded compositional language even when pattern-matching imitation succeeds.

Frame confusion (synthetic->real direction): the agent treats simulation, replay, and imagination as real, producing delusion formation, PTSD flashbacks, and anxiety.
Frame confusion (real->synthetic direction): the agent treats real consequences as synthetic, producing derealization, manic commitment, and dissociative states.

The caregiver's role during childhood is specifically play-frame maintenance (ARC-049), transitioning from unilateral frame-setting through co-participation to scaffolded withdrawal as play types progress.

Pretend play is the developmental point where the hypothesis tag (MECH-094) and play frame tag (ARC-049) first co-operate: the agent maintains counterfactual representations within a play frame, exercising the full commitment architecture in synthetic mode.
Play episode termination triggers real-signal recalibration: homeostatic and harm signals override synthetic thresholds; the frame signal drop is the recalibration trigger.
Play mode operates by substituting synthetic z_goal and z_harm signals while permitting full learning flow through E3/E2/E1 as if signals were real.
Play dominates the child developmental phase; the type of play progresses as subsystem competence develops, systematically training architectural components in dependency order.
Mutual frame-maintenance signaling is necessary for play to function as distinct from manipulation: unilateral play declaration without partner agreement masks real harm as synthetic.
Play episodes provide a curriculum for E3 goal-pursuit competence acquisition before SD-012 (homeostatic drive) is resolved: synthetic z_goal seeding bypasses the drive_level requirement.

Play mode boundary requires a co-maintained context tag held by both agent and environment; agent-internal tagging alone is insufficient and unilateral play assertion without mutual signal is manipulation.

Developmental bootstrapping necessity: any model-building agent requiring flexible multi-option behavioral selection must undergo a dedicated motor-sensory exploration epoch before reinforcement learning narrows the repertoire; insufficient exploration permanently restricts the option library.

developmental_bootstrapping_and_cue_indexed_retrieval_gaps -- REE lacks (1) a dedicated diversity-bootstrapping epoch that populates the hippocampal trajectory store before reinforcement narrowing; and (2) a differentiable cue-indexed retrieval path from PFC context representation to trajectory generation. EXQ-561 cluster / MECH-269 is diagnostic of gap (1); EXP-0155 zero-gradient cue_action_proj is diagnostic of gap (2). The two gaps are inter-dependent: the severed cue gradient (gap 2) is the mechanism that prevents diverse option population (gap 1).

Is MECH-313 (LC-NE tonic noise floor) a separate parameter from MECH-260 (dACC anti-recency penalty), or do they collapse into one anti-monostrategy substrate? Falsifiable with the four-arm ablation: both-OFF / 313-only / 260-only / both-ON, on SD-054 reef substrate with ARC-062 gated-policy enabled.

How should the relative weights of MECH-313 (stochastic noise floor / LC-NE tonic analog) and MECH-314 (structured curiosity bonus / frontopolar curiosity) be calibrated for V3 substrates? Falsifiable with parametric sweep on SD-054 reef substrate plus ARC-062 gated-policy.

rule_state_abstraction_substrate (meta_RL_recurrent_task_state_representation). A mechanism for abstracting the higher-level rule-state itself as a latent variable in the agent's representation, supporting policy adaptation that depends on inferred rule-context rather than only observable cue. Biological substrate: OFC cognitive map (Wilson, Takahashi, Schoenbaum & Niv 2014; Schuck et al. 2016 OFC encodes task state). Computational analog: meta-RL recurrent task-state representation (Wang et al. 2018 prefrontal-as-meta-RL; Duan et al. 2016 RL^2; Botvinick et al. 2019 review). Sub-claim of ARC-064 bottom-up rule discovery. ABSORPTION CHECK 2026-05-10: VERDICT (B) PARTIALLY ABSORBED. Within-V3 functional weight is borne by SD-033a LateralPFCAnalog rule_state buffer (W1 EMA recurrence + W3 substrate-readiness + W4 downstream bias) plus ARC-062 Phase 1 gated_policy multi-stream context discriminator (W3 per-tick rule-context discrimination + W4 score-aggregation training pressure), with ARC-062 Phase 3 GAP-C planned wiring closing the loop between the two. Two residual gaps remain: W2 (multi-task training distribution -- blocked on multi-rule-context substrate, SD-054 single-context insufficient) and W5 (cross-episode hidden-state continuity -- likely V4-scope; SD-033a per-episode reset is architecturally load-bearing for the rest of the agent state machine). Empirical retire-vs-promote verdict deferred to V3-EXQ-543c-successor on multi-rule-context substrate. See REE_assembly/docs/architecture/mech_318_absorption_check.md.

behavioural_pattern_compression (option_formation_striatal_chunking_analog). A mechanism for compressing repeated behavioural patterns into reusable options / action-chunks, producing a representation that supports temporally-extended action selection. Biological substrate: dorsolateral striatum sequence consolidation (Smith & Graybiel 2013/2016; Martiros & Graybiel 2018). Computational analog: options framework / option-critic (Bacon, Harb & Precup 2017). Sub-claim of ARC-064 bottom-up rule discovery.

cross_episode_regularity_extraction (episodic_RL_successor_representation_CLS_monosynaptic_analog). A mechanism for extracting cross-episode statistical regularities from observed behaviour streams, producing a representation that supports prediction of future state-occupancy distributions. Biological substrate: hippocampal monosynaptic CA1 path (Schapiro et al. 2017 CLS bi-pathway); statistical learning in hippocampus (Davachi 2015). Computational analog: successor representation (Stachenfeld et al. 2017 Nat Neurosci). Sub-claim of ARC-064 bottom-up rule discovery.

learning_progress_curiosity_intrinsic_motivation_analog. A reward bonus that tracks the rate-of-improvement of the agent's predictive model (or any internal-state quantity); actions that produce a steepening learning curve receive a positive bonus. Most computationally instantiated in ML literature (Schmidhuber 1991, Pathak et al. 2017); least biologically anchored of the three MECH-314 sub-flavours -- no clean cellular or regional analog. Distinguishes from MECH-314a (recency-based) and MECH-314b (uncertainty-based) by tracking second-order signal (improvement rate) rather than first-order (count or uncertainty).

uncertainty_driven_curiosity_frontopolar_analog. A reward bonus that tracks epistemic value -- how much the agent would learn from sampling a state or action. Biological substrate: rostrolateral prefrontal exploration bonus (Daw et al. 2006 Nature). Sub-flavour of MECH-314 structured curiosity bonus. Active-inference framing: bonus equals epistemic value term in expected free energy decomposition (Friston 2010/2015).

novelty_bonus_striatal_analog. A reward bonus that tracks recency-of-encounter; new or rarely-encountered states/actions receive a positive bonus independent of reward prediction error. Biological substrate: ventral striatum response to stimulus novelty (Wittmann et al. 2008 Neuron). Sub-flavour of MECH-314 structured curiosity bonus.

structured_curiosity_bonus (frontopolar_uncertainty_driven_exploration_expected_free_energy_analog). A reward bonus on action-selection that rewards information-gain or uncertainty-reduction, distinct from a state-independent noise floor (MECH-313). Biological substrate: rostrolateral prefrontal exploration bonus (Daw et al. 2006 Nature) operating jointly with striatal novelty (Wittmann et al. 2008 Neuron). Three sub-flavours (MECH-314a/b/c) that the lit-pull recommended NOT to collapse prematurely: striatal novelty (Wittmann anchor), frontopolar uncertainty-driven curiosity (Daw anchor), learning-progress / intrinsic-motivation curiosity (Schmidhuber/Pathak tradition). Active-inference (Friston 2010/2015 expected free energy) provides the formal-level unification. Q-044 captures the open question of whether the three sub-flavours are distinct substrates or three readings of one mechanism with different upstream inputs.

stochastic_noise_floor (max_entropy_policy_regularisation_LC_NE_tonic_analog). A floor-level stochastic action-selection noise that prevents complete deterministic collapse of the policy. Biological substrate: locus coeruleus tonic firing producing baseline action-selection variability (Aston-Jones & Cohen 2005 adaptive-gain model). Computational analog: max-entropy policy regularisation / SAC entropy bonus (Haarnoja et al. 2018). Distinct from MECH-260 dACC anti-recency: MECH-313 is a state-independent noise floor, while MECH-260 is a state-dependent recency penalty. Both can contribute to anti-monostrategy pressure but operate via different mechanisms; whether they collapse into a single substrate or are mutually load-bearing is open (Q-045).

rule_arbitration_multi_variable_multi_channel_dynamic_within_session. Parent claim for the multi-variable, multi-channel, dynamic-within-session arbitration that selects between competing rules / policy modes / action sources at the policy layer. Arbitration is governed by at least four distinct sub-mechanisms (MECH-312a/b/c/d), each falsifiable independently, with a candidate fifth (controllability/agency) deferred pending V3 substrate availability. Recommended combination rule: multiplicative gate (per-channel softmax of reliability * cost * agency * V_s * practice_maturity products) per Pull 3 R4 verdict; falsified against additive-logit baseline in V3-EXQ-543b/c. Reframed 2026-05-10 from earlier dual-channel-arbitration sketch following Pull 3 SYNTHESIS R5 SUB-MECH SPLIT recommendation (conf 0.78).

bottom_up_behavioral_pattern_extraction_pathway (hippocampal_CLS_bi_pathway + dorsolateral_striatum_chunking + OFC_cognitive_map analog). Architectural commitment: rule discovery from observed-behaviour clustering is logically and architecturally distinct from rule application from instructed/external context (ARC-062 top-down rule-apprehension). Where ARC-062 receives a context cue and selects a discriminative policy mode, ARC-064 receives an observed-behaviour stream and extracts cross-episode regularities, compressed behavioural patterns, and rule-state abstractions. Both pathways presuppose ARC-065 behavioural diversity generation upstream. Multi-substrate distributed instantiation: hippocampal Complementary Learning Systems bi-pathway (Schapiro et al. 2017), dorsolateral striatum action chunking (Smith & Graybiel 2013/2016), OFC cognitive-map state abstraction (Wilson et al. 2014; Schuck et al. 2016).

policy_composition_chunk_accumulator -- striatum/DLS-analog formation operator that builds chunk candidates from sequences of policy primitives repeatedly executed together with consistent outcomes. First child mechanism for ARC-071 (the maintenance operator MECH-324 is registered separately). Encodes the lit-pull R1 verdict (repetition + outcome consistency as primary trigger, evaluative-gate upstream, V_s-positive secondary) + R2 verdict partial (striatum-analog formation substrate; vmPFC/IL maintenance substrate handled by MECH-324) + R4 verdict (chunked primitive carries initiation-set + termination-condition fields per Sutton 1999 options structure) + R5 verdict (gradual hysteresis with F_low formation < F_high dissolution; chunk-size budget 2-5 elements per level). Two write paths: default MECH-094 strict (hypothesis_tag=False real executions only); sleep-replay carve-out under MECH-322 conditions (replay_origin=True audit flag with accelerated dissolution if not corroborated by real waking execution).

policy_composition.sleep_replay_value_conditioned_chunking_consolidation -- narrow exception path that permits ARC-071 chunk formation from replayed (hypothesis_tag=True) sequences during designated sleep phase, IF the replayed sequence carries a value-tag from prior real-executed episodes AND the formed chunk carries a replay_origin=True audit flag with accelerated dissolution if not corroborated by real waking execution within N episodes. Resolves ARC-071 lit-pull R6 governance escalation (Option B carve-out, picked 2026-05-11).

Contextual passive safety terrain: a non-trainable RBF-field accumulator over z_world that integrates 'suffering-absent' waking ticks into a slow contextual safety representation. Provides the substrate for MECH-303 (contextual passive safety pathway; vmPFC + hippocampus / vHipp-to-PL biological analog). When the field's local mean exceeds release threshold and beta_gate is elevated, drops the avoidance commitment to lower background vigilance. Parallel architecture to ARC-030 / MECH-117 benefit_terrain; uses a separate RBF field, no sharing with benefit_terrain or main residue values.

Conditioned safety store: a non-trainable cue-specific predictive structure encoding 'this z_world prototype predicts that suffering will be omitted'. EMA-prototype encoder updated by MECH-302 relief-completion events; cosine-similarity expression head provides commitment-release gate when current z_world matches the learned safety prototype. Implements MECH-304 (cue-specific conditioned inhibition substrate): the encoded prototype is the dorsal-striatum / dlPFC encoding-pathway analog; the cosine-similarity gate is the IL->CeA expression-pathway analog.

Suffering-derivative comparator: a non-trainable rolling-window descent detector on z_harm_a.norm() that fires a relief-completion event when a sustained drop from peak to trough exceeds a threshold. Provides the substrate for MECH-302 by detecting when a period of suffering has cleanly ended, reusing the same downstream tag-and-release pipeline as goal-achievement (MECH-057a beta-gate release, MECH-094 VALENCE_LIKING write). Architecturally adjacent to MECH-091 (urgency interrupt) but opposite polarity: MECH-091 fires on upward z_harm_a spike; SD-050 fires on downward sustained drop.

policy_decomposition_via_event_segmenter (rollout-side consumer of MECH-288 boundary pulses; re-segments the rollout proposal stream at finer grain when a chunk's region shows low V_s / boundary fires on the imagined trajectory). First child mechanism for ARC-070. Bidirectional extension of MECH-288 substrate (R2 lit-pull verdict 2026-05-10): MECH-288 already detects boundaries on whatever latent + PE streams it consumes; MECH-321 wires the rollout / imagination input stream into MECH-288 and consumes the resulting boundary pulses at the policy-primitive layer to decompose chunked primitives into finer-grain sub-elements. PE-driven primary trigger (V_s drop on chunk's region per Zacks 2007 / Schapiro 2017); bottleneck-state framing is a separate consolidation-phase mechanism, not the primary trigger. Recursive multi-level decomposition with depth cap 3-4 (Badre & D'Esposito 2009; Koechlin & Summerfield 2007). Both pre-commit and mid-execution phases supported via the same mechanism, with downstream effects gated by MECH-094 hypothesis_tag (rollout fires under hypothesis_tag=True write nothing; observation / execution fires under hypothesis_tag=False enable the existing observation-side consumer chain unchanged).

simulation_mode_rule_write_gating_categorical_replay_tag (SWR_machinery_substrate_REE_novel_function). The substrate-level instantiation of MECH-094's hypothesis-tag write gate at the rule-arbitration layer: a categorical write-gate keyed to a simulation-mode tag that suppresses arbitration-weight updates during ghost / replay / DMN passes, allowing rule-arbitration to be exercised without overwriting the active rule weights from non-realized data. Substrate-availability premise is well-anchored: SWR machinery (Joo & Frank 2018 review) + reverse-replay discriminable signature (Foster & Wilson 2006). The specific REE function (categorical write-gate keyed to a simulation tag suppressing arbitration-weight updates) is plausible biologically but unverified at cellular / synaptic level.

Cue-specific conditioned safety prediction: a discrete predictive structure encodes 'this stimulus actively predicts that suffering will be omitted', updated by explicit MECH-302 relief-completion events as its teaching signal. Encoding substrate is cortico-striatal (dorsal striatum + dlPFC). Expression/output pathway is IL-to-CeA. This is the conditioned-inhibition mechanism: when a specific cue co-occurs with relief, a separate learned prediction forms that can gate avoidance commitment release when the cue is later present. Sister claim to MECH-303 (contextual passive safety representation).

Relief-completion event reuses goal-achievement / reward-circuit completion machinery. When a comparator on a suffering-stream derivative crosses a downward threshold (sustained suffering-reduction below baseline), the resulting event fires the same downstream tag-and-release pipeline as goal-achievement: MECH-057a (commitment-release / beta-gate-drop), MECH-091 (salient-event phase-reset), and MECH-094 (categorical hypothesis-tag write gate). The polarity of the reinforcement is set at the input -- what counts as the completion is the suffering-derivative crossing, not a reward-onset event -- but the consolidation pipeline is shared. 'Things that just reduced suffering' are tagged in the same approach-attractor structure as 'things liked'.

Self-attribution is implemented via a family of forward-model comparators at motor, interoceptive, and propositional levels — each instantiating the same reafference-cancellation motif (forward model + comparator + authorship tag) at a distinct representational timescale and modality.

Closure operator over committed rule_state: on satisfaction of a committed rule_state's completion condition, a 'done' token releases the bistable commitment latch (MECH-090), imposes a temporary No-Go bias (MECH-260) on the just-completed action-class / rule, and discharges the residue associated with that commitment within its domain. The closure token is what turns evaluation off; its absence leaves the governance loop stuck in evaluate-more even when the rule is satisfied.

Dual-component online invalidation trigger: an UPSTREAM anchor-side comparator (CA1/CA3 mismatch flowing through subicular routing per Vinogradova 2001 + O'Mara 2009) coupled to a DOWNSTREAM broadcast event (LC phasic burst per Aston-Jones-Cohen 2005, with parallel signals from generalised dopaminergic prediction error per Schultz 1997 and lateral habenula negative-RPE per Matsumoto-Hikosaka 2007), wired together by the HC-VTA loop (Lisman & Grace 2005). The two components are coupled stages of one trigger event, not alternatives. Distinct from MECH-284 the accumulator: MECH-287 is the discrete trigger event (anchor-side mismatch + broadcast release) that drives accumulation. Triggered by latent-stream prediction failure (norm(z_pred(t-1) - z_obs(t)) > theta_trigger) OR strongly negative value-PE (value_PE(t) < -theta_value) OR exogenous surprise. Carries no schema-region credit on its own; downstream MECH-284 attributes the broadcast event to the active anchor set. Failure modes dissociate from MECH-284: trigger-loss produces single-event blindness (no anchor ever feels invalidated, but staleness map remains queryable); accumulator-loss produces V3-EXQ-475's phenotype directly (releases happen but never integrate). Failure modes also dissociate from MECH-285 sleep priority: trigger-loss prevents staleness from accruing, while sleep-priority loss prevents accrued staleness from being repaired. Within MECH-287 itself, anchor-side comparator failure dissociates from broadcast failure: comparator-loss = no upstream signal to broadcast (silent trigger, biologically a CA1/CA3 lesion); broadcast-loss = comparator fires but no global gain modulation downstream (silent invalidation, biologically an LC lesion).

Override-gated sleep-state transition: SD-037 override_signal also gates entry to and exit from offline (sleep) mode. High override (sustained drive + threat under metabolic demand) suppresses sleep-mode onset; low override + accumulated MECH-284 V_s-residual staleness + permissive threat context permits onset and recruits the MECH-285 sleep-replay priority readout. Architecturally this is the recruitment authority for the offline arm of the V_s bidirectional cluster: MECH-284 accumulates the demand for offline schema repair, MECH-285 sets the priority order, and MECH-286 provides the on-switch. Without MECH-286, MECH-285 produces a priority list with no transition mechanism to consume it. This is the V3 architectural account of orexin's canonical role as wake-stability gate (Saper/Scammell flip-flop), which MECH-281 (drive-arousal coupling) understates by framing cataplexy purely as a motor-coupling failure.

Sleep-consolidation priority from V_s residuals: during sleep-phase Bayesian aggregation (MECH-275) and sleep-dependent self-model aggregation (MECH-273), the order and weight of replay events is biased by the schema-staleness map produced by MECH-284. Replay is not uniform across schema and is not solely salience-driven (dopaminergic tagging); it is also prioritised by accumulated verisimilitude residuals. Schema regions with the most accumulated 'this is wrong' evidence get replayed first, more often, and with higher schema-update authority during sleep. PTSD-rumination has a clean architectural account here: MECH-285 priority loss co-occurring with MECH-094 hypothesis-tag dysfunction, locking the staleness tag from ever clearing.

V_s residual schema-staleness accumulator: a region-indexed scalar that integrates broadcast invalidation events (MECH-287) with attribution_weight credit assignment over the active anchor set, leaks slowly, and is read by both online anchor-reset (MECH-269 hysteresis check, waking) and sleep-consolidation priority (MECH-285, offline). Distinct from generic prediction error (which operates on latent values and updates online via gradient): MECH-284 is region-indexed, accumulates across events, and exposes a dual read-out (online + offline). Refined 2026-04-22 from sleep-only formulation to dual-readout formulation after V3-EXQ-475 demonstrated that an agent trapped in a stale anchor needs an online consumer of the staleness signal -- MECH-285 sleep-only readout cannot rescue the agent during waking. Saturated map produces over-attention to schema revision (anxiety-analog); absent map produces schema rigidity (V3-EXQ-475 phenotype: 5-6 PAG releases per seed but never integrate to anchor invalidation -> 1000/1000 freeze-active steps).

MECH-271 routing is state-gated. In waking, the anchor channel dominates the hippocampal fan-out: replay preferentially reaches consolidation and viability-map consumers to support decision-making. In sleep, the probe channel dominates: replay preferentially seeds Bayesian schema restructuring -- testing which action-outcome attributions held up across episodes, creating new buckets for non-fitting experiences, revising causal graphs. The informational needs of sleep (schema revision) and waking (decision support) are distinct, and the routing bias reflects that.

MECH-094's hypothesis tag is realized as differential downstream routing of hippocampal replay, not as a source-side boolean. Anchored replay (trusted starting state, MECH-269) preferentially reaches subiculum -> entorhinal deep layers -> neocortex (E1 consolidation) and lateral PFC (SD-033a viability map); probe replay (low-verisimilitude seed, strengthened tag) preferentially reaches BLA (affective tagging without consolidation) and NAc (curiosity / novelty scaffolding). Tag loss presents as probe content reaching consolidation destinations it should not reach -- an auditable confabulatory-planning signature distinct from psychosis or hallucination.

Hippocampal proposer anchor selection AND anchor-reset: (a) trajectory proposals issued between committed actions anchor on the subset of current latent streams whose regional verisimilitude (per-stream prediction/realization alignment) exceeds threshold; misaligned streams hold their last-verified snapshot (anchor carryover) rather than contaminate the rollout. (b) Active anchors are continuously re-evaluated against an effective verisimilitude V_s_anchor(a, t) = V_s(r, t) - staleness[r] (MECH-284 read-out); if V_s_anchor falls below theta_reset(r) for k consecutive steps the anchor is marked inactive (NOT erased -- dual-trace preservation per Bouton 2004) and a new anchor is sought from the current latent slice. A minority probe channel deliberately inverts the gate for low-verisimilitude / high-PE regions, carrying a strengthened MECH-094 hypothesis tag, and does not update the ARC-018 viability map until realized-experience validation.

top_dependency_targets.title: The system maintains a functional distinction between simulation-mode content and real-experience content, such that simulation content does not accumulate in the viability map as committed experience; failures of this distinction produce confabulation (simulated events encoded as real).

source_claims.title: Differentiable CEM selection approximation -- replaces the non-differentiable argmax / argsort elite-selection step in HippocampalModule.propose_trajectories() with a softmax-weighted candidate mean so that gradient flows from task reward back through candidate selection to SD-016 cue_action_proj. Opt-in via use_differentiable_cem flag (default False; legacy argmax path bit-identical when off). Preserves ARC-007 STRICT value-flat constraint: scoring uses existing residue-terrain evaluation, not a new value head.

hippocampal_cue_indexed_trajectory_library -- the hippocampal module should function as a content-addressable trajectory store where PFC context/goal cues pattern-complete against the stored library to retrieve trajectory templates appropriate for the current context; different PFC context states retrieve different trajectory subsets, enabling context-differentiated behavioral option selection without regenerating trajectories from scratch each tick.

Contextual passive safety terrain: a non-trainable RBF-field accumulator over z_world that integrates 'suffering-absent' waking ticks into a slow contextual safety representation. Provides the substrate for MECH-303 (contextual passive safety pathway; vmPFC + hippocampus / vHipp-to-PL biological analog). When the field's local mean exceeds release threshold and beta_gate is elevated, drops the avoidance commitment to lower background vigilance. Parallel architecture to ARC-030 / MECH-117 benefit_terrain; uses a separate RBF field, no sharing with benefit_terrain or main residue values.

Context-bound passive safety representation: the agent encodes 'this environment predicts absence of suffering' through sustained non-occurrence of harm, without requiring a discrete teaching event. Substrate is prefrontal-hippocampal (IL for expression gating; vHipp-to-PL-equivalent for contextual store). Update rule is diffuse and slow -- accumulated context exposure without harm drives the store. Output lowers background vigilance threshold: reduces the general avoidance commitment level when the agent is in an environment the store predicts as safe. Parallel to the 'things liked' goal-cue store but tracking suffering-absence rather than reward-presence. Sister claim to MECH-304 (cue-specific conditioned inhibition pathway).
Amygdala analogue as BLA + CeA salience stage between z_harm_a and the cingulate/hippocampus — two peer non-trainable arithmetic modules owning the MECH-046 and MECH-074a-d behaviours.

Replay is not uniform across schema and is not solely salience-driven (dopaminergic tagging); it is also prioritised by accumulated verisimilitude residuals. Schema regions with the most accumulated 'this is wrong' evidence get replayed first, more often, and with higher schema-update authority during sleep. PTSD-rumination has a clean architectural account here: MECH-285 priority loss co-occurring with MECH-094 hypothesis-tag dysfunction, locking the staleness tag from ever clearing.

Distinct from generic prediction error (which operates on latent values and updates online via gradient): MECH-284 is region-indexed, accumulates across events, and exposes a dual read-out (online + offline). Refined 2026-04-22 from sleep-only formulation to dual-readout formulation after V3-EXQ-475 demonstrated that an agent trapped in a stale anchor needs an online consumer of the staleness signal -- MECH-285 sleep-only readout cannot rescue the agent during waking. Saturated map produces over-attention to schema revision (anxiety-analog); absent map produces schema rigidity (V3-EXQ-475 phenotype: 5-6 PAG releases per seed but never integrate to anchor invalidation -> 1000/1000 freeze-active steps).

Verisimilitude recognition-for-recall gate: V_s computed at retrieval time (not proposal time) gates whether a stored episode is even a candidate for re-entry into the proposal stream. Recognition (does this fit my current situation?) is logically prior to anchor-eligibility (is this a good place to start a rollout from?). MECH-269's V_s is computed against the proposed anchor state; MECH-283's V_s is computed against the retrieved episode content. Loss of MECH-283 produces intrusive recall -- episodes that don't fit current context get pulled into the proposal stream (PTSD flashback / schizophrenic loose-association phenomenology).

Sleep-phase full-Bayesian aggregation is a general mechanism across attribution domains: given a waking-phase feedstock of counterfactual-backed attributions (produced by MECH-276), sleep phases aggregate across many episodes, correcting for delayed consequences, failed counterfactuals, and systematic attribution biases that single-episode attribution cannot catch. MECH-273 (self-model aggregation) and MECH-274 (other-model aggregation, V4) are specialisations. Object-schema revision is a further specialisation. INV-049 (offline phases mathematically necessary for model-building agents) is operationalised here: what sleep is mathematically necessary FOR is this cross-episode Bayesian aggregation of counterfactual-backed attribution.

The self-model has a waking half and a sleep half. The waking half is SD-003 (single-episode counterfactual self-attribution via E2). The sleep half is full-Bayesian aggregation of single-episode SD-003 outputs across many episodes, routed by the anchored channel to E1 and SD-033a, correcting for delayed consequences, failed counterfactuals, and systematic attribution biases. Without the sleep half, REE has an episode-local causal signature but not a durable self-model.

MECH-094's hypothesis tag is realized as differential downstream routing of hippocampal replay, not as a source-side boolean. Anchored replay (trusted starting state, MECH-269) preferentially reaches subiculum -> entorhinal deep layers -> neocortex (E1 consolidation) and lateral PFC (SD-033a viability map); probe replay (low-verisimilitude seed, strengthened tag) preferentially reaches BLA (affective tagging without consolidation) and NAc (curiosity / novelty scaffolding). Tag loss presents as probe content reaching consolidation destinations it should not reach -- an auditable confabulatory-planning signature distinct from psychosis or hallucination.

Ephaptic field coherence in CA1/CA3 pyramidal layers is the candidate physical substrate for the per-stream verisimilitude readout that MECH-269 anchor selection operates over. Streams whose predictions align with realized values produce coherent pyramidal ensembles whose extracellular fields constructively reinforce; misaligned streams produce incoherent fields. 'Anchor-eligible' reduces to 'field-coherent at read time.'

Hippocampal proposer anchor selection AND anchor-reset: (a) trajectory proposals issued between committed actions anchor on the subset of current latent streams whose regional verisimilitude (per-stream prediction/realization alignment) exceeds threshold; misaligned streams hold their last-verified snapshot (anchor carryover) rather than contaminate the rollout. (b) Active anchors are continuously re-evaluated against an effective verisimilitude V_s_anchor(a, t) = V_s(r, t) - staleness[r] (MECH-284 read-out); if V_s_anchor falls below theta_reset(r) for k consecutive steps the anchor is marked inactive (NOT erased -- dual-trace preservation per Bouton 2004) and a new anchor is sought from the current latent slice. A minority probe channel deliberately inverts the gate for low-verisimilitude / high-PE regions, carrying a strengthened MECH-094 hypothesis tag, and does not update the ARC-018 viability map until realized-experience validation.
BLA analogue emits a remap_signal on harm-PE spike when predictor-attribution flags specific latent codes — partial (~one-third) remap, NOT wholesale replacement.
BLA analogue writes a content-selective per-trace arousal tag at encoding and applies a per-trace retrieval weight vector (NOT a scalar gain) on hippocampal readout.
BLA analogue applies an arousal-dependent multiplicative gain to HippocampalModule write strength.

z_goal projects to a precision template vector that is additively written to the E1 prior via the dan_feedback channel with fast exponential decay, separable in dynamics and source from residue-geometry bias.

A dedicated hippocampal output pathway (analogous to vCA1 to nucleus accumbens shell) specifically encodes approach bias during motivational conflict -- separately from harm avoidance -- cleanly dissociating the approach signal at the action-selection interface; inhibition of this pathway defaults action selection to avoidance without disrupting harm representation.

top_dependency_targets.title: Hippocampal systems store and replay paths through residue-field terrain.

source_claims.title: Contextual passive safety terrain: a non-trainable RBF-field accumulator over z_world that integrates 'suffering-absent' waking ticks into a slow contextual safety representation. Provides the substrate for MECH-303 (contextual passive safety pathway; vmPFC + hippocampus / vHipp-to-PL biological analog). When the field's local mean exceeds release threshold and beta_gate is elevated, drops the avoidance commitment to lower background vigilance. Parallel architecture to ARC-030 / MECH-117 benefit_terrain; uses a separate RBF field, no sharing with benefit_terrain or main residue values.

Conditioned safety store: a non-trainable cue-specific predictive structure encoding 'this z_world prototype predicts that suffering will be omitted'. EMA-prototype encoder updated by MECH-302 relief-completion events; cosine-similarity expression head provides commitment-release gate when current z_world matches the learned safety prototype. Implements MECH-304 (cue-specific conditioned inhibition substrate): the encoded prototype is the dorsal-striatum / dlPFC encoding-pathway analog; the cosine-similarity gate is the IL->CeA expression-pathway analog.

Suffering-derivative comparator: a non-trainable rolling-window descent detector on z_harm_a.norm() that fires a relief-completion event when a sustained drop from peak to trough exceeds a threshold. Provides the substrate for MECH-302 by detecting when a period of suffering has cleanly ended, reusing the same downstream tag-and-release pipeline as goal-achievement (MECH-057a beta-gate release, MECH-094 VALENCE_LIKING write). Architecturally adjacent to MECH-091 (urgency interrupt) but opposite polarity: MECH-091 fires on upward z_harm_a spike; SD-050 fires on downward sustained drop.

affective_stream_modulation_of_arbitration_REE_novel. Arbitration weight is modulated by affective stream load: when the SD-010 / SD-011 affective stream produces high load (high salience harm or affect), the arbitration layer routes more weight to rules associated with affect-laden context, suppressing arbitration weight on neutral-context rules. The REE-novel claim is the FUNCTIONAL CONSEQUENCE: dual-stream architecture (SD-010/SD-011) is well-anchored in Murray-Rudebeck 2018 and Pessoa-Adolphs 2010, but the modulation of rule-arbitration weights by affective-stream load is REE-specific (MEDIUM-HIGH divergence). Sub-claim of MECH-312.

z_harm_a requires a controllability-modulated weighting term beyond MECH-219 temporal hysteresis: perceived uncontrollability or inescapability amplifies the affective load integrator, while perceived controllability suppresses it. Biological locus is dorsal ACC, which integrates noxious stimulus input with controllability context and projects to the medial suffering pathway (ACC/insula, overlapping with salience network).

Cue-specific conditioned safety prediction: a discrete predictive structure encodes 'this stimulus actively predicts that suffering will be omitted', updated by explicit MECH-302 relief-completion events as its teaching signal. Encoding substrate is cortico-striatal (dorsal striatum + dlPFC). Expression/output pathway is IL-to-CeA. This is the conditioned-inhibition mechanism: when a specific cue co-occurs with relief, a separate learned prediction forms that can gate avoidance commitment release when the cue is later present. Sister claim to MECH-303 (contextual passive safety representation).

Interoceptive noise dynamics: stochastic body-state perturbations independent of the agent's motor output (autonomic background noise + sensitisation spikes + fatigue drift) provide an agent-independent interoceptive background dense enough for the affective comparator (ARC-058, Level 2 of the reafference comparator family) to be honestly tested at substrate level.

Context-bound passive safety representation: the agent encodes 'this environment predicts absence of suffering' through sustained non-occurrence of harm, without requiring a discrete teaching event. Substrate is prefrontal-hippocampal (IL for expression gating; vHipp-to-PL-equivalent for contextual store). Update rule is diffuse and slow -- accumulated context exposure without harm drives the store. Output lowers background vigilance threshold: reduces the general avoidance commitment level when the agent is in an environment the store predicts as safe. Parallel to the 'things liked' goal-cue store but tracking suffering-absence rather than reward-presence. Sister claim to MECH-304 (cue-specific conditioned inhibition pathway).

Relief-completion event reuses goal-achievement / reward-circuit completion machinery. When a comparator on a suffering-stream derivative crosses a downward threshold (sustained suffering-reduction below baseline), the resulting event fires the same downstream tag-and-release pipeline as goal-achievement: MECH-057a (commitment-release / beta-gate-drop), MECH-091 (salient-event phase-reset), and MECH-094 (categorical hypothesis-tag write gate). The polarity of the reinforcement is set at the input -- what counts as the completion is the suffering-derivative crossing, not a reward-onset event -- but the consolidation pipeline is shared. 'Things that just reduced suffering' are tagged in the same approach-attractor structure as 'things liked'.

GABAergic regulatory layer applies cross-stream exponential decay (z_harm_s, z_harm_a, z_beta) modulated by tonic gaba_tone; missing-decay regulator is the proximal substrate cause of harm-stream lock-in (catatonia subtype II) observed in V3-EXQ-471.
Amygdala analogue as BLA + CeA salience stage between z_harm_a and the cingulate/hippocampus — two peer non-trainable arithmetic modules owning the MECH-046 and MECH-074a-d behaviours.

harm_unpleasantness_channel: a distinct pre-integration affective valence signal encoding the immediate motivational relevance of noxious input, processed via the medial pain pathway before temporal accumulation into suffering.

Theta-burst packet contains multi-content joint binding: each ~125ms theta cycle binds a {goal_latent, action_proposal, risk_estimate, state_summary} tuple within one phase-aligned window, with verisimilitude grounding the rollout step that must stay ahead of real time.

LPB interoceptive routing into harm-arbitration: a lateral-parabrachial-nucleus analog (LPB) routes interoceptive distress signals (visceral malaise, taste-aversion analogs, hypoxia, hypoglycemia) into the harm-arbitration network via PBN-CGRP -> CeA -> PAG. This is the upstream broadcast arm of the threat-side architecture, parallel to VMHdm's predator-side broadcast. Both feed downstream arbiters where SD-037's override_signal reweights them. Architectural commitment: interoceptive harm has a separable input channel from external-threat z_harm, dissociable in pathology and in normal modulation.

PAG-analog gates the freeze response: freeze commit when z_harm_a x duration exceeds threshold; exit requires z_harm_a to fall below an exit_threshold scaled by gaba_tone; failure of exit produces sustained immobility characteristic of stuporous catatonia.

Regional verisimilitude V_s gates not only hippocampal proposer anchor selection but also which streams ground forward predictions in cortical world models (E1 sensory predictor, E2 transition model). Without symmetric V_s gating on E1/E2 rollouts, downstream consumers receive stale-but-confident-looking prediction errors -- the wired-but-inert failure mode.
