Hippocampal terrain maps encode separable valence dimensions (wanting, liking, harm-discriminative, surprise); ARC-007 residue-field navigation is the harm-causal special case of this general architecture.

top_dependency_targets.title: Love as long-horizon care-investment is a structurally coherent agent disposition, not an add-on sentiment.

source_claims.title: Action-chunk cache stores frequently-traversed action sequences as cached lookups, indexed by (state-signature, expected-outcome-signature). Sits in the dorsolateral-loop slot of ARC-021. Provides the model-free habit pathway missing from V3 and the runaway-chunking failure mode underlying OCD compulsions and rituals (Graybiel 2008).

Motor primitive substrate at the bottom of the action-representation hierarchy: a small fixed dictionary of force-field-like primitive activations that vectorially combine to produce the action_object that E2 consumes. Required only when REE moves to continuous limb-like control.

Option library substrate stores a discrete codebook of named, reusable action subroutines (each as initiation-set + termination-function + internal-policy triple, per Sutton-Precup-Singh 1999), distinct from the existing continuous SD-004 action_object_decoder. Required for hierarchical action composition, tool use, social-coordination protocols, and richer ghost-probe seeding.

Stage-2 specialisation of MECH-276: once the agent can distinguish self-produced from world-produced sensory change (stage 1 complete via MECH-277), it forms object-schemas via experimental action on the world. An object is the stable bundle of features that behave causally together under interventional perturbation -- push here, these features move together; occlude this, that cluster disappears. Object-schema formation is the stage-2 specialisation of the scientist-agent principle, with world-features as the target of intervention. V3's z_world (SD-005) is currently engineered pre-split; this is an architectural shortcut past stage 2.

Mode-conditioned hippocampal trajectory proposals: HippocampalModule.propose_trajectories must condition on operating_mode (SD-032a) in addition to world_state. External_task mode proposes task-relevant trajectories; internal_planning mode proposes counterfactual / branching trajectories; internal_replay mode replays past-successful trajectories; offline_consolidation mode proposes stability-check trajectories. Without mode conditioning, replay content contaminates external-task selection.
Curiosity drive: information-seeking bias in hippocampal trajectory scoring that favors regions of higher representational density in the RBF map.

DA-modulated RBF center density: dopaminergic signal at reward encounters allocates multiple closely-spaced RBF centers in the hippocampal residue field, creating representational expansion at reward locations without requiring environmental richness.

Hippocampal trajectory proposals must be conditioned on a goal signal (z_goal) injected from E3 via a dedicated input channel; without this conditioning, the hippocampal module generates only position-based trajectories and cannot produce goal-directed navigation toward target states.

Dopaminergic modulation of hippocampal place coding at reward-associated locations produces representational expansion (higher information density, finer spatial resolution, more stable place fields), and this expansion -- not an explicit positive valence gradient -- is the mechanism by which approach valence enters hippocampal terrain.

Approach behavior toward reward locations emerges from the interaction of DA-mediated representational expansion (MECH-232) and an information-seeking (curiosity) drive operating on the hippocampal map. No explicit approach gradient or wanting field is required in hippocampal terrain.

z_resource (SD-015, object-identity encoding) and z_world (spatial-contextual encoding) separate at the feedforward representation stage but must re-converge at the hippocampal planning stage for goal-directed navigation.

The cue-indexed E1 context vector (MECH-150) projects to an action_bias signal that is added to E2.action_object() outputs, producing top-down contextual weighting of the action-affordance manifold prior to HippocampalModule search.

CA1 mismatch between E1-predicted and CA3-retrieved z_world gates hippocampal trajectory injection into E3 evaluation: novel situations (high CA1 mismatch) should trigger more frequent and diverse rollout proposals; familiar situations (low mismatch) should rely on cached viability estimates.

DG-mediated pattern separation gates trajectory disambiguation: the dentate gyrus must produce non-redundant sparse encodings of similar z_world states before rollout proposals are generated, preventing the hippocampal planning module from proposing near-identical trajectories from overlapping inputs.
The NREM sub-phase of offline mode replays recent episodic content via SWR-equivalent sequences, transferring episodic traces from E3/hippocampal buffer to E1/neocortical schematic representation.
HippocampalModule navigates z_self trajectory space (deliberation sequences) in addition to z_world action-object space O, enabling the agent to plan its own deliberation.

top_dependency_targets.title: Action objects as hippocampal map backbone, enabling long-horizon planning beyond step-level trajectories.

source_claims.title: policy_composition.sleep_replay_value_conditioned_chunking_consolidation -- narrow exception path that permits ARC-071 chunk formation from replayed (hypothesis_tag=True) sequences during designated sleep phase, IF the replayed sequence carries a value-tag from prior real-executed episodes AND the formed chunk carries a replay_origin=True audit flag with accelerated dissolution if not corroborated by real waking execution within N episodes. Resolves ARC-071 lit-pull R6 governance escalation (Option B carve-out, picked 2026-05-11).

REM sleep, with varied associative replay and attenuated noradrenergic tone, consolidates template-performance prediction error into updates of z_goal -> attentional-template projection weights (feature-specification update), not into stored-goal content.
SWS hippocampal-neocortical replay consolidates goal-value prediction error into updates of stored goal representations (content update), not into attentional-template parameters.
minimum_entropy_intake_sleep_dependency
serotonergic_replay_salience_tagging

Cognitive reserve (produced by education, bilingualism, complex occupation, social engagement, and enriched environments) protects against dementia primarily by maintaining sustained novelty-driven Model Error Load throughout the lifespan, keeping the SD-017 model update system exercised and preserving sleep-architecture responsiveness to learning demands; conversely, understimulating environments accelerate dementia by depriving the update system of the error signal needed to remain adaptive.

GABAergic sleep aids (benzodiazepines and Z-drugs: zolpidem, zopiclone, zaleplon) suppress SWS depth and continuity at therapeutic doses, impairing MECH-120 synaptic homeostasis and MECH-121 schema replay, producing context representations that remain globally undifferentiated -- the same failure mode as SD-017 without any SWS-analog.

Preservation of habit and procedural memory in early Alzheimer's disease, while episodic and contextual memory fail, is architecturally predicted by the separation of the model-free habit system (MECH-163 D1/D2, SNc) from the contextual attribution system (E3 hippocampal, requiring offline consolidation phases): the habit system does not require offline consolidation to function, so its relative preservation under early consolidation pipeline failure is not incidental but follows from the architectural separation.

Progressive sleep deprivation or neurodegeneration causes staged failure of the offline consolidation pipeline in reverse dependency order: precision recalibration (MECH-123/Phase 4) degrades first, producing early MCI features; slot-filling (MECH-121/Phase 2-3) next, producing the classic early Alzheimer's episodic profile (intact remote, absent new); slot-formation (MECH-120/Phase 1-2) last, producing middle-stage contextual identity loss and schema destabilisation; global context collapse last.

Context slot-formation (schema abstraction: which distinctions between contexts are worth representing) and slot-filling (causal attribution: which evidence populates each slot) are computationally separated functions that cannot be co-computed in a single online pass. Slot structure must be consolidated during an SWS-analog phase before slot-filling during a REM-analog phase can yield reliable attribution signal.

There exists an optimal range of daily Model Error Load (MEL): insufficient MEL (extreme monotony, isolation, institutional under-stimulation) produces progressive model rigidity via under-stimulation of the learning drive even when sleep architecture is intact; excessive MEL (acute trauma, overwhelming novelty, extreme responsibility) produces overload insomnia and incomplete update even with extended sleep opportunity.

Sleep phase architecture is regulated by three distinct drives -- circadian timing, homeostatic synaptic pressure, and a learning/model-update demand drive proportional to daily prediction error accumulation (Model Error Load, MEL) -- and only the third drive determines whether the overnight update phase is sufficient for the error burden generated during waking.

Any agent that builds a model of the world, acts in that world, and learns from experience cannot safely update its world model while using it to navigate the world; it therefore requires periodic offline phases in which action is suspended and the model is reorganised via replay and simulation -- this is not a biological contingency but a general computational necessity for model-building agents.

Dementia is computationally a progressive failure of contextual attribution rather than primarily a memory storage failure: episodic memory loss is downstream of progressive collapse of the offline consolidation pipeline that maintains the context attribution scaffold.

The biological NREM-then-REM sleep phase sequence is the correct computational order, derivable from the logical dependencies between the failure modes each phase addresses; this ordering is not a contingent biological fact but an engineering necessity, and it serves directly as the V4 rewiring specification: each phase specifies what structural change the REE substrate requires to address its failure mode.

Bidirectional hippocampus-neocortex information flow is architecturally necessary for attribution mapping convergence: the SWS-direction (hippocampus to cortex) installs context schema structure; waking and REM-direction reactivations fill those structures with causal attribution estimates. Without bidirectional flow, context representations remain globally undifferentiated despite locally coherent online encoding.

top_dependency_targets.title: REE-v3 requires a minimal sleep-phase infrastructure: an SWS-analog phase (bidirectional hippocampus-to-cortex replay for schema/slot consolidation) and a REM-analog phase (causal attribution replay for slot-filling from co-correlational evidence ordering). Without these offline phases, hippocampal attribution mapping cannot converge and context representations remain globally undifferentiated.

source_claims.title: Cognitive map traversal via theta sequences operates at the agent's active abstraction level. Theta sequences do not have a fixed semantic content -- they simulate trajectories through whatever cognitive map the substrate vocabulary currently defines, whether spatial, conceptual, type-graph, or option-graph. Sister claim to MECH-299, on the map-being-traversed axis.

Theta-cycle content scales with the agent's current substrate abstraction vocabulary: the unit packaged into a single theta cycle is the smallest reusable item available in the active substrate stack -- atomic actions when only those exist, action chunks when SD-045 lands, type-instance matches when SD-040/MECH-296 land, option invocations when SD-042 lands. Refinement of MECH-089 (theta-gamma nesting) on the content-of-packet axis.

Theta-burst packet contains multi-content joint binding: each ~125ms theta cycle binds a {goal_latent, action_proposal, risk_estimate, state_summary} tuple within one phase-aligned window, with verisimilitude grounding the rollout step that must stay ahead of real time.

Waking hippocampal search allocates a minority probe budget to top ghost-goal entries, seeding proposals around unresolved but still-wanted anchors instead of relying on pure current-anchor CEM or random probe noise.

Ephaptic field coherence in CA1/CA3 pyramidal layers is the candidate physical substrate for the per-stream verisimilitude readout that MECH-269 anchor selection operates over. Streams whose predictions align with realized values produce coherent pyramidal ensembles whose extracellular fields constructively reinforce; misaligned streams produce incoherent fields. 'Anchor-eligible' reduces to 'field-coherent at read time.'

Hippocampal proposer anchor selection AND anchor-reset: (a) trajectory proposals issued between committed actions anchor on the subset of current latent streams whose regional verisimilitude (per-stream prediction/realization alignment) exceeds threshold; misaligned streams hold their last-verified snapshot (anchor carryover) rather than contaminate the rollout. (b) Active anchors are continuously re-evaluated against an effective verisimilitude V_s_anchor(a, t) = V_s(r, t) - staleness[r] (MECH-284 read-out); if V_s_anchor falls below theta_reset(r) for k consecutive steps the anchor is marked inactive (NOT erased -- dual-trace preservation per Bouton 2004) and a new anchor is sought from the current latent slice. A minority probe channel deliberately inverts the gate for low-verisimilitude / high-PE regions, carrying a strengthened MECH-094 hypothesis tag, and does not update the ARC-018 viability map until realized-experience validation.

Capacity-limited selection for E3 access occurs at the E1/E2 -> E3 boundary via a pulvinar-TRN analogue gate, not inside E3. The gate selects which active E1/E2 content is broadcast to E3 per heartbeat cycle; selection is distinct from (and upstream of) the MECH-089 theta-gamma packaging operation.

At each E3 heartbeat cycle, a top-k selection over active E1/E2 latents determines which content enters E3 deliberation. Selection weights combine precision, z_goal-derived template gain, and noradrenergic bottom-up salience.

The hippocampal indexing substrate includes a temporal dimension implemented via time cells that tile elapsed time using the same phase-precession and theta-sequence machinery as place cells, enabling correct ordering of states within multi-step planning rollouts and working-memory sequences.
Oscillatory coupling multiplexing: cross-frequency oscillatory dynamics (gamma/theta/beta/delta) implement phase-based separation of perception, simulation, and action preparation streams.
Temporal Coherence Loop (TCL): architecture must include a distributed loop responsible for maintaining phase alignment and temporal synchrony necessary for V(t) to be computable.

Theta oscillations (4-8 Hz) implement sequential traversal across indexed representations within the E1 associative manifold, unifying hippocampal theta sequences, working memory ordering, planning rollout, and memory retrieval under a single traversal-clock mechanism.
Thalamo-cortical spindle-equivalent bursts package E3/hippocampal replay content for z_theta delivery AND gate external sensory input, protecting the consolidation episode from interruption.

E1's LSTM hidden state serves as the working memory substrate for goal representation; when conditioned on z_goal_latent, E1 maintains goal context recurrently across steps without requiring ongoing benefit signals.

The theta-rate packaging of E1 output (MECH-089 ThetaBuffer) is the primary pathway through which E1's goal-context maintenance reaches E3's trajectory scoring -- the computational analog of frontal-hippocampal theta synchronisation.

top_dependency_targets.title: E1 updates are batched into theta-cycle summaries before reaching E3 (cross-frequency temporal packaging).

source_claims.title: policy_composition_chunk_accumulator -- striatum/DLS-analog formation operator that builds chunk candidates from sequences of policy primitives repeatedly executed together with consistent outcomes. First child mechanism for ARC-071 (the maintenance operator MECH-324 is registered separately). Encodes the lit-pull R1 verdict (repetition + outcome consistency as primary trigger, evaluative-gate upstream, V_s-positive secondary) + R2 verdict partial (striatum-analog formation substrate; vmPFC/IL maintenance substrate handled by MECH-324) + R4 verdict (chunked primitive carries initiation-set + termination-condition fields per Sutton 1999 options structure) + R5 verdict (gradual hysteresis with F_low formation < F_high dissolution; chunk-size budget 2-5 elements per level). Two write paths: default MECH-094 strict (hypothesis_tag=False real executions only); sleep-replay carve-out under MECH-322 conditions (replay_origin=True audit flag with accelerated dissolution if not corroborated by real waking execution).

policy_composition.sleep_replay_value_conditioned_chunking_consolidation -- narrow exception path that permits ARC-071 chunk formation from replayed (hypothesis_tag=True) sequences during designated sleep phase, IF the replayed sequence carries a value-tag from prior real-executed episodes AND the formed chunk carries a replay_origin=True audit flag with accelerated dissolution if not corroborated by real waking execution within N episodes. Resolves ARC-071 lit-pull R6 governance escalation (Option B carve-out, picked 2026-05-11).

Anticipatory positive affect (excitement) and anticipatory negative affect (dread) emerge as derived states from the conjunction of (a) signed VALENCE_SURPRISE, (b) MECH-216 schema readout coupled to z_beta arousal, (c) anticipatory VALENCE_LIKING write at predicted-imminent-positive-event locations, and (d) MECH-216 writes at predicted rather than current location. Four-gap substrate amendment to MECH-216 + MECH-205 + the residue valence buffer, NOT a new VALENCE channel.

Drive amplification (SD-012) reaches approach action selection only via liking-stream activation. Drive raises liking-stream gain on goal-congruent outcomes, which supplies the cue-side pull for approach. Without the liking-bridge, drive-amplified goal seeding produces a passive z_goal latent without behavioural consequence -- the EXQ-483 catatonic-lock signature.

Goal-directed perception requires a prospective precision-template write channel from z_goal to the E1 prior, anatomically analogous to the dorsal attention network (FEF/IPS -> V1) feedback, distinct from residue-geometry (history-driven) sampling bias.

DA-modulated RBF center density: dopaminergic signal at reward encounters allocates multiple closely-spaced RBF centers in the hippocampal residue field, creating representational expansion at reward locations without requiring environmental richness.
Environmental gradient texture: multi-channel world observation with neutral landmark objects
temporal_wanting_propagation
e1_predictive_wanting
proxy_goal_necessity
multi_level_wanting_goal_hierarchy

REE-v3 requires a minimal sleep-phase infrastructure: an SWS-analog phase (bidirectional hippocampus-to-cortex replay for schema/slot consolidation) and a REM-analog phase (causal attribution replay for slot-filling from co-correlational evidence ordering). Without these offline phases, hippocampal attribution mapping cannot converge and context representations remain globally undifferentiated.
Tonic serotonergic signal maintains VALENCE_WANTING floor under chronic harm exposure, preventing benefit terrain collapse.

Developmental hardening should be substrate-specific: social cognition, goal representation, and epistemic-ethical substrates should retain elevated plasticity throughout adulthood (selective neoteny), while procedural and motor substrates can fully harden.
Benefit terrain collapse creates a closed negative feedback loop (reduced exploration -> reduced benefit exposure -> continued sub-threshold seeding) predicting chronicity.

top_dependency_targets.title: Hippocampal map nodes must store an explicit 4-component valence vector (wanting, liking, harm-discriminative, surprise) updated incrementally per visit; replay prioritisation is weighted by drive-state-gated valence relevance.

source_claims.title: affective_stream_modulation_of_arbitration_REE_novel. Arbitration weight is modulated by affective stream load: when the SD-010 / SD-011 affective stream produces high load (high salience harm or affect), the arbitration layer routes more weight to rules associated with affect-laden context, suppressing arbitration weight on neutral-context rules. The REE-novel claim is the FUNCTIONAL CONSEQUENCE: dual-stream architecture (SD-010/SD-011) is well-anchored in Murray-Rudebeck 2018 and Pessoa-Adolphs 2010, but the modulation of rule-arbitration weights by affective-stream load is REE-specific (MEDIUM-HIGH divergence). Sub-claim of MECH-312.

GABAergic regulatory layer applies cross-stream exponential decay (z_harm_s, z_harm_a, z_beta) modulated by tonic gaba_tone; missing-decay regulator is the proximal substrate cause of harm-stream lock-in (catatonia subtype II) observed in V3-EXQ-471.

Regional verisimilitude V_s gates not only hippocampal proposer anchor selection but also which streams ground forward predictions in cortical world models (E1 sensory predictor, E2 transition model). Without symmetric V_s gating on E1/E2 rollouts, downstream consumers receive stale-but-confident-looking prediction errors -- the wired-but-inert failure mode.

Hippocampal proposer anchor selection AND anchor-reset: (a) trajectory proposals issued between committed actions anchor on the subset of current latent streams whose regional verisimilitude (per-stream prediction/realization alignment) exceeds threshold; misaligned streams hold their last-verified snapshot (anchor carryover) rather than contaminate the rollout. (b) Active anchors are continuously re-evaluated against an effective verisimilitude V_s_anchor(a, t) = V_s(r, t) - staleness[r] (MECH-284 read-out); if V_s_anchor falls below theta_reset(r) for k consecutive steps the anchor is marked inactive (NOT erased -- dual-trace preservation per Bouton 2004) and a new anchor is sought from the current latent slice. A minority probe channel deliberately inverts the gate for low-verisimilitude / high-PE regions, carrying a strengthened MECH-094 hypothesis tag, and does not update the ARC-018 viability map until realized-experience validation.
Single-pass agency attribution on the z_world (causal-footprint) reafferent stream: residual = z_world_observed - E2_world(z_world_{t-1}, a_actual).

Curiosity-driven approach must distinguish world-state novelty from agent-policy novelty; untyped novelty reward creates chronic approach pressure toward partially unpredictable agents regardless of harm risk.

In a multiagent world, harm must be represented as a relational signal: harm-to-agent (direct cost/physical signal) and harm-to-agency (obstruction of another agent's goal-pursuit) are distinct signal types requiring distinct architectures.
SD-003 counterfactual attribution requires a dedicated harm forward model E2_harm_s(z_harm_s, action) -> z_harm_s_next operating within the sensory-discriminative harm stream.

vmPFC is the substrate that converts stored affective, normative, and residue content -- prior outcome history, social and identity constraints, learned value associations, and safety memories -- into active components of the navigable state used by E3 during trajectory evaluation.

The system maintains a functional distinction between simulation-mode content and real-experience content, such that simulation content does not accumulate in the viability map as committed experience; failures of this distinction produce confabulation (simulated events encoded as real).
Goal-directed behavior requires homeostatic drive modulation: z_goal seeding demands drive-scaled benefit signals.
Love as long-horizon care-investment is a structurally coherent agent disposition, not an add-on sentiment.

REE-v3 requires a minimal sleep-phase infrastructure: an SWS-analog phase (bidirectional hippocampus-to-cortex replay for schema/slot consolidation) and a REM-analog phase (causal attribution replay for slot-filling from co-correlational evidence ordering). Without these offline phases, hippocampal attribution mapping cannot converge and context representations remain globally undifferentiated.
The NREM sub-phase of offline mode replays recent episodic content via SWR-equivalent sequences, transferring episodic traces from E3/hippocampal buffer to E1/neocortical schematic representation.

Play mode boundary requires a co-maintained context tag held by both agent and environment; agent-internal tagging alone is insufficient and unilateral play assertion without mutual signal is manipulation.

The REM sub-phase of offline mode recalibrates precision priors and tests world model hypotheses via unconstrained generative simulation, with commit gate fully suppressed.

Hippocampal replay is surprise-gated and generative: episodes with high unexplained prediction error are prioritized, replayed with counterfactual variations via E2, and deprioritized only when forward models can account for the surprise.
V(t): Verisimilitude is the precision-weighted, phase-aligned, hierarchical correspondence between ascending sensory-constrained and descending model-based signals.
Temporal depth D_V(t): system behaviour must depend on temporal persistence of verisimilitude coupling, not instantaneous V(t) alone.

Any agent that builds a model of the world, acts in that world, and learns from experience cannot safely update its world model while using it to navigate the world; it therefore requires periodic offline phases in which action is suspended and the model is reorganised via replay and simulation -- this is not a biological contingency but a general computational necessity for model-building agents.

Amygdala analogue as BLA + CeA salience stage between z_harm_a and the cingulate/hippocampus — two peer non-trainable arithmetic modules owning the MECH-046 and MECH-074a-d behaviours.

V_s residual schema-staleness accumulator: a region-indexed scalar that integrates broadcast invalidation events (MECH-287) with attribution_weight credit assignment over the active anchor set, leaks slowly, and is read by both online anchor-reset (MECH-269 hysteresis check, waking) and sleep-consolidation priority (MECH-285, offline). Distinct from generic prediction error (which operates on latent values and updates online via gradient): MECH-284 is region-indexed, accumulates across events, and exposes a dual read-out (online + offline). Refined 2026-04-22 from sleep-only formulation to dual-readout formulation after V3-EXQ-475 demonstrated that an agent trapped in a stale anchor needs an online consumer of the staleness signal -- MECH-285 sleep-only readout cannot rescue the agent during waking. Saturated map produces over-attention to schema revision (anxiety-analog); absent map produces schema rigidity (V3-EXQ-475 phenotype: 5-6 PAG releases per seed but never integrate to anchor invalidation -> 1000/1000 freeze-active steps).

z_gamma split into z_self (E2 motor-sensory domain) and z_world (E3/Hippocampus domain).

MECH-271 routing is state-gated. In waking, the anchor channel dominates the hippocampal fan-out: replay preferentially reaches consolidation and viability-map consumers to support decision-making. In sleep, the probe channel dominates: replay preferentially seeds Bayesian schema restructuring -- testing which action-outcome attributions held up across episodes, creating new buckets for non-fitting experiences, revising causal graphs. The informational needs of sleep (schema revision) and waking (decision support) are distinct, and the routing bias reflects that.

Salience-network coordinator: network-level module reading AIC-, dACC-, MCC-, PCC-analog subdivisions and outputting a discrete operating-mode variable (external_task / internal_replay / internal_planning / offline_consolidation) plus a mode-switch trigger.

Type-encoder produces a category-prototype feature vector that is written into the AnchorSet alongside z_world, so anchors can be queried by type-key as well as location-key. The type-encoder uses the same input substrate as the existing instance-encoder but produces a different (regularity-extracted) representation, mirroring the trisynaptic-vs-monosynaptic complementary-learning architecture within hippocampus.

Inactive or strained anchors whose preserved goal payload still matches the current goal form a ranked ghost-goal bank; priority scales with wanting, goal-match, staleness, and recoverability rather than with staleness alone.

Sleep-consolidation priority from V_s residuals: during sleep-phase Bayesian aggregation (MECH-275) and sleep-dependent self-model aggregation (MECH-273), the order and weight of replay events is biased by the schema-staleness map produced by MECH-284. Replay is not uniform across schema and is not solely salience-driven (dopaminergic tagging); it is also prioritised by accumulated verisimilitude residuals. Schema regions with the most accumulated 'this is wrong' evidence get replayed first, more often, and with higher schema-update authority during sleep. PTSD-rumination has a clean architectural account here: MECH-285 priority loss co-occurring with MECH-094 hypothesis-tag dysfunction, locking the staleness tag from ever clearing.
E1 updates are batched into theta-cycle summaries before reaching E3 (cross-frequency temporal packaging).

Option library substrate stores a discrete codebook of named, reusable action subroutines (each as initiation-set + termination-function + internal-policy triple, per Sutton-Precup-Singh 1999), distinct from the existing continuous SD-004 action_object_decoder. Required for hierarchical action composition, tool use, social-coordination protocols, and richer ghost-probe seeding.

Waking hippocampal search allocates a minority probe budget to top ghost-goal entries, seeding proposals around unresolved but still-wanted anchors instead of relying on pure current-anchor CEM or random probe noise.

behavioral_diversity_generation_pathway (multi-substrate distributed: LC-NE tonic + frontopolar curiosity + striatal novelty + hippocampal trajectory sampling). Architectural commitment: a non-trivial behavioural diversity generation pathway is upstream-of and logically prior to both rule pathways (ARC-062 top-down rule-apprehension and ARC-064 bottom-up rule-discovery). Without it, neither pathway has anything to weight or cluster -- gradient descent on a parametric policy without diversity pressure collapses to the smoothest single regime, the predicted equilibrium MECH-309 identifies. The biology distributes diversity generation across at least four substrates: LC-NE tonic noise floor, frontopolar uncertainty-driven curiosity, striatal novelty bonus, and hippocampal trajectory sampling. REE registers this as a foundational architectural slot whose specific child mechanisms (MECH-313 noise-floor, MECH-314 structured-curiosity with three sub-flavours, and the MECH-315-absorbed proposal-diversity channel) are independently testable but jointly load-bearing.

(b) Active anchors are continuously re-evaluated against an effective verisimilitude V_s_anchor(a, t) = V_s(r, t) - staleness[r] (MECH-284 read-out); if V_s_anchor falls below theta_reset(r) for k consecutive steps the anchor is marked inactive (NOT erased -- dual-trace preservation per Bouton 2004) and a new anchor is sought from the current latent slice. A minority probe channel deliberately inverts the gate for low-verisimilitude / high-PE regions, carrying a strengthened MECH-094 hypothesis tag, and does not update the ARC-018 viability map until realized-experience validation.

rule_arbitration_multi_variable_multi_channel_dynamic_within_session. Parent claim for the multi-variable, multi-channel, dynamic-within-session arbitration that selects between competing rules / policy modes / action sources at the policy layer. Arbitration is governed by at least four distinct sub-mechanisms (MECH-312a/b/c/d), each falsifiable independently, with a candidate fifth (controllability/agency) deferred pending V3 substrate availability. Recommended combination rule: multiplicative gate (per-channel softmax of reliability * cost * agency * V_s * practice_maturity products) per Pull 3 R4 verdict; falsified against additive-logit baseline in V3-EXQ-543b/c. Reframed 2026-05-10 from earlier dual-channel-arbitration sketch following Pull 3 SYNTHESIS R5 SUB-MECH SPLIT recommendation (conf 0.78).

structured_curiosity_bonus (frontopolar_uncertainty_driven_exploration_expected_free_energy_analog). A reward bonus on action-selection that rewards information-gain or uncertainty-reduction, distinct from a state-independent noise floor (MECH-313). Biological substrate: rostrolateral prefrontal exploration bonus (Daw et al. 2006 Nature) operating jointly with striatal novelty (Wittmann et al. 2008 Neuron). Three sub-flavours (MECH-314a/b/c) that the lit-pull recommended NOT to collapse prematurely: striatal novelty (Wittmann anchor), frontopolar uncertainty-driven curiosity (Daw anchor), learning-progress / intrinsic-motivation curiosity (Schmidhuber/Pathak tradition). Active-inference (Friston 2010/2015 expected free energy) provides the formal-level unification. Q-044 captures the open question of whether the three sub-flavours are distinct substrates or three readings of one mechanism with different upstream inputs.

Monomodal policy collapse is the equilibrium of a parametric-policy agent without a rule-apprehension layer. Bayesian update and gradient descent revise weights over a hypothesis space they do not invent; without a non-Bayesian rule-creator that proposes discriminative policy modes ('near-hazard -> reef regime; else -> forage regime'), the trainer collapses to the smoothest single regime good-enough across the whole state space. Monostrategy is therefore not a bug of training but the predicted output of an architecture in which only updaters exist and no apprehender does. Falsifiable by the weak-reading rule-apprehension experiment (ARC-062): a gated-policy architecture trained on the same substrate should break the collapse where standard E3 does not.

bottom_up_behavioral_pattern_extraction_pathway (hippocampal_CLS_bi_pathway + dorsolateral_striatum_chunking + OFC_cognitive_map analog). Architectural commitment: rule discovery from observed-behaviour clustering is logically and architecturally distinct from rule application from instructed/external context (ARC-062 top-down rule-apprehension). Where ARC-062 receives a context cue and selects a discriminative policy mode, ARC-064 receives an observed-behaviour stream and extracts cross-episode regularities, compressed behavioural patterns, and rule-state abstractions. Both pathways presuppose ARC-065 behavioural diversity generation upstream. Multi-substrate distributed instantiation: hippocampal Complementary Learning Systems bi-pathway (Schapiro et al. 2017), dorsolateral striatum action chunking (Smith & Graybiel 2013/2016), OFC cognitive-map state abstraction (Wilson et al. 2014; Schuck et al. 2016).

stochastic_noise_floor (max_entropy_policy_regularisation_LC_NE_tonic_analog). A floor-level stochastic action-selection noise that prevents complete deterministic collapse of the policy. Biological substrate: locus coeruleus tonic firing producing baseline action-selection variability (Aston-Jones & Cohen 2005 adaptive-gain model). Computational analog: max-entropy policy regularisation / SAC entropy bonus (Haarnoja et al. 2018). Distinct from MECH-260 dACC anti-recency: MECH-313 is a state-independent noise floor, while MECH-260 is a state-dependent recency penalty. Both can contribute to anti-monostrategy pressure but operate via different mechanisms; whether they collapse into a single substrate or are mutually load-bearing is open (Q-045).
Single-pass agency attribution via forward-model comparator on the z_harm_s reafferent stream: residual = z_harm_s_observed - E2_harm_s(z_harm_s_{t-1}, a_actual).

policy_composition_via_repeated_grounding (zoom-out / chunk a sequence of primitives into a single atomic primitive after repeated successful execution). Child of ARC-069 dynamic-regranularisation parent commitment. Architectural commitment: sequences of policy primitives that have been repeatedly executed together with consistent outcomes are accumulated into a single primitive that the rule-apprehension and diversity-generation layers can treat atomically. Trigger: repetition count + outcome consistency (slow accumulator). Direction: zoom out. Phenomenology anchor: 'making coffee was once seventeen motor acts; after a thousand repetitions it is one unit.' Names the TRANSITION mechanism (planned -> habitual chunk) that MECH-163 dual systems presupposes but does not specify.

developmental_bootstrapping_and_cue_indexed_retrieval_gaps -- REE lacks (1) a dedicated diversity-bootstrapping epoch that populates the hippocampal trajectory store before reinforcement narrowing; and (2) a differentiable cue-indexed retrieval path from PFC context representation to trajectory generation. EXQ-561 cluster / MECH-269 is diagnostic of gap (1); EXP-0155 zero-gradient cue_action_proj is diagnostic of gap (2). The two gaps are inter-dependent: the severed cue gradient (gap 2) is the mechanism that prevents diverse option population (gap 1).

Dual-trace anchors preserve a goal-state snapshot plus wanting/arousal payload at write or invalidation time, so unresolved goals remain queryable after the active plan fails.

policy_composition.sleep_replay_value_conditioned_chunking_consolidation -- narrow exception path that permits ARC-071 chunk formation from replayed (hypothesis_tag=True) sequences during designated sleep phase, IF the replayed sequence carries a value-tag from prior real-executed episodes AND the formed chunk carries a replay_origin=True audit flag with accelerated dissolution if not corroborated by real waking execution within N episodes. Resolves ARC-071 lit-pull R6 governance escalation (Option B carve-out, picked 2026-05-11).

hippocampal_cue_indexed_trajectory_library -- the hippocampal module should function as a content-addressable trajectory store where PFC context/goal cues pattern-complete against the stored library to retrieve trajectory templates appropriate for the current context; different PFC context states retrieve different trajectory subsets, enabling context-differentiated behavioral option selection without regenerating trajectories from scratch each tick.
